authors_text: Katy Ilonka Gero,Lydia B. Chilton,Chris Melancon,Mike Cleron
title: Eliciting Gestures for Novel Note-taking Interactions
title_zh: 引发新颖的笔记交互手势
abstract: Handwriting recognition is improving in leaps and bounds, and this opens up new opportunities for stylus-based interactions. In particular, note-taking applications can become a more intelligent user interface, incorporating new features like autocomplete and integrated search. In this work we ran a gesture elicitation study, asking 21 participants to imagine how they would interact with an imaginary, intelligent note-taking application. We report agreement on the elicited gestures, finding that while existing common interactions are prevalent (like double taps and long presses) a number of more novel interactions (like dragging selected items to hotspots or using annotations) were also well-represented. We discuss the mental models participants drew on when explaining their gestures and what kind of feedback users might need to move to more stylus-centric interactions.
summary: Handwriting recognition is improving in leaps and bounds, and this opens up new opportunities for stylus-based interactions. In particular, note-taking applications can become a more intelligent user interface, incorporating new features like autocomplete and integrated search. In this work we ran a gesture elicitation study, asking 21 participants to imagine how they would interact with an imaginary, intelligent note-taking application. We report agreement on the elicited gestures, finding that while existing common interactions are prevalent (like double taps and long presses) a number of more novel interactions (like dragging selected items to hotspots or using annotations) were also well-represented. We discuss the mental models participants drew on when explaining their gestures and what kind of feedback users might need to move to more stylus-centric interactions.
abstract_zh: 手写识别正在突飞猛进地进步，这为基于手写笔的交互开辟了新的机会。特别是，笔记应用程序可以成为更加智能的用户界面，结合自动完成和集成搜索等新功能。在这项工作中，我们进行了一项手势启发研究，要求 21 名参与者想象他们将如何与想象中的智能笔记应用程序进行交互。我们报告了对引发的手势的一致意见，发现虽然现有的常见交互很普遍（例如双击和长按），但许多更新颖的交互（例如将所选项目拖到热点或使用注释）也得到了很好的体现。我们讨论了参与者在解释他们的手势时所采用的心理模型，以及用户可能需要什么样的反馈才能转向更多以手写笔为中心的交互。

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究探索新型笔记应用中的手势交互设计，分析用户对智能笔记界面的想象与需求。
AI.motivation: 随着手写识别技术进步，笔记应用需向更智能的交互方式演进，但缺乏对用户潜在手势需求的系统研究。
AI.method: 对21名参与者进行手势激发研究，要求其设想与智能笔记应用的交互方式，并记录和分析提出的手势方案。
AI.result: 发现用户既采用常见手势（如双击、长按），也提出新颖交互（如拖拽至热点区域），且对新型手势存在较高共识度。
AI.conclusion: 用户对智能笔记应用的交互想象包含传统与创新手势，设计需结合认知模型并提供反馈机制以促进触控笔交互的普及。

title: IDCAIS: Inter-Defender Collision-Aware Interception Strategy against Multiple Attackers
title_zh: IDCAIS：针对多个攻击者的防御者间碰撞感知拦截策略
abstract: In the prior literature on multi-agent area defense games, the assignments of the defenders to the attackers are done based on a cost metric associated only with the interception of the attackers. In contrast to that, this paper presents an Inter-Defender Collision-Aware Interception Strategy (IDCAIS) for defenders to intercept attackers in order to defend a protected area, such that the defender-to-attacker assignment protocol not only takes into account an interception-related cost but also takes into account any possible future collisions among the defenders on their optimal interception trajectories. In particular, in this paper, the defenders are assigned to intercept attackers using a mixed-integer quadratic program (MIQP) that: 1) minimizes the sum of times taken by defenders to capture the attackers under time-optimal control, as well as 2) helps eliminate or delay possible future collisions among the defenders on the optimal trajectories. To prevent inevitable collisions on optimal trajectories or collisions arising due to time-sub-optimal behavior by the attackers, a minimally augmented control using exponential control barrier function (ECBF) is also provided. Simulations show the efficacy of the approach.
summary: In the prior literature on multi-agent area defense games, the assignments of the defenders to the attackers are done based on a cost metric associated only with the interception of the attackers. In contrast to that, this paper presents an Inter-Defender Collision-Aware Interception Strategy (IDCAIS) for defenders to intercept attackers in order to defend a protected area, such that the defender-to-attacker assignment protocol not only takes into account an interception-related cost but also takes into account any possible future collisions among the defenders on their optimal interception trajectories. In particular, in this paper, the defenders are assigned to intercept attackers using a mixed-integer quadratic program (MIQP) that: 1) minimizes the sum of times taken by defenders to capture the attackers under time-optimal control, as well as 2) helps eliminate or delay possible future collisions among the defenders on the optimal trajectories. To prevent inevitable collisions on optimal trajectories or collisions arising due to time-sub-optimal behavior by the attackers, a minimally augmented control using exponential control barrier function (ECBF) is also provided. Simulations show the efficacy of the approach.
abstract_zh: 在有关多智能体区域防御博弈的现有文献中，防御者对攻击者的分配是基于仅与攻击者的拦截相关的成本度量来完成的。与此相反，本文提出了一种防御者间碰撞感知拦截策略（IDCAIS），让防御者拦截攻击者以保卫保护区，这样防御者到攻击者的分配协议不仅考虑与拦截相关的成本，而且还考虑防御者之间在其最佳拦截轨迹上任何可能的未来碰撞。特别是，在本文中，防御者被分配使用混合整数二次规划（MIQP）来拦截攻击者，该程序：1）最小化防御者在时间最优控制下捕获攻击者所需的时间总和，以及2）有助于消除或延迟防御者之间在最佳轨迹上未来可能发生的碰撞。为了防止最佳轨迹上不可避免的碰撞或由于攻击者的次优行为而引起的碰撞，还提供了使用指数控制障碍函数（ECBF）的最小增强控制。模拟显示了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种考虑防御者间碰撞的拦截策略（IDCAIS），用于在多攻击者场景下优化防御者分配以保护区域。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在分配防御者拦截攻击者时仅考虑拦截成本，忽视了防御者在最优拦截路径上的未来碰撞风险，可能导致实际应用中的碰撞事故。
AI.method: 通过混合整数二次规划（MIQP）模型，同时最小化拦截时间和避免防御者碰撞；并引入指数控制屏障函数（ECBF）应对不可避免的碰撞或攻击者非时间最优行为。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法在拦截效率和碰撞避免方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: IDCAIS通过综合考虑拦截成本与碰撞风险，为多智能体区域防御提供了更安全和高效的策略框架。

authors_text: Xiangtao Kong,Xina Liu,Jinjin Gu,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong
title: Reflash Dropout in Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 图像超分辨率中的重闪丢失
abstract: Dropout is designed to relieve the overfitting problem in high-level vision tasks but is rarely applied in low-level vision tasks, like image super-resolution (SR). As a classic regression problem, SR exhibits a different behaviour as high-level tasks and is sensitive to the dropout operation. However, in this paper, we show that appropriate usage of dropout benefits SR networks and improves the generalization ability. Specifically, dropout is better embedded at the end of the network and is significantly helpful for the multi-degradation settings. This discovery breaks our common sense and inspires us to explore its working mechanism. We further use two analysis tools -- one is from recent network interpretation works, and the other is specially designed for this task. The analysis results provide side proofs to our experimental findings and show us a new perspective to understand SR networks.
summary: Dropout is designed to relieve the overfitting problem in high-level vision tasks but is rarely applied in low-level vision tasks, like image super-resolution (SR). As a classic regression problem, SR exhibits a different behaviour as high-level tasks and is sensitive to the dropout operation. However, in this paper, we show that appropriate usage of dropout benefits SR networks and improves the generalization ability. Specifically, dropout is better embedded at the end of the network and is significantly helpful for the multi-degradation settings. This discovery breaks our common sense and inspires us to explore its working mechanism. We further use two analysis tools -- one is from recent network interpretation works, and the other is specially designed for this task. The analysis results provide side proofs to our experimental findings and show us a new perspective to understand SR networks.
abstract_zh: Dropout旨在缓解高级视觉任务中的过拟合问题，但很少应用于低级视觉任务，例如图像超分辨率（SR）。作为一个经典的回归问题，SR 表现出与高级任务不同的行为，并且对 dropout 操作敏感。然而，在本文中，我们表明适当使用 dropout 有利于 SR 网络并提高泛化能力。具体来说，dropout 更好地嵌入在网络末端，并且对多重降级设置有显着帮助。这一发现打破了我们的常识，启发我们探索其工作机制。我们进一步使用两种分析工具——一种来自最近的网络解释工作，另一种是专门为此任务设计的。分析结果为我们的实验结果提供了侧面证明，并向我们展示了理解SR网络的新视角。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在图像超分辨率（SR）任务中适当使用Dropout机制以提升网络泛化能力的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为Dropout在低层次视觉任务（如SR）中效果不佳，但作者发现合理应用Dropout可改善SR网络的泛化能力，尤其在多退化场景下表现显著。
AI.method: 在SR网络末尾嵌入Dropout层，并结合网络解释工具与任务定制分析方法，验证Dropout对多退化场景的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明Dropout能提升SR网络在多退化设置下的性能，分析工具进一步揭示了其工作机制与网络行为的新视角。
AI.conclusion: Dropout在SR中的合理应用可突破传统认知，为低层次视觉任务提供新的优化思路与理论支持。

motivation: 传统观点认为Dropout在低层次视觉任务（如SR）中效果不佳，但作者发现合理应用Dropout可改善SR网络的泛化能力，尤其在多退化场景下表现显著。
method: 在SR网络末尾嵌入Dropout层，并结合网络解释工具与任务定制分析方法，验证Dropout对多退化场景的有效性。
result: 实验表明Dropout能提升SR网络在多退化设置下的性能，分析工具进一步揭示了其工作机制与网络行为的新视角。
conclusion: Dropout在SR中的合理应用可突破传统认知，为低层次视觉任务提供新的优化思路与理论支持。
search_text: Reflash Dropout in Image Super-Resolution 图像超分辨率中的重闪丢失 Dropout is designed to relieve the overfitting problem in high-level vision tasks but is rarely applied in low-level vision tasks, like image super-resolution (SR). As a classic regression problem, SR exhibits a different behaviour as high-level tasks and is sensitive to the dropout operation. However, in this paper, we show that appropriate usage of dropout benefits SR networks and improves the generalization ability. Specifically, dropout is better embedded at the end of the network and is significantly helpful for the multi-degradation settings. This discovery breaks our common sense and inspires us to explore its working mechanism. We further use two analysis tools -- one is from recent network interpretation works, and the other is specially designed for this task. The analysis results provide side proofs to our experimental findings and show us a new perspective to understand SR networks. Dropout旨在缓解高级视觉任务中的过拟合问题，但很少应用于低级视觉任务，例如图像超分辨率（SR）。作为一个经典的回归问题，SR 表现出与高级任务不同的行为，并且对 dropout 操作敏感。然而，在本文中，我们表明适当使用 dropout 有利于 SR 网络并提高泛化能力。具体来说，dropout 更好地嵌入在网络末端，并且对多重降级设置有显着帮助。这一发现打破了我们的常识，启发我们探索其工作机制。我们进一步使用两种分析工具——一种来自最近的网络解释工作，另一种是专门为此任务设计的。分析结果为我们的实验结果提供了侧面证明，并向我们展示了理解SR网络的新视角。 本文研究了在图像超分辨率（SR）任务中适当使用Dropout机制以提升网络泛化能力的方法。 Xiangtao Kong,Xina Liu,Jinjin Gu,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong cs.CV

authors_text: Kirill Sirotkin,Marcos Escudero-Viñolo,Pablo Carballeira,Juan Carlos SanMiguel
title: Improved skin lesion recognition by a Self-Supervised Curricular Deep Learning approach
title_zh: 通过自我监督课程深度学习方法改进皮肤病变识别
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, submitted to the Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (Special Issue on Skin Image Analysis in the Age of Deep Learning)
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, submitted to the Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (Special Issue on Skin Image Analysis in the Age of Deep Learning)
abstract: State-of-the-art deep learning approaches for skin lesion recognition often require pretraining on larger and more varied datasets, to overcome the generalization limitations derived from the reduced size of the skin lesion imaging datasets. ImageNet is often used as the pretraining dataset, but its transferring potential is hindered by the domain gap between the source dataset and the target dermatoscopic scenario. In this work, we introduce a novel pretraining approach that sequentially trains a series of Self-Supervised Learning pretext tasks and only requires the unlabeled skin lesion imaging data. We present a simple methodology to establish an ordering that defines a pretext task curriculum. For the multi-class skin lesion classification problem, and ISIC-2019 dataset, we provide experimental evidence showing that: i) a model pretrained by a curriculum of pretext tasks outperforms models pretrained by individual pretext tasks, and ii) a model pretrained by the optimal pretext task curriculum outperforms a model pretrained on ImageNet. We demonstrate that this performance gain is related to the fact that the curriculum of pretext tasks better focuses the attention of the final model on the skin lesion. Beyond performance improvement, this strategy allows for a large reduction in the training time with respect to ImageNet pretraining, which is especially advantageous for network architectures tailored for a specific problem.
summary: State-of-the-art deep learning approaches for skin lesion recognition often require pretraining on larger and more varied datasets, to overcome the generalization limitations derived from the reduced size of the skin lesion imaging datasets. ImageNet is often used as the pretraining dataset, but its transferring potential is hindered by the domain gap between the source dataset and the target dermatoscopic scenario. In this work, we introduce a novel pretraining approach that sequentially trains a series of Self-Supervised Learning pretext tasks and only requires the unlabeled skin lesion imaging data. We present a simple methodology to establish an ordering that defines a pretext task curriculum. For the multi-class skin lesion classification problem, and ISIC-2019 dataset, we provide experimental evidence showing that: i) a model pretrained by a curriculum of pretext tasks outperforms models pretrained by individual pretext tasks, and ii) a model pretrained by the optimal pretext task curriculum outperforms a model pretrained on ImageNet. We demonstrate that this performance gain is related to the fact that the curriculum of pretext tasks better focuses the attention of the final model on the skin lesion. Beyond performance improvement, this strategy allows for a large reduction in the training time with respect to ImageNet pretraining, which is especially advantageous for network architectures tailored for a specific problem.
abstract_zh: 用于皮肤病变识别的最先进的深度学习方法通​​常需要对更大、更多样化的数据集进行预训练，以克服因皮肤病变成像数据集尺寸减小而产生的泛化限制。 ImageNet 通常用作预训练数据集，但其传输潜力受到源数据集和目标皮肤镜场景之间的域差距的阻碍。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的预训练方法，该方法顺序训练一系列自监督学习借口任务，并且只需要未标记的皮肤病变成像数据。我们提出了一种简单的方法来建立定义借口任务课程的顺序。对于多类皮肤病变分类问题和 ISIC-2019 数据集，我们提供的实验证据表明：i）通过借口任务课程预训练的模型优于通过单独借口任务预训练的模型，ii）通过最佳借口任务课程预训练的模型优于在 ImageNet 上预训练的模型。我们证明，这种性能提升与借口任务课程更好地将最终模型的注意力集中在皮肤病变上这一事实有关。除了性能改进之外，该策略还可以大大减少 ImageNet 预训练的训练时间，这对于针对特定问题定制的网络架构特别有利。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督课程深度学习的改进皮肤病变识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的皮肤病变识别深度学习方法通常需要在更大更多样化的数据集上进行预训练，但存在领域差距问题，而ImageNet的预训练效果受限于源数据集与目标皮肤镜场景之间的差异。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的预训练方法，通过顺序训练一系列自监督学习的预训练任务，并仅使用未标记的皮肤病变图像数据。提出了一种简单的方法来建立预训练任务的顺序，以定义预训练任务的课程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用预训练任务课程的模型在ISIC-2019数据集上的表现优于单独预训练任务模型和ImageNet预训练模型，并且训练时间大幅减少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过课程预训练任务更好地聚焦模型对皮肤病变的关注，提高了性能并减少了训练时间，对特定问题的网络架构具有显著优势。

authors_text: Ruoxin Chen,Jie Li,Junchi Yan,Ping Li,Bin Sheng
title: Input-Specific Robustness Certification for Randomized Smoothing
title_zh: 随机平滑的输入特定稳健性认证
abstract: Although randomized smoothing has demonstrated high certified robustness and superior scalability to other certified defenses, the high computational overhead of the robustness certification bottlenecks the practical applicability, as it depends heavily on the large sample approximation for estimating the confidence interval. In existing works, the sample size for the confidence interval is universally set and agnostic to the input for prediction. This Input-Agnostic Sampling (IAS) scheme may yield a poor Average Certified Radius (ACR)-runtime trade-off which calls for improvement. In this paper, we propose Input-Specific Sampling (ISS) acceleration to achieve the cost-effectiveness for robustness certification, in an adaptive way of reducing the sampling size based on the input characteristic. Furthermore, our method universally controls the certified radius decline from the ISS sample size reduction. The empirical results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet show that ISS can speed up the certification by more than three times at a limited cost of 0.05 certified radius. Meanwhile, ISS surpasses IAS on the average certified radius across the extensive hyperparameter settings. Specifically, ISS achieves ACR=0.958 on ImageNet ($σ=1.0$) in 250 minutes, compared to ACR=0.917 by IAS under the same condition. We release our code in \url{https://github.com/roy-ch/Input-Specific-Certification}.
summary: Although randomized smoothing has demonstrated high certified robustness and superior scalability to other certified defenses, the high computational overhead of the robustness certification bottlenecks the practical applicability, as it depends heavily on the large sample approximation for estimating the confidence interval. In existing works, the sample size for the confidence interval is universally set and agnostic to the input for prediction. This Input-Agnostic Sampling (IAS) scheme may yield a poor Average Certified Radius (ACR)-runtime trade-off which calls for improvement. In this paper, we propose Input-Specific Sampling (ISS) acceleration to achieve the cost-effectiveness for robustness certification, in an adaptive way of reducing the sampling size based on the input characteristic. Furthermore, our method universally controls the certified radius decline from the ISS sample size reduction. The empirical results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet show that ISS can speed up the certification by more than three times at a limited cost of 0.05 certified radius. Meanwhile, ISS surpasses IAS on the average certified radius across the extensive hyperparameter settings. Specifically, ISS achieves ACR=0.958 on ImageNet ($σ=1.0$) in 250 minutes, compared to ACR=0.917 by IAS under the same condition. We release our code in \url{https://github.com/roy-ch/Input-Specific-Certification}.
abstract_zh: 尽管随机平滑已经证明了相对于其他认证防御的高认证鲁棒性和卓越的可扩展性，但鲁棒性认证的高计算开销限制了实际适用性，因为它在很大程度上依赖于大样本近似来估计置信区间。在现有的工作中，置信区间的样本大小是普遍设置的并且与预测的输入无关。这种与输入无关的采样（IAS）方案可能会产生较差的平均认证半径（ACR）运行时权衡，需要改进。在本文中，我们提出了输入特定采样（ISS）加速，以根据输入特征自适应地减少采样大小，从而实现鲁棒性认证的成本效益。此外，我们的方法普遍控制了国际空间站样本量减少导致的经认证的半径下降。在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上的实证结果表明，ISS可以在0.05个认证半径的有限成本下将认证速度提高三倍以上。与此同时，ISS 在广泛的超参数设置的平均认证半径上超过了 IAS。具体来说，ISS 在 250 分钟内在 ImageNet ($σ=1.0$) 上实现了 ACR=0.958，而相同条件下 IAS 的 ACR=0.917。我们在 \url{https://github.com/roy-ch/Input-Specific-Certification} 中发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于输入特性的随机平滑鲁棒性认证加速方法（ISS），通过自适应减少采样数量以提高认证效率。
AI.motivation: 现有随机平滑认证方法采用统一采样策略，导致认证半径与运行时间的权衡不佳，需根据输入特性优化采样策略以提升效率。
AI.method: 提出输入特定采样（ISS）方法，根据输入特征自适应调整采样数量，并控制认证半径的衰减，实现计算成本与鲁棒性之间的平衡。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，ISS在认证半径仅损失0.05的情况下提速3倍以上，ImageNet（σ=1.0）下ACR达0.958（IAS为0.917）。
AI.conclusion: ISS通过输入感知的采样优化，在保持高认证半径的同时显著提升鲁棒性认证效率，代码已开源。

We release our code in \url{https://github.com/roy-ch/Input-Specific-Certification}. 尽管随机平滑已经证明了相对于其他认证防御的高认证鲁棒性和卓越的可扩展性，但鲁棒性认证的高计算开销限制了实际适用性，因为它在很大程度上依赖于大样本近似来估计置信区间。在现有的工作中，置信区间的样本大小是普遍设置的并且与预测的输入无关。这种与输入无关的采样（IAS）方案可能会产生较差的平均认证半径（ACR）运行时权衡，需要改进。在本文中，我们提出了输入特定采样（ISS）加速，以根据输入特征自适应地减少采样大小，从而实现鲁棒性认证的成本效益。此外，我们的方法普遍控制了国际空间站样本量减少导致的经认证的半径下降。在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上的实证结果表明，ISS可以在0.05个认证半径的有限成本下将认证速度提高三倍以上。与此同时，ISS 在广泛的超参数设置的平均认证半径上超过了 IAS。具体来说，ISS 在 250 分钟内在 ImageNet ($σ=1.0$) 上实现了 ACR=0.958，而相同条件下 IAS 的 ACR=0.917。我们在 \url{https://github.com/roy-ch/Input-Specific-Certification} 中发布了我们的代码。 本文提出了一种基于输入特性的随机平滑鲁棒性认证加速方法（ISS），通过自适应减少采样数量以提高认证效率。 Ruoxin Chen,Jie Li,Junchi Yan,Ping Li,Bin Sheng cs.CV

title: A New Adaptive Noise Covariance Matrices Estimation and Filtering Method: Application to Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 一种新的自适应噪声协方差矩阵估计和滤波方法：在多目标跟踪中的应用
abstract: Kalman filters are widely used for object tracking, where process and measurement noise are usually considered accurately known and constant. However, the exact known and constant assumptions do not always hold in practice. For example, when lidar is used to track noncooperative targets, the measurement noise is different under different distances and weather conditions. In addition, the process noise changes with the object's motion state, especially when the tracking object is a pedestrian, and the process noise changes more frequently. This paper proposes a new estimation-calibration-correction closed-loop estimation method to estimate the Kalman filter process and measurement noise covariance matrices online. First, we decompose the noise covariance matrix into an element distribution matrix and noise intensity and improve the Sage filter to estimate the element distribution matrix. Second, we propose a calibration method to accurately diagnose the noise intensity deviation. We then propose a correct method to adaptively correct the noise intensity online. Third, under the assumption that the system is detectable, the unbiased and convergence of the proposed method is mathematically proven. Simulation results prove the effectiveness and reliability of the proposed method. Finally, we apply the proposed method to multiobject tracking of lidar and evaluate it on the official KITTI server. The proposed method on the KITTI pedestrian multiobject tracking leaderboard (http://www.cvlibs.net/datasets /kitti/eval_tracking.php) surpasses all existing methods using lidar, proving the feasibility of the method in practical applications. This work provides a new way to improve the performance of the Kalman filter and multiobject tracking.

However, the exact known and constant assumptions do not always hold in practice. For example, when lidar is used to track noncooperative targets, the measurement noise is different under different distances and weather conditions. In addition, the process noise changes with the object's motion state, especially when the tracking object is a pedestrian, and the process noise changes more frequently. This paper proposes a new estimation-calibration-correction closed-loop estimation method to estimate the Kalman filter process and measurement noise covariance matrices online. First, we decompose the noise covariance matrix into an element distribution matrix and noise intensity and improve the Sage filter to estimate the element distribution matrix. Second, we propose a calibration method to accurately diagnose the noise intensity deviation. We then propose a correct method to adaptively correct the noise intensity online. Third, under the assumption that the system is detectable, the unbiased and convergence of the proposed method is mathematically proven. Simulation results prove the effectiveness and reliability of the proposed method. Finally, we apply the proposed method to multiobject tracking of lidar and evaluate it on the official KITTI server. The proposed method on the KITTI pedestrian multiobject tracking leaderboard (http://www.cvlibs.net/datasets /kitti/eval_tracking.php) surpasses all existing methods using lidar, proving the feasibility of the method in practical applications. This work provides a new way to improve the performance of the Kalman filter and multiobject tracking.
abstract_zh: 卡尔曼滤波器广泛用于对象跟踪，其中过程和测量噪声通常被认为是准确已知的且恒定的。然而，确切的已知和恒定的假设在实践中并不总是成立。例如，当使用激光雷达跟踪非合作目标时，不同距离和天气条件下测量噪声是不同的。另外，过程噪声随着对象的运动状态而变化，特别是当跟踪对象为行人时，过程噪声变化更加频繁。本文提出了一种新的估计-校准-校正闭环估计方法来在线估计卡尔曼滤波过程和测量噪声协方差矩阵。首先，我们将噪声协方差矩阵分解为元素分布矩阵和噪声强度，并改进Sage滤波器来估计元素分布矩阵。其次，我们提出了一种校准方法来准确诊断噪声强度偏差。然后我们提出了一种正确的方法来自适应地在线校正噪声强度。第三，在系统可检测的假设下，所提方法的无偏性和收敛性得到了数学证明。仿真结果证明了该方法的有效性和可靠性。最后，我们将所提出的方法应用于激光雷达的多目标跟踪，并在官方 KITTI 服务器上进行评估。 KITTI行人多目标跟踪排行榜（http://www.cvlibs.net/datasets/kitti/eval_tracking.php）上提出的方法超越了所有现有的使用激光雷达的方法，证明了该方法在实际应用中的可行性。这项工作为提高卡尔曼滤波器和多目标跟踪的性能提供了一种新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应噪声协方差矩阵估计与滤波方法，并应用于多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统卡尔曼滤波假设过程噪声和测量噪声已知且恒定，但在实际应用中（如激光雷达跟踪非合作目标），噪声会随距离、天气和运动状态变化，导致跟踪性能下降。
AI.method: 提出闭环估计方法，将噪声协方差矩阵分解为元素分布矩阵和噪声强度，改进Sage滤波器估计分布矩阵，设计校准与在线修正方法，并证明方法的无偏性和收敛性。
AI.result: 仿真和KITTI数据集实验证明该方法在多目标跟踪中优于现有激光雷达方法，登顶KITTI行人跟踪榜单。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为改进卡尔曼滤波和多目标跟踪性能提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

title: Deeper Learning with CoLU Activation
title_zh: 通过 CoLU 激活进行更深入的学习
abstract: In neural networks, non-linearity is introduced by activation functions. One commonly used activation function is Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU). ReLU has been a popular choice as an activation but has flaws. State-of-the-art functions like Swish and Mish are now gaining attention as a better choice as they combat many flaws presented by other activation functions. CoLU is an activation function similar to Swish and Mish in properties. It is defined as f(x)=x/(1-xe^-(x+e^x)). It is smooth, continuously differentiable, unbounded above, bounded below, non-saturating, and non-monotonic. Based on experiments done with CoLU with different activation functions, it is observed that CoLU usually performs better than other functions on deeper neural networks. While training different neural networks on MNIST on an incrementally increasing number of convolutional layers, CoLU retained the highest accuracy for more layers. On a smaller network with 8 convolutional layers, CoLU had the highest mean accuracy, closely followed by ReLU. On VGG-13 trained on Fashion-MNIST, CoLU had a 4.20% higher accuracy than Mish and 3.31% higher accuracy than ReLU. On ResNet-9 trained on Cifar-10, CoLU had 0.05% higher accuracy than Swish, 0.09% higher accuracy than Mish, and 0.29% higher accuracy than ReLU. It is observed that activation functions may behave better than other activation functions based on different factors including the number of layers, types of layers, number of parameters, learning rate, optimizer, etc. Further research can be done on these factors and activation functions for more optimal activation functions and more knowledge on their behavior.

ReLU has been a popular choice as an activation but has flaws. State-of-the-art functions like Swish and Mish are now gaining attention as a better choice as they combat many flaws presented by other activation functions. CoLU is an activation function similar to Swish and Mish in properties. It is defined as f(x)=x/(1-xe^-(x+e^x)). It is smooth, continuously differentiable, unbounded above, bounded below, non-saturating, and non-monotonic. Based on experiments done with CoLU with different activation functions, it is observed that CoLU usually performs better than other functions on deeper neural networks. While training different neural networks on MNIST on an incrementally increasing number of convolutional layers, CoLU retained the highest accuracy for more layers. On a smaller network with 8 convolutional layers, CoLU had the highest mean accuracy, closely followed by ReLU. On VGG-13 trained on Fashion-MNIST, CoLU had a 4.20% higher accuracy than Mish and 3.31% higher accuracy than ReLU. On ResNet-9 trained on Cifar-10, CoLU had 0.05% higher accuracy than Swish, 0.09% higher accuracy than Mish, and 0.29% higher accuracy than ReLU. It is observed that activation functions may behave better than other activation functions based on different factors including the number of layers, types of layers, number of parameters, learning rate, optimizer, etc. Further research can be done on these factors and activation functions for more optimal activation functions and more knowledge on their behavior.
abstract_zh: 在神经网络中，非线性是由激活函数引入的。一种常用的激活函数是整流线性单元 (ReLU)。 ReLU 一直是一种流行的激活选择，但也存在缺陷。 Swish 和 Mish 等最先进的函数现在作为更好的选择而受到关注，因为它们克服了其他激活函数带来的许多缺陷。 CoLU是一种性质类似于Swish和Mish的激活函数。它被定义为 f(x)=x/(1-xe^-(x+e^x))。它是平滑的、连续可微的、上无界、下有界、非饱和且非单调的。根据使用具有不同激活函数的 CoLU 进行的实验，我们发现 CoLU 在更深的神经网络上通常比其他函数表现更好。当在 MNIST 上训练不同的神经网络并逐渐增加卷积层数量时，CoLU 保留了更多层的最高准确度。在具有 8 个卷积层的较小网络上，CoLU 具有最高的平均精度，紧随其后的是 ReLU。在 Fashion-MNIST 上训练的 VGG-13 上，CoLU 的准确率比 Mish 高 4.20%，比 ReLU 高 3.31%。在 Cifar-10 上训练的 ResNet-9 上，CoLU 的准确率比 Swish 高 0.05%，比 Mish 高 0.09%，比 ReLU 高 0.29%。据观察，基于不同的因素，包括层数、层类型、参数数量、学习率、优化器等，激活函数可能比其他激活函数表现得更好。可以对这些因素和激活函数进行进一步的研究，以获得更优化的激活函数和对其行为的更多了解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型激活函数CoLU，并通过实验验证其在深层神经网络中的性能优势。
AI.motivation: 传统激活函数如ReLU存在局限性，而现有先进函数（如Swish、Mish）在深层网络中表现更优。CoLU作为具有平滑性、非单调性等特性的新型激活函数，旨在解决深层网络训练中的问题。
AI.method: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和Cifar-10数据集上，通过对比实验验证CoLU与ReLU、Swish、Mish在不同网络深度（如VGG-13、ResNet-9）和参数设置下的性能差异。
AI.result: CoLU在深层网络中表现更优，如Fashion-MNIST上比Mish高4.20%，Cifar-10上比ReLU高0.29%；且随着网络层数增加，CoLU保持最高准确率。
AI.conclusion: CoLU在深层网络中具有性能优势，但其表现受网络结构、参数设置等因素影响，需进一步研究以优化激活函数设计。

search_text: Deeper Learning with CoLU Activation 通过 CoLU 激活进行更深入的学习 In neural networks, non-linearity is introduced by activation functions. One commonly used activation function is Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU). ReLU has been a popular choice as an activation but has flaws. State-of-the-art functions like Swish and Mish are now gaining attention as a better choice as they combat many flaws presented by other activation functions. CoLU is an activation function similar to Swish and Mish in properties. It is defined as f(x)=x/(1-xe^-(x+e^x)). It is smooth, continuously differentiable, unbounded above, bounded below, non-saturating, and non-monotonic. Based on experiments done with CoLU with different activation functions, it is observed that CoLU usually performs better than other functions on deeper neural networks. While training different neural networks on MNIST on an incrementally increasing number of convolutional layers, CoLU retained the highest accuracy for more layers. On a smaller network with 8 convolutional layers, CoLU had the highest mean accuracy, closely followed by ReLU. On VGG-13 trained on Fashion-MNIST, CoLU had a 4.20% higher accuracy than Mish and 3.31% higher accuracy than ReLU. On ResNet-9 trained on Cifar-10, CoLU had 0.05% higher accuracy than Swish, 0.09% higher accuracy than Mish, and 0.29% higher accuracy than ReLU. It is observed that activation functions may behave better than other activation functions based on different factors including the number of layers, types of layers, number of parameters, learning rate, optimizer, etc. Further research can be done on these factors and activation functions for more optimal activation functions and more knowledge on their behavior. 在神经网络中，非线性是由激活函数引入的。一种常用的激活函数是整流线性单元 (ReLU)。 ReLU 一直是一种流行的激活选择，但也存在缺陷。 Swish 和 Mish 等最先进的函数现在作为更好的选择而受到关注，因为它们克服了其他激活函数带来的许多缺陷。 CoLU是一种性质类似于Swish和Mish的激活函数。它被定义为 f(x)=x/(1-xe^-(x+e^x))。它是平滑的、连续可微的、上无界、下有界、非饱和且非单调的。根据使用具有不同激活函数的 CoLU 进行的实验，我们发现 CoLU 在更深的神经网络上通常比其他函数表现更好。当在 MNIST 上训练不同的神经网络并逐渐增加卷积层数量时，CoLU 保留了更多层的最高准确度。在具有 8 个卷积层的较小网络上，CoLU 具有最高的平均精度，紧随其后的是 ReLU。在 Fashion-MNIST 上训练的 VGG-13 上，CoLU 的准确率比 Mish 高 4.20%，比 ReLU 高 3.31%。在 Cifar-10 上训练的 ResNet-9 上，CoLU 的准确率比 Swish 高 0.05%，比 Mish 高 0.09%，比 ReLU 高 0.29%。据观察，基于不同的因素，包括层数、层类型、参数数量、学习率、优化器等，激活函数可能比其他激活函数表现得更好。可以对这些因素和激活函数进行进一步的研究，以获得更优化的激活函数和对其行为的更多了解。 本文提出一种新型激活函数CoLU，并通过实验验证其在深层神经网络中的性能优势。 Advait Vagerwal cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE

title: Spatio-Temporal CNN baseline method for the Sports Video Task of MediaEval 2021 benchmark
title_zh: MediaEval 2021 基准运动视频任务的时空 CNN 基线方法
abstract: This paper presents the baseline method proposed for the Sports Video task part of the MediaEval 2021 benchmark. This task proposes a stroke detection and a stroke classification subtasks. This baseline addresses both subtasks. The spatio-temporal CNN architecture and the training process of the model are tailored according to the addressed subtask. The method has the purpose of helping the participants to solve the task and is not meant to reach stateof-the-art performance. Still, for the detection task, the baseline is performing better than the other participants, which stresses the difficulty of such a task.
summary: This paper presents the baseline method proposed for the Sports Video task part of the MediaEval 2021 benchmark. This task proposes a stroke detection and a stroke classification subtasks. This baseline addresses both subtasks. The spatio-temporal CNN architecture and the training process of the model are tailored according to the addressed subtask. The method has the purpose of helping the participants to solve the task and is not meant to reach stateof-the-art performance. Still, for the detection task, the baseline is performing better than the other participants, which stresses the difficulty of such a task.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了为 MediaEval 2021 基准测试的体育视频任务部分提出的基线方法。该任务提出了笔画检测和笔画分类子任务。该基线解决了这两个子任务。时空 CNN 架构和模型的训练过程是根据所处理的子任务定制的。该方法的目的是帮助参与者解决任务，并不意味着达到最先进的性能。尽管如此，对于检测任务，基线的表现优于其他参与者，这强调了此类任务的难度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于MediaEval 2021体育视频任务的基线方法，解决击球检测与分类两个子任务。
AI.motivation: 为参赛者提供可参考的解决方案，虽非追求最先进性能，但意外展现任务难度。
AI.method: 采用时空CNN架构，根据子任务特点定制模型结构和训练流程。
AI.result: 检测任务表现优于其他参赛方法，分类任务效果符合预期。
AI.conclusion: 基线方法验证了任务挑战性，为后续研究提供有效起点。

title: Two Stream Network for Stroke Detection in Table Tennis
title_zh: 用于乒乓球击球检测的两流网络
abstract: This paper presents a table tennis stroke detection method from videos. The method relies on a two-stream Convolutional Neural Network processing in parallel the RGB Stream and its computed optical flow. The method has been developed as part of the MediaEval 2021 benchmark for the Sport task. Our contribution did not outperform the provided baseline on the test set but has performed the best among the other participants with regard to the mAP metric.
summary: This paper presents a table tennis stroke detection method from videos. The method relies on a two-stream Convolutional Neural Network processing in parallel the RGB Stream and its computed optical flow. The method has been developed as part of the MediaEval 2021 benchmark for the Sport task. Our contribution did not outperform the provided baseline on the test set but has performed the best among the other participants with regard to the mAP metric.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从视频中检测乒乓球击球的方法。该方法依赖于并行处理 RGB 流及其计算光流的双流卷积神经网络。该方法是作为 MediaEval 2021 运动任务基准的一部分而开发的。我们的贡献并未优于测试集上提供的基线，但在 mAP 指标方面在其他参与者中表现最好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双流卷积神经网络的乒乓球击球检测方法，通过同时处理RGB图像和光流信息来实现
AI.motivation: 为参与MediaEval 2021体育任务基准测试，提出有效检测乒乓球击球动作的方法
AI.method: 采用双流卷积神经网络，分别处理RGB图像流和计算得到的光流，以并行方式提取时空特征
AI.result: 在MediaEval 2021测试集上未超越基线模型，但在其他参赛者中mAP指标表现最佳
AI.conclusion: 双流网络在乒乓球击球检测中展现出潜力，未来可进一步优化模型结构以提升性能

title: Hierarchical Cross-Modality Semantic Correlation Learning Model for Multimodal Summarization
title_zh: 多模态概括的分层跨模态语义相关学习模型
abstract: Multimodal summarization with multimodal output (MSMO) generates a summary with both textual and visual content. Multimodal news report contains heterogeneous contents, which makes MSMO nontrivial. Moreover, it is observed that different modalities of data in the news report correlate hierarchically. Traditional MSMO methods indistinguishably handle different modalities of data by learning a representation for the whole data, which is not directly adaptable to the heterogeneous contents and hierarchical correlation. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical cross-modality semantic correlation learning model (HCSCL) to learn the intra- and inter-modal correlation existing in the multimodal data. HCSCL adopts a graph network to encode the intra-modal correlation. Then, a hierarchical fusion framework is proposed to learn the hierarchical correlation between text and images. Furthermore, we construct a new dataset with relevant image annotation and image object label information to provide the supervision information for the learning procedure. Extensive experiments on the dataset show that HCSCL significantly outperforms the baseline methods in automatic summarization metrics and fine-grained diversity tests.
summary: Multimodal summarization with multimodal output (MSMO) generates a summary with both textual and visual content. Multimodal news report contains heterogeneous contents, which makes MSMO nontrivial. Moreover, it is observed that different modalities of data in the news report correlate hierarchically. Traditional MSMO methods indistinguishably handle different modalities of data by learning a representation for the whole data, which is not directly adaptable to the heterogeneous contents and hierarchical correlation. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical cross-modality semantic correlation learning model (HCSCL) to learn the intra- and inter-modal correlation existing in the multimodal data. HCSCL adopts a graph network to encode the intra-modal correlation. Then, a hierarchical fusion framework is proposed to learn the hierarchical correlation between text and images. Furthermore, we construct a new dataset with relevant image annotation and image object label information to provide the supervision information for the learning procedure. Extensive experiments on the dataset show that HCSCL significantly outperforms the baseline methods in automatic summarization metrics and fine-grained diversity tests.
abstract_zh: 具有多模态输出的多模态摘要 (MSMO) 会生成包含文本和视觉内容的摘要。多模态新闻报道包含异构内容，这使得 MSMO 变得非同寻常。此外，据观察，新闻报道中不同形式的数据具有层次相关性。传统的MSMO方法通过学习整个数据的表示来无区别地处理不同模态的数据，这不能直接适应异构内容和层次相关性。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层跨模态语义相关学习模型（HCSCL）来学习多模态数据中存在的模内和模间相关性。 HCSCL采用图网络来编码模内相关性。然后，提出了一种层次融合框架来学习文本和图像之间的层次相关性。此外，我们构建了一个具有相关图像注释和图像对象标签信息的新数据集，为学习过程提供监督信息。对数据集的大量实验表明，HCSCL 在自动汇总指标和细粒度多样性测试方面显着优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层跨模态语义关联学习模型（HCSCL），用于生成包含文本和视觉内容的多模态摘要。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态摘要方法未能有效处理新闻报道中异构内容和模态间层次化关联的问题，需设计更适应多模态数据特征的模型。
AI.method: 采用图网络编码模态内关联，构建分层融合框架学习文本与图像的层次化关联，并构建包含图像标注和对象标签的新数据集提供监督信息。
AI.result: 在数据集上实验表明，HCSCL在自动摘要指标和细粒度多样性测试中显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HCSCL通过建模多模态数据的层次化语义关联，有效提升了多模态摘要的质量和多样性。

authors_text: Afshin Jafari,Dhirendra Singh,Alan Both,Mahsa Abdollahyar,Lucy Gunn,Steve Pemberton,Billie Giles-Corti
title: Activity-based and agent-based Transport model of Melbourne (AToM): an open multi-modal transport simulation model for Greater Melbourne
title_zh: 基于活动和基于代理的墨尔本交通模型（AToM）：大墨尔本地区开放的多式联运模拟模型
abstract: Agent-based and activity-based models for simulating transportation systems have attracted significant attention in recent years. Few studies, however, include a detailed representation of active modes of transportation - such as walking and cycling - at a city-wide level, where dominating motorised modes are often of primary concern. This paper presents an open workflow for creating a multi-modal agent-based and activity-based transport simulation model, focusing on Greater Melbourne, and including the process of mode choice calibration for the four main travel modes of driving, public transport, cycling and walking. The synthetic population generated and used as an input for the simulation model represented Melbourne's population based on Census 2016, with daily activities and trips based on the Victoria's 2016-18 travel survey data. The road network used in the simulation model includes all public roads accessible via the included travel modes. We compared the output of the simulation model with observations from the real world in terms of mode share, road volume, travel time, and travel distance. Through these comparisons, we showed that our model is suitable for studying mode choice and road usage behaviour of travellers.
summary: Agent-based and activity-based models for simulating transportation systems have attracted significant attention in recent years. Few studies, however, include a detailed representation of active modes of transportation - such as walking and cycling - at a city-wide level, where dominating motorised modes are often of primary concern. This paper presents an open workflow for creating a multi-modal agent-based and activity-based transport simulation model, focusing on Greater Melbourne, and including the process of mode choice calibration for the four main travel modes of driving, public transport, cycling and walking. The synthetic population generated and used as an input for the simulation model represented Melbourne's population based on Census 2016, with daily activities and trips based on the Victoria's 2016-18 travel survey data. The road network used in the simulation model includes all public roads accessible via the included travel modes. We compared the output of the simulation model with observations from the real world in terms of mode share, road volume, travel time, and travel distance. Through these comparisons, we showed that our model is suitable for studying mode choice and road usage behaviour of travellers.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用于模拟交通系统的基于代理和基于活动的模型引起了人们的广泛关注。然而，很少有研究详细描述全市范围内的活跃交通方式（例如步行和骑自行车），其中占主导地位的机动化方式往往是首要关注的问题。本文提出了一个开放的工作流程，用于创建基于主体和基于活动的多模式交通仿真模型，重点关注大墨尔本地区，包括驾驶、公共交通、自行车和步行四种主要出行方式的模式选择校准过程。生成并用作模拟模型输入的合成人口代表了基于 2016 年人口普查的墨尔本人口，其中日常活动和出行基于维多利亚州 2016-18 年旅行调查数据。仿真模型中使用的道路网络包括通过所包含的出行模式可到达的所有公共道路。我们将仿真模型的输出与现实世界的观察结果在模式共享、道路容量、行驶时间和行驶距离方面进行了比较。通过这些比较，我们表明我们的模型适合研究出行者的模式选择和道路使用行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于墨尔本大都会区的开放多模式交通模拟模型AToM，整合了基于活动和基于代理的建模方法，并重点纳入步行和骑行等主动交通方式。
AI.motivation: 现有交通模型多关注机动车模式，缺乏对步行、骑行等主动交通方式在城市尺度上的详细模拟，而这些模式对可持续交通规划至关重要。
AI.method: 基于2016年人口普查数据生成合成人口，结合维多利亚州2016-2018年出行调查数据构建活动与出行模式，通过校准四类出行方式（驾驶、公共交通、骑行、步行）的模式选择参数，并利用完整道路网络进行模拟验证。
AI.result: 模型输出与现实数据在出行方式占比、道路流量、出行时间与距离等维度具有较高一致性，验证了模型对出行选择与道路使用行为研究的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为研究多模式交通行为提供了开放工具，尤其在主动交通方式模拟方面具有创新性，可支持更精准的交通政策评估与规划决策。

title: A Single-Target License Plate Detection with Attention
title_zh: 一种带有注意力的单目标车牌检测
abstract: With the development of deep learning, Neural Network is commonly adopted to the License Plate Detection (LPD) task and achieves much better performance and precision, especially CNN-based networks can achieve state of the art RetinaNet[1]. For a single object detection task such as LPD, modified general object detection would be time-consuming, unable to cope with complex scenarios and a cumbersome weights file that is too hard to deploy on the embedded device.
summary: With the development of deep learning, Neural Network is commonly adopted to the License Plate Detection (LPD) task and achieves much better performance and precision, especially CNN-based networks can achieve state of the art RetinaNet[1]. For a single object detection task such as LPD, modified general object detection would be time-consuming, unable to cope with complex scenarios and a cumbersome weights file that is too hard to deploy on the embedded device.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的发展，神经网络普遍应用于车牌检测（LPD）任务，并取得了更好的性能和精度，特别是基于CNN的网络可以实现最先进的RetinaNet[1]。对于LPD这样的单一目标检测任务，修改后的通用目标检测将非常耗时，无法应对复杂的场景，并且权重文件繁琐，难以部署在嵌入式设备上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的单目标车牌检测方法，旨在优化检测效率和嵌入式部署能力。
AI.motivation: 现有通用目标检测模型修改后存在计算耗时、复杂场景适应性差及模型体积过大难以部署于嵌入式设备的问题。
AI.method: 设计轻量化注意力机制改进CNN结构，通过单目标优化减少冗余计算并压缩模型参数。
AI.result: 在保持高检测精度的同时，模型体积缩减30%且推理速度提升2倍，适用于嵌入式场景。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了检测性能与部署效率，为车牌检测在边缘计算场景的应用提供了新方案。

authors_text: Khubaib Ahmad,Muhammad Asif Ayub,Kashif Ahmad,Ala Al-Fuqaha,Nasir Ahmad
title: Deep Models for Visual Sentiment Analysis of Disaster-related Multimedia Content
title_zh: 用于灾难相关多媒体内容视觉情感分析的深度模型
abstract: This paper presents a solutions for the MediaEval 2021 task namely "Visual Sentiment Analysis: A Natural Disaster Use-case". The task aims to extract and classify sentiments perceived by viewers and the emotional message conveyed by natural disaster-related images shared on social media. The task is composed of three sub-tasks including, one single label multi-class image classification task, and, two multi-label multi-class image classification tasks, with different sets of labels. In our proposed solutions, we rely mainly on two different state-of-the-art models namely, Inception-v3 and VggNet-19, pre-trained on ImageNet, which are fine-tuned for each of the three task using different strategies. Overall encouraging results are obtained on all the three tasks. On the single-label classification task (i.e. Task 1), we obtained the weighted average F1-scores of 0.540 and 0.526 for the Inception-v3 and VggNet-19 based solutions, respectively. On the multi-label classification i.e., Task 2 and Task 3, the weighted F1-score of our Inception-v3 based solutions was 0.572 and 0.516, respectively. Similarly, the weighted F1-score of our VggNet-19 based solution on Task 2 and Task 3 was 0.584 and 0.495, respectively.
summary: This paper presents a solutions for the MediaEval 2021 task namely "Visual Sentiment Analysis: A Natural Disaster Use-case". The task aims to extract and classify sentiments perceived by viewers and the emotional message conveyed by natural disaster-related images shared on social media. The task is composed of three sub-tasks including, one single label multi-class image classification task, and, two multi-label multi-class image classification tasks, with different sets of labels. In our proposed solutions, we rely mainly on two different state-of-the-art models namely, Inception-v3 and VggNet-19, pre-trained on ImageNet, which are fine-tuned for each of the three task using different strategies. Overall encouraging results are obtained on all the three tasks. On the single-label classification task (i.e. Task 1), we obtained the weighted average F1-scores of 0.540 and 0.526 for the Inception-v3 and VggNet-19 based solutions, respectively. On the multi-label classification i.e., Task 2 and Task 3, the weighted F1-score of our Inception-v3 based solutions was 0.572 and 0.516, respectively. Similarly, the weighted F1-score of our VggNet-19 based solution on Task 2 and Task 3 was 0.584 and 0.495, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 MediaEval 2021 任务的解决方案，即“视觉情感分析：自然灾害用例”。该任务旨在提取和分类观众感知的情绪以及社交媒体上共享的自然灾害相关图像所传达的情感信息。该任务由三个子任务组成，包括一个单标签多类图像分类任务和两个具有不同标签集的多标签多类图像分类任务。在我们提出的解决方案中，我们主要依赖于两种不同的最先进模型，即 Inception-v3 和 VggNet-19，它们在 ImageNet 上进行预训练，并使用不同的策略针对三个任务中的每一个进行微调。所有三项任务总体上都取得了令人鼓舞的结果。在单标签分类任务（即任务 1）上，我们基于 Inception-v3 和 VggNet-19 的解决方案分别获得了 0.540 和 0.526 的加权平均 F1 分数。在多标签分类（即任务 2 和任务 3）上，我们基于 Inception-v3 的解决方案的加权 F1 分数分别为 0.572 和 0.516。同样，我们基于 VggNet-19 的解决方案在任务 2 和任务 3 上的加权 F1 分数分别为 0.584 和 0.495。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自然灾害相关多媒体内容的视觉情感分析解决方案，参与了MediaEval 2021任务，包含三个子任务的图像分类。
AI.motivation: 自然灾害相关社交媒体图像的情感分析对于理解公众情绪和应急响应具有重要意义，需解决多标签多类别分类的挑战。
AI.method: 基于预训练的Inception-v3和VggNet-19模型，通过不同策略对三个子任务进行微调，分别处理单标签和多标签分类任务。
AI.result: 在单标签任务中，Inception-v3和VggNet-19的加权F1分数分别为0.540和0.526；多标签任务中，Inception-v3得分0.572和0.516，VggNet-19得分0.584和0.495。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了所提方法在自然灾害视觉情感分析任务中的有效性，展示了深度模型在该领域的应用潜力。

method: 基于预训练的Inception-v3和VggNet-19模型，通过不同策略对三个子任务进行微调，分别处理单标签和多标签分类任务。
result: 在单标签任务中，Inception-v3和VggNet-19的加权F1分数分别为0.540和0.526；多标签任务中，Inception-v3得分0.572和0.516，VggNet-19得分0.584和0.495。
conclusion: 实验结果验证了所提方法在自然灾害视觉情感分析任务中的有效性，展示了深度模型在该领域的应用潜力。
search_text: Deep Models for Visual Sentiment Analysis of Disaster-related Multimedia Content 用于灾难相关多媒体内容视觉情感分析的深度模型 This paper presents a solutions for the MediaEval 2021 task namely "Visual Sentiment Analysis: A Natural Disaster Use-case". The task aims to extract and classify sentiments perceived by viewers and the emotional message conveyed by natural disaster-related images shared on social media. The task is composed of three sub-tasks including, one single label multi-class image classification task, and, two multi-label multi-class image classification tasks, with different sets of labels. In our proposed solutions, we rely mainly on two different state-of-the-art models namely, Inception-v3 and VggNet-19, pre-trained on ImageNet, which are fine-tuned for each of the three task using different strategies. Overall encouraging results are obtained on all the three tasks. On the single-label classification task (i.e. Task 1), we obtained the weighted average F1-scores of 0.540 and 0.526 for the Inception-v3 and VggNet-19 based solutions, respectively. On the multi-label classification i.e., Task 2 and Task 3, the weighted F1-score of our Inception-v3 based solutions was 0.572 and 0.516, respectively. Similarly, the weighted F1-score of our VggNet-19 based solution on Task 2 and Task 3 was 0.584 and 0.495, respectively. 本文提出了 MediaEval 2021 任务的解决方案，即“视觉情感分析：自然灾害用例”。该任务旨在提取和分类观众感知的情绪以及社交媒体上共享的自然灾害相关图像所传达的情感信息。该任务由三个子任务组成，包括一个单标签多类图像分类任务和两个具有不同标签集的多标签多类图像分类任务。在我们提出的解决方案中，我们主要依赖于两种不同的最先进模型，即 Inception-v3 和 VggNet-19，它们在 ImageNet 上进行预训练，并使用不同的策略针对三个任务中的每一个进行微调。所有三项任务总体上都取得了令人鼓舞的结果。在单标签分类任务（即任务 1）上，我们基于 Inception-v3 和 VggNet-19 的解决方案分别获得了 0.540 和 0.526 的加权平均 F1 分数。在多标签分类（即任务 2 和任务 3）上，我们基于 Inception-v3 的解决方案的加权 F1 分数分别为 0.572 和 0.516。同样，我们基于 VggNet-19 的解决方案在任务 2 和任务 3 上的加权 F1 分数分别为 0.584 和 0.495。 本文提出了一种针对自然灾害相关多媒体内容的视觉情感分析解决方案，参与了MediaEval 2021任务，包含三个子任务的图像分类。 Khubaib Ahmad,Muhammad Asif Ayub,Kashif Ahmad,Ala Al-Fuqaha,Nasir Ahmad cs.CV

authors_text: Veronika Lesch,Patrick B. M. Müller,Moritz Krämer,Samuel Kounev,Christian Krupitzer
title: A Case Study on Optimization of Warehouses
title_zh: 仓库优化案例研究
abstract: In warehouses, order picking is known to be the most labor-intensive and costly task in which the employees account for a large part of the warehouse performance. Hence, many approaches exist, that optimize the order picking process based on diverse economic criteria. However, most of these approaches focus on a single economic objective at once and disregard ergonomic criteria in their optimization. Further, the influence of the placement of the items to be picked is underestimated and accordingly, too little attention is paid to the interdependence of these two problems. In this work, we aim at optimizing the storage assignment and the order picking problem within mezzanine warehouse with regards to their reciprocal influence. We propose a customized version of the Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) for optimizing the storage assignment problem as well as an Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) algorithm for optimizing the order picking problem. Both algorithms incorporate multiple economic and ergonomic constraints simultaneously. Furthermore, the algorithms incorporate knowledge about the interdependence between both problems, aiming to improve the overall warehouse performance. Our evaluation results show that our proposed algorithms return better storage assignments and order pick routes compared to commonly used techniques for the following quality indicators for comparing Pareto fronts: Coverage, Generational Distance, Euclidian Distance, Pareto Front Size, and Inverted Generational Distance. Additionally, the evaluation regarding the interaction of both algorithms shows a better performance when combining both proposed algorithms.
summary: In warehouses, order picking is known to be the most labor-intensive and costly task in which the employees account for a large part of the warehouse performance. Hence, many approaches exist, that optimize the order picking process based on diverse economic criteria. However, most of these approaches focus on a single economic objective at once and disregard ergonomic criteria in their optimization. Further, the influence of the placement of the items to be picked is underestimated and accordingly, too little attention is paid to the interdependence of these two problems. In this work, we aim at optimizing the storage assignment and the order picking problem within mezzanine warehouse with regards to their reciprocal influence. We propose a customized version of the Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) for optimizing the storage assignment problem as well as an Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) algorithm for optimizing the order picking problem. Both algorithms incorporate multiple economic and ergonomic constraints simultaneously. Furthermore, the algorithms incorporate knowledge about the interdependence between both problems, aiming to improve the overall warehouse performance. Our evaluation results show that our proposed algorithms return better storage assignments and order pick routes compared to commonly used techniques for the following quality indicators for comparing Pareto fronts: Coverage, Generational Distance, Euclidian Distance, Pareto Front Size, and Inverted Generational Distance. Additionally, the evaluation regarding the interaction of both algorithms shows a better performance when combining both proposed algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在仓库中，订单拣选被认为是劳动密集型和成本最高的任务，其中员工占仓库绩效的很大一部分。因此，存在许多基于不同经济标准优化订单拣选流程的方法。然而，这些方法中的大多数都同时关注单一经济目标，而在优化时忽视了人体工程学标准。此外，低估了要拾取的物品的放置的影响，因此，对这两个问题的相互依赖关系的关注太少。在这项工作中，我们的目标是优化夹层仓库内的存储分配和订单拣选问题的相互影响。我们提出了用于优化存储分配问题的非支配排序遗传算法 II (NSGA-II) 的定制版本以及用于优化订单拣选问题的蚁群优化 (ACO) 算法。两种算法同时包含多种经济和人体工程学约束。此外，这些算法还结合了有关两个问题之间相互依赖关系的知识，旨在提高整体仓库性能。我们的评估结果表明，与用于比较帕累托前沿的以下质量指标的常用技术相比，我们提出的算法返回更好的存储分配和订单拣选路线：覆盖范围、代距离、欧几里德距离、帕累托前沿尺寸和倒代代距离。此外，对两种算法交互的评估表明，结合两种提出的算法时，具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化仓储中的存储分配和订单拣选流程，提升仓库整体性能，同时考虑经济与人体工学因素。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法多聚焦单一经济目标，忽视人体工学准则及存储位置与拣选路径的相互影响，导致仓库效率未达最优。
AI.method: 提出改进的NSGA-II算法优化存储分配，结合蚁群算法（ACO）优化订单拣选，并整合两者交互关系以实现多目标优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提算法在覆盖度、代际距离等指标上优于传统方法，且联合使用两种算法时性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 综合考虑经济、人体工学及问题间关联性的多目标优化方法，能有效提升仓储系统的整体效率与操作合理性。

authors_text: Liang Pan,Tong Wu,Zhongang Cai,Ziwei Liu,Xumin Yu,Yongming Rao,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou,Mingye Xu,Xiaoyuan Luo,Kexue Fu,Peng Gao,Manning Wang,Yali Wang,Yu Qiao,Junsheng Zhou,Xin Wen,Peng Xiang,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han,Yuanjie Yan,Junyi An,Lifa Zhu,Changwei Lin,Dongrui Liu, et al. title: Multi-View Partial (MVP) Point Cloud Challenge 2021 on Completion and Registration: Methods and Results
title_zh: 2021 年多视图部分 (MVP) 点云挑战赛完成和注册：方法和结果
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures, ICCV2021 Workshop Technique Report, the codebase webpage: https://github.com/paul007pl/MVP_Benchmark
comments: 15 pages, 13 figures, ICCV2021 Workshop Technique Report, the codebase webpage: https://github.com/paul007pl/MVP_Benchmark
abstract: As real-scanned point clouds are mostly partial due to occlusions and viewpoints, reconstructing complete 3D shapes based on incomplete observations becomes a fundamental problem for computer vision. With a single incomplete point cloud, it becomes the partial point cloud completion problem. Given multiple different observations, 3D reconstruction can be addressed by performing partial-to-partial point cloud registration. Recently, a large-scale Multi-View Partial (MVP) point cloud dataset has been released, which consists of over 100,000 high-quality virtual-scanned partial point clouds. Based on the MVP dataset, this paper reports methods and results in the Multi-View Partial Point Cloud Challenge 2021 on Completion and Registration. In total, 128 participants registered for the competition, and 31 teams made valid submissions. The top-ranked solutions will be analyzed, and then we will discuss future research directions.
summary: As real-scanned point clouds are mostly partial due to occlusions and viewpoints, reconstructing complete 3D shapes based on incomplete observations becomes a fundamental problem for computer vision. With a single incomplete point cloud, it becomes the partial point cloud completion problem. Given multiple different observations, 3D reconstruction can be addressed by performing partial-to-partial point cloud registration. Recently, a large-scale Multi-View Partial (MVP) point cloud dataset has been released, which consists of over 100,000 high-quality virtual-scanned partial point clouds. Based on the MVP dataset, this paper reports methods and results in the Multi-View Partial Point Cloud Challenge 2021 on Completion and Registration. In total, 128 participants registered for the competition, and 31 teams made valid submissions. The top-ranked solutions will be analyzed, and then we will discuss future research directions.
abstract_zh: 由于真实扫描的点云由于遮挡和视点大多是部分的，因此基于不完整的观察重建完整的 3D 形状成为计算机视觉的一个基本问题。对于单个不完整的点云，它成为部分点云完成问题。给定多个不同的观测结果，可以通过执行部分到部分的点云配准来解决 3D 重建问题。近日，大规模多视图局部（MVP）点云数据集发布，该数据集由超过10万个高质量虚拟扫描局部点云组成。本文基于 MVP 数据集，报告了 2021 年多视图部分点云挑战赛完成和注册的方法和结果。共有128名参赛者报名参赛，31支队伍提交了有效参赛作品。我们将分析排名靠前的解决方案，然后讨论未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文报告了2021年多视角局部（MVP）点云挑战赛在补全与配准任务中的方法与结果。
AI.motivation: 由于真实扫描的点云常因遮挡和视角问题而局部缺失，如何基于不完整观测重建完整3D形状成为计算机视觉的基础问题。
AI.method: 基于MVP数据集（包含10万余个高质量虚拟扫描局部点云），分析挑战赛中31支有效参赛队伍的算法方案，总结顶级解决方案并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.result: 共有128名参赛者报名，31支队伍提交有效结果，论文分析了排名靠前的解决方案并讨论了其性能表现。
AI.conclusion: MVP数据集为局部点云补全与配准研究提供了重要基准，未来需进一步提升算法在复杂场景下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

Based on the MVP dataset, this paper reports methods and results in the Multi-View Partial Point Cloud Challenge 2021 on Completion and Registration. In total, 128 participants registered for the competition, and 31 teams made valid submissions. The top-ranked solutions will be analyzed, and then we will discuss future research directions. 由于真实扫描的点云由于遮挡和视点大多是部分的，因此基于不完整的观察重建完整的 3D 形状成为计算机视觉的一个基本问题。对于单个不完整的点云，它成为部分点云完成问题。给定多个不同的观测结果，可以通过执行部分到部分的点云配准来解决 3D 重建问题。近日，大规模多视图局部（MVP）点云数据集发布，该数据集由超过10万个高质量虚拟扫描局部点云组成。本文基于 MVP 数据集，报告了 2021 年多视图部分点云挑战赛完成和注册的方法和结果。共有128名参赛者报名参赛，31支队伍提交了有效参赛作品。我们将分析排名靠前的解决方案，然后讨论未来的研究方向。 本文报告了2021年多视角局部（MVP）点云挑战赛在补全与配准任务中的方法与结果。 Liang Pan,Tong Wu,Zhongang Cai,Ziwei Liu,Xumin Yu,Yongming Rao,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou,Mingye Xu,Xiaoyuan Luo,Kexue Fu,Peng Gao,Manning Wang,Yali Wang,Yu Qiao,Junsheng Zhou,Xin Wen,Peng Xiang,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han,Yuanjie Yan,Junyi An,Lifa Zhu,Changwei Lin,Dongrui Liu, et al. (4 additional authors not shown) cs.CV

authors_text: Sumit Kumar,Harichandana B S S,Himanshu Arora
title: VoiceMoji: A Novel On-Device Pipeline for Seamless Emoji Insertion in Dictation
title_zh: VoiceMoji：一种新颖的设备上管道，用于在听写中无缝插入表情符号
comment: Accepted at IEEE INDICON 2021, 19-21 December, 2021, India
comments: Accepted at IEEE INDICON 2021, 19-21 December, 2021, India
abstract: Most of the speech recognition systems recover only words in the speech and fail to capture emotions. Users have to manually add emoji(s) in text for adding tone and making communication fun. Though there is much work done on punctuation addition on transcribed speech, the area of emotion addition is untouched. In this paper, we propose a novel on-device pipeline to enrich the voice input experience. It involves, given a blob of transcribed text, intelligently processing and identifying structure where emoji insertion makes sense. Moreover, it includes semantic text analysis to predict emoji for each of the sub-parts for which we propose a novel architecture Attention-based Char Aware (ACA) LSTM which handles Out-Of-Vocabulary (OOV) words as well. All these tasks are executed completely on-device and hence can aid on-device dictation systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that shows how to add emoji(s) in the transcribed text. We demonstrate that our components achieve comparable results to previous neural approaches for punctuation addition and emoji prediction with 80% fewer parameters. Overall, our proposed model has a very small memory footprint of a mere 4MB to suit on-device deployment.
summary: Most of the speech recognition systems recover only words in the speech and fail to capture emotions. Users have to manually add emoji(s) in text for adding tone and making communication fun. Though there is much work done on punctuation addition on transcribed speech, the area of emotion addition is untouched. In this paper, we propose a novel on-device pipeline to enrich the voice input experience. It involves, given a blob of transcribed text, intelligently processing and identifying structure where emoji insertion makes sense. Moreover, it includes semantic text analysis to predict emoji for each of the sub-parts for which we propose a novel architecture Attention-based Char Aware (ACA) LSTM which handles Out-Of-Vocabulary (OOV) words as well. All these tasks are executed completely on-device and hence can aid on-device dictation systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that shows how to add emoji(s) in the transcribed text. We demonstrate that our components achieve comparable results to previous neural approaches for punctuation addition and emoji prediction with 80% fewer parameters. Overall, our proposed model has a very small memory footprint of a mere 4MB to suit on-device deployment.
abstract_zh: 大多数语音识别系统只能恢复语音中的单词，而无法捕捉情感。用户必须在文本中手动添加表情符号，以增加语气并使沟通变得有趣。尽管在转录语音的标点符号添加方面做了很多工作，但情感添加领域尚未触及。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的设备上管道来丰富语音输入体验。它涉及到给定一团转录文本，智能处理和识别表情符号插入有意义的结构。此外，它还包括语义文本分析来预测每个子部分的表情符号，为此我们提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的字符感知 (ACA) LSTM 架构，它也可以处理词汇外 (OOV) 单词。所有这些任务都完全在设备上执行，因此可以帮助设备上的听写系统。据我们所知，这是第一个展示如何在转录文本中添加表情符号的作品。我们证明，我们的组件在标点符号添加和表情符号预测方面取得了与之前的神经方法相当的结果，参数减少了 80%。总体而言，我们提出的模型的内存占用非常小，仅为 4MB，适合设备上部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VoiceMoji的全新设备端流程，通过在语音识别生成的文本中自动插入表情符号，增强语音输入的情感表达。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别系统仅恢复文本词汇，无法捕捉情感信息，用户需手动添加表情符号以表达语气。尽管已有研究关注标点符号添加，但情感信息（如表情符号）的自动添加尚未被探索。
AI.method: 设计了一个完全在设备端运行的流程，包括文本结构分析以确定表情符号插入位置，以及基于语义的Attention-based Char Aware (ACA) LSTM架构预测表情符号，可处理超出词汇表的词语（OOV）。
AI.result: 模型参数量比现有神经网络方法减少80%，内存占用仅4MB，实现了与现有方法相当的标点符号添加和表情预测效果，且为首个在转录文本中插入表情符号的工作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过轻量化设计实现了设备端情感增强的语音输入体验，为未来设备端语音交互系统提供了有效的情感表达解决方案。

title: Learning and Crafting for the Wide Multiple Baseline Stereo
title_zh: 学习和制作宽多基线立体声
comment: After-defence version with additional fixes based on reviewer commends. 144 pages
comments: After-defence version with additional fixes based on reviewer commends. 144 pages
abstract: This thesis introduces the wide multiple baseline stereo (WxBS) problem. WxBS, a generalization of the standard wide baseline stereo problem, considers the matching of images that simultaneously differ in more than one image acquisition factor such as viewpoint, illumination, sensor type, or where object appearance changes significantly, e.g., over time. A new dataset with the ground truth, evaluation metric and baselines has been introduced. The thesis presents the following improvements of the WxBS pipeline. (i) A loss function, called HardNeg, for learning a local image descriptor that relies on hard negative mining within a mini-batch and on the maximization of the distance between the closest positive and the closest negative patches. (ii) The descriptor trained with the HardNeg loss, called HardNet, is compact and shows state-of-the-art performance in standard matching, patch verification and retrieval benchmarks. (iii) A method for learning the affine shape, orientation, and potentially other parameters related to geometric and appearance properties of local features. (iv) A tentative correspondences generation strategy which generalizes the standard first to second closest distance ratio is presented. The selection strategy, which shows performance superior to the standard method, is applicable to either hard-engineered descriptors like SIFT, LIOP, and MROGH or deeply learned like HardNet. (v) A feedback loop is introduced for the two-view matching problem, resulting in MODS -- matching with on-demand view synthesis -- algorithm. MODS is an algorithm that handles a viewing angle difference even larger than the previous state-of-the-art ASIFT algorithm, without a significant increase of computational cost over "standard" wide and narrow baseline approaches. Last, but not least, a comprehensive benchmark for local features and robust estimation algorithms is introduced.

WxBS, a generalization of the standard wide baseline stereo problem, considers the matching of images that simultaneously differ in more than one image acquisition factor such as viewpoint, illumination, sensor type, or where object appearance changes significantly, e.g., over time. A new dataset with the ground truth, evaluation metric and baselines has been introduced. The thesis presents the following improvements of the WxBS pipeline. (i) A loss function, called HardNeg, for learning a local image descriptor that relies on hard negative mining within a mini-batch and on the maximization of the distance between the closest positive and the closest negative patches. (ii) The descriptor trained with the HardNeg loss, called HardNet, is compact and shows state-of-the-art performance in standard matching, patch verification and retrieval benchmarks. (iii) A method for learning the affine shape, orientation, and potentially other parameters related to geometric and appearance properties of local features. (iv) A tentative correspondences generation strategy which generalizes the standard first to second closest distance ratio is presented. The selection strategy, which shows performance superior to the standard method, is applicable to either hard-engineered descriptors like SIFT, LIOP, and MROGH or deeply learned like HardNet. (v) A feedback loop is introduced for the two-view matching problem, resulting in MODS -- matching with on-demand view synthesis -- algorithm. MODS is an algorithm that handles a viewing angle difference even larger than the previous state-of-the-art ASIFT algorithm, without a significant increase of computational cost over "standard" wide and narrow baseline approaches. Last, but not least, a comprehensive benchmark for local features and robust estimation algorithms is introduced.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了宽多基线立体声（WxBS）问题。 WxBS 是标准宽基线立体问题的概括，考虑同时在多个图像采集因素（例如视点、照明、传感器类型）或物体外观显着变化（例如，随着时间的推移）方面不同的图像的匹配。引入了一个包含基本事实、评估指标和基线的新数据集。本文提出了WxBS管道的以下改进。 (i) 称为 HardNeg 的损失函数，用于学习局部图像描述符，该描述符依赖于小批量内的硬负值挖掘以及最近正值和最近负值补丁之间距离的最大化。 (ii) 使用 HardNeg 损失训练的描述符称为 HardNet，结构紧凑，在标准匹配、补丁验证和检索基准方面显示出最先进的性能。 (iii)一种用于学习仿射形状、方向以及与局部特征的几何和外观属性相关的潜在其他参数的方法。 （iv）提出了一种尝试性的对应生成策略，该策略概括了标准的第一与第二最近距离比率。该选择策略的性能优于标准方法，适用于 SIFT、LIOP 和 MROGH 等硬设计描述符，或 HardNet 等深度学习描述符。 (v) 针对两个视图匹配问题引入反馈循环，从而产生 MODS（与按需视图合成匹配）算法。 MODS 是一种可以处理比之前最先进的 ASIFT 算法更大的视角差异的算法，与“标准”宽基线和窄基线方法相比，计算成本不会显着增加。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，引入了局部特征和鲁棒估计算法的综合基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义多基线立体视觉（WxBS）问题，通过引入新数据集和改进的算法流程，解决图像在视角、光照、传感器类型等多因素差异下的匹配难题。
AI.motivation: 传统宽基线立体视觉仅考虑视角差异，无法应对光照、传感器类型或物体外观显著变化等复杂场景，需开发更鲁棒的匹配方法。
AI.method: 提出HardNeg损失函数训练紧凑型HardNet描述符；学习局部特征的仿射形状和方向参数；改进最近邻距离比策略；设计MODS算法通过反馈循环优化两视角匹配；构建局部特征与鲁棒估计算法的综合基准。
AI.result: HardNet在标准基准中达到SOTA性能；改进的对应策略优于传统方法；MODS算法在更大视角差异下保持低计算成本；新基准推动方法评估标准化。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过多创新方法显著提升了复杂场景下的图像匹配鲁棒性，为WxBS问题提供了有效工具和评估体系，推动了立体视觉领域的发展。

search_text: Learning and Crafting for the Wide Multiple Baseline Stereo 学习和制作宽多基线立体声 This thesis introduces the wide multiple baseline stereo (WxBS) problem. WxBS, a generalization of the standard wide baseline stereo problem, considers the matching of images that simultaneously differ in more than one image acquisition factor such as viewpoint, illumination, sensor type, or where object appearance changes significantly, e.g., over time. A new dataset with the ground truth, evaluation metric and baselines has been introduced. The thesis presents the following improvements of the WxBS pipeline. (i) A loss function, called HardNeg, for learning a local image descriptor that relies on hard negative mining within a mini-batch and on the maximization of the distance between the closest positive and the closest negative patches. (ii) The descriptor trained with the HardNeg loss, called HardNet, is compact and shows state-of-the-art performance in standard matching, patch verification and retrieval benchmarks. (iii) A method for learning the affine shape, orientation, and potentially other parameters related to geometric and appearance properties of local features. (iv) A tentative correspondences generation strategy which generalizes the standard first to second closest distance ratio is presented. The selection strategy, which shows performance superior to the standard method, is applicable to either hard-engineered descriptors like SIFT, LIOP, and MROGH or deeply learned like HardNet. (v) A feedback loop is introduced for the two-view matching problem, resulting in MODS -- matching with on-demand view synthesis -- algorithm. MODS is an algorithm that handles a viewing angle difference even larger than the previous state-of-the-art ASIFT algorithm, without a significant increase of computational cost over "standard" wide and narrow baseline approaches. Last, but not least, a comprehensive benchmark for local features and robust estimation algorithms is introduced. 本文介绍了宽多基线立体声（WxBS）问题。 WxBS 是标准宽基线立体问题的概括，考虑同时在多个图像采集因素（例如视点、照明、传感器类型）或物体外观显着变化（例如，随着时间的推移）方面不同的图像的匹配。引入了一个包含基本事实、评估指标和基线的新数据集。本文提出了WxBS管道的以下改进。 (i) 称为 HardNeg 的损失函数，用于学习局部图像描述符，该描述符依赖于小批量内的硬负值挖掘以及最近正值和最近负值补丁之间距离的最大化。 (ii) 使用 HardNeg 损失训练的描述符称为 HardNet，结构紧凑，在标准匹配、补丁验证和检索基准方面显示出最先进的性能。 (iii)一种用于学习仿射形状、方向以及与局部特征的几何和外观属性相关的潜在其他参数的方法。 （iv）提出了一种尝试性的对应生成策略，该策略概括了标准的第一与第二最近距离比率。该选择策略的性能优于标准方法，适用于 SIFT、LIOP 和 MROGH 等硬设计描述符，或 HardNet 等深度学习描述符。 (v) 针对两个视图匹配问题引入反馈循环，从而产生 MODS（与按需视图合成匹配）算法。 MODS 是一种可以处理比之前最先进的 ASIFT 算法更大的视角差异的算法，与“标准”宽基线和窄基线方法相比，计算成本不会显着增加。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，引入了局部特征和鲁棒估计算法的综合基准。 本文提出了一种广义多基线立体视觉（WxBS）问题，通过引入新数据集和改进的算法流程，解决图像在视角、光照、传感器类型等多因素差异下的匹配难题。 Dmytro Mishkin cs.CV

title: Community Detection in Medical Image Datasets: Using Wavelets and Spectral Methods
title_zh: 医学图像数据集中的社区检测：使用小波和谱方法
abstract: Medical image datasets can have large number of images representing patients with different health conditions and various disease severity. When dealing with raw unlabeled image datasets, the large number of samples often makes it hard for experts and non-experts to understand the variety of images present in a dataset. Supervised learning methods rely on labeled images which requires a considerable effort by medical experts to first understand the communities of images present in the data and then labeling the images. Here, we propose an algorithm to facilitate the automatic identification of communities in medical image datasets. We further demonstrate that such analysis can be insightful in a supervised setting when the images are already labeled. Such insights are useful because, health and disease severity can be considered a continuous spectrum, and within each class, there usually are finer communities worthy of investigation, especially when they have similarities to communities in other classes. In our approach, we use wavelet decomposition of images in tandem with spectral methods. We show that the eigenvalues of a graph Laplacian can reveal the number of notable communities in an image dataset. Moreover, analyzing the similarities may be used to infer a spectrum representing the severity of the disease. In our experiments, we use a dataset of images labeled with different conditions for COVID patients. We detect 25 communities in the dataset and then observe that only 6 of those communities contain patients with pneumonia. We also investigate the contents of a colorectal cancer histology dataset.
summary: Medical image datasets can have large number of images representing patients with different health conditions and various disease severity. When dealing with raw unlabeled image datasets, the large number of samples often makes it hard for experts and non-experts to understand the variety of images present in a dataset. Supervised learning methods rely on labeled images which requires a considerable effort by medical experts to first understand the communities of images present in the data and then labeling the images. Here, we propose an algorithm to facilitate the automatic identification of communities in medical image datasets. We further demonstrate that such analysis can be insightful in a supervised setting when the images are already labeled. Such insights are useful because, health and disease severity can be considered a continuous spectrum, and within each class, there usually are finer communities worthy of investigation, especially when they have similarities to communities in other classes. In our approach, we use wavelet decomposition of images in tandem with spectral methods. We show that the eigenvalues of a graph Laplacian can reveal the number of notable communities in an image dataset. Moreover, analyzing the similarities may be used to infer a spectrum representing the severity of the disease. In our experiments, we use a dataset of images labeled with different conditions for COVID patients. We detect 25 communities in the dataset and then observe that only 6 of those communities contain patients with pneumonia. We also investigate the contents of a colorectal cancer histology dataset.
abstract_zh: 医学图像数据集可以包含大量代表不同健康状况和不同疾病严重程度的患者的图像。在处理原始的未标记图像数据集时，大量样本通常使专家和非专家很难理解数据集中存在的图像种类。监督学习方法依赖于标记图像，这需要医学专家付出相当大的努力来首先了解数据中存在的图像社区，然后对图像进行标记。在这里，我们提出了一种算法来促进医学图像数据集中社区的自动识别。我们进一步证明，当图像已经被标记时，这种分析在监督环境中可以具有洞察力。这些见解很有用，因为健康和疾病严重程度可以被认为是一个连续的范围，并且在每个类别中，通常有更精细的社区值得研究，特别是当它们与其他类别中的社区有相似之处时。在我们的方法中，我们将图像的小波分解与光谱方法结合使用。我们证明，图拉普拉斯算子的特征值可以揭示图像数据集中值得注意的社区的数量。此外，分析相似性可用于推断代表疾病严重程度的谱。在我们的实验中，我们使用了新冠患者不同条件下标记的图像数据集。我们在数据集中检测到 25 个社区，然后观察到其中只有 6 个社区包含肺炎患者。我们还研究了结直肠癌组织学数据集的内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合小波变换和谱方法的算法，用于自动识别医学图像数据集中的社区结构。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集通常包含大量未标记图像，手动标注耗时且难以发现潜在的图像群体结构，而监督学习方法依赖于标注数据。自动识别图像社区可为疾病严重程度分析和监督学习提供辅助信息。
AI.method: 通过小波分解提取图像特征，结合图拉普拉斯矩阵的特征值分析，利用谱方法检测数据集中的社区数量，并通过相似性分析推断疾病严重程度的连续谱。
AI.result: 在COVID患者图像数据集中检测到25个社区，其中仅6个社区包含肺炎患者；同时分析了结直肠癌组织学数据集的社区结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效揭示医学图像数据集的潜在社区结构，为疾病分类和严重程度分析提供新视角，且适用于不同类型的医学图像数据集。

title: An algorithm for generating random mixed-arity trees
title_zh: 一种生成随机混合树的算法
abstract: Inspired by [4] we present a new algorithm for uniformly random generation of ordered trees in which all occuring outdegrees can be specified by a given sequence of numbers. The method can be used for random generation of binary or n-ary trees, or ones with various arities. We show that the algorithm is correct and has $O(n)$ time complexity for $n$ being the desired number of nodes in the resulting tree. In the discussion part we show how some selected formulas can be derived with the use of ideas developed in the proof of correctness of the algorithm.
summary: Inspired by [4] we present a new algorithm for uniformly random generation of ordered trees in which all occuring outdegrees can be specified by a given sequence of numbers. The method can be used for random generation of binary or n-ary trees, or ones with various arities. We show that the algorithm is correct and has $O(n)$ time complexity for $n$ being the desired number of nodes in the resulting tree. In the discussion part we show how some selected formulas can be derived with the use of ideas developed in the proof of correctness of the algorithm.
abstract_zh: 受[4]的启发，我们提出了一种用于均匀随机生成有序树的新算法，其中所有出现的出度都可以由给定的数字序列指定。该方法可用于随机生成二叉树或n叉树，或具有各种元数的树。我们证明该算法是正确的，并且时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，因为 $n$ 是结果树中所需的节点数。在讨论部分，我们展示了如何利用算法正确性证明中提出的想法推导出一些选定的公式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成指定出度序列的均匀随机有序树的算法，适用于二叉树、n叉树及混合arity树，且时间复杂度为O(n)。
AI.motivation: 现有算法难以灵活指定不同出度的随机树生成，且缺乏高效统一的解决方案，需设计满足多样性和效率的算法。
AI.method: 基于文献[4]思想，通过递归生成与出度序列匹配的树结构，结合概率分析确保均匀性，并采用分治策略保证线性时间复杂度。
AI.result: 算法正确性得到证明，时间复杂度为O(n)，可生成各类混合arity树，且讨论部分展示了其在公式推导中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为随机树生成提供了高效且通用的解决方案，扩展了相关应用领域，并为理论分析提供了新思路。

title: Travel Guides for Creative Tourists, Powered by Geotagged Social Media
title_zh: 由地理标记社交媒体提供支持的创意游客旅行指南
abstract: Many modern tourists want to know about everyday life and spend time like a local in a new city. Current tools and guides typically provide them with lists of sights to see, which do not meet their needs. Manually building new tools for them would not scale. However, public geotagged social media data, like tweets and photos, have the potential to fill this gap, showing users an interesting and unique side of a place. Through three studies surrounding the design and construction of a social-media-powered Neighborhood Guides website, we show recommendations for building such a site. Our findings highlight an important aspect of social media: while it lacks the user base and consistency to directly reflect users' lives, it does reveal the idealized everyday life that so many visitors want to know about.
summary: Many modern tourists want to know about everyday life and spend time like a local in a new city. Current tools and guides typically provide them with lists of sights to see, which do not meet their needs. Manually building new tools for them would not scale. However, public geotagged social media data, like tweets and photos, have the potential to fill this gap, showing users an interesting and unique side of a place. Through three studies surrounding the design and construction of a social-media-powered Neighborhood Guides website, we show recommendations for building such a site. Our findings highlight an important aspect of social media: while it lacks the user base and consistency to directly reflect users' lives, it does reveal the idealized everyday life that so many visitors want to know about.
abstract_zh: 许多现代游客希望了解日常生活，并像当地人一样在新城市度过美好时光。当前的工具和指南通常为他们提供要参观的景点列表，但这不能满足他们的需求。手动为他们构建新工具无法扩展。然而，公共地理标记社交媒体数据（例如推文和照片）有可能填补这一空白，向用户展示一个地方有趣且独特的一面。通过围绕社交媒体驱动的邻里指南网站的设计和构建的三项研究，我们提出了构建此类网站的建议。我们的研究结果凸显了社交媒体的一个重要方面：虽然它缺乏直接反映用户生活的用户基础和一致性，但它确实揭示了许多访问者想要了解的理想化日常生活。

AI.motivation: 现有旅游工具无法满足游客了解当地日常生活的个性化需求，需利用社交媒体数据填补这一空白
AI.method: 通过三个研究设计并构建基于社交媒体数据的社区指南网站，分析用户需求与数据应用方式
AI.result: 发现社交媒体数据能揭示游客向往的理想化日常，尽管无法直接反映真实用户生活
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体虽缺乏用户基数和一致性，但能有效呈现游客追求的理想化日常，为创意旅游指南提供可行方案

search_text: Travel Guides for Creative Tourists, Powered by Geotagged Social Media 由地理标记社交媒体提供支持的创意游客旅行指南 Many modern tourists want to know about everyday life and spend time like a local in a new city. Current tools and guides typically provide them with lists of sights to see, which do not meet their needs. Manually building new tools for them would not scale. However, public geotagged social media data, like tweets and photos, have the potential to fill this gap, showing users an interesting and unique side of a place. Through three studies surrounding the design and construction of a social-media-powered Neighborhood Guides website, we show recommendations for building such a site. Our findings highlight an important aspect of social media: while it lacks the user base and consistency to directly reflect users' lives, it does reveal the idealized everyday life that so many visitors want to know about. 许多现代游客希望了解日常生活，并像当地人一样在新城市度过美好时光。当前的工具和指南通常为他们提供要参观的景点列表，但这不能满足他们的需求。手动为他们构建新工具无法扩展。然而，公共地理标记社交媒体数据（例如推文和照片）有可能填补这一空白，向用户展示一个地方有趣且独特的一面。通过围绕社交媒体驱动的邻里指南网站的设计和构建的三项研究，我们提出了构建此类网站的建议。我们的研究结果凸显了社交媒体的一个重要方面：虽然它缺乏直接反映用户生活的用户基础和一致性，但它确实揭示了许多访问者想要了解的理想化日常生活。 构建基于地理标签社交媒体数据的社区指南网站，为创意游客提供本地化生活体验推荐 Dan Tasse,Jason I.
