title: Barely-Supervised Learning: Semi-Supervised Learning with very few labeled images
title_zh: 几乎没有监督的学习：带有很少标记图像的半监督学习
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of semi-supervised learning when the set of labeled samples is limited to a small number of images per class, typically less than 10, problem that we refer to as barely-supervised learning. We analyze in depth the behavior of a state-of-the-art semi-supervised method, FixMatch, which relies on a weakly-augmented version of an image to obtain supervision signal for a more strongly-augmented version. We show that it frequently fails in barely-supervised scenarios, due to a lack of training signal when no pseudo-label can be predicted with high confidence. We propose a method to leverage self-supervised methods that provides training signal in the absence of confident pseudo-labels. We then propose two methods to refine the pseudo-label selection process which lead to further improvements. The first one relies on a per-sample history of the model predictions, akin to a voting scheme. The second iteratively updates class-dependent confidence thresholds to better explore classes that are under-represented in the pseudo-labels. Our experiments show that our approach performs significantly better on STL-10 in the barely-supervised regime, e.g. with 4 or 8 labeled images per class.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of semi-supervised learning when the set of labeled samples is limited to a small number of images per class, typically less than 10, problem that we refer to as barely-supervised learning. We analyze in depth the behavior of a state-of-the-art semi-supervised method, FixMatch, which relies on a weakly-augmented version of an image to obtain supervision signal for a more strongly-augmented version. We show that it frequently fails in barely-supervised scenarios, due to a lack of training signal when no pseudo-label can be predicted with high confidence. We propose a method to leverage self-supervised methods that provides training signal in the absence of confident pseudo-labels. We then propose two methods to refine the pseudo-label selection process which lead to further improvements. The first one relies on a per-sample history of the model predictions, akin to a voting scheme. The second iteratively updates class-dependent confidence thresholds to better explore classes that are under-represented in the pseudo-labels. Our experiments show that our approach performs significantly better on STL-10 in the barely-supervised regime, e.g. with 4 or 8 labeled images per class.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了当标记样本集仅限于每类少量图像（通常少于 10 个）时的半监督学习问题，我们将其称为勉强监督学习。我们深入分析了最先进的半监督方法 FixMatch 的行为，该方法依赖于图像的弱增强版本来获取更强增强版本的监督信号。我们表明，它在几乎没有监督的场景中经常失败，因为当无法高置信度地预测伪标签时缺乏训练信号。我们提出了一种利用自我监督方法的方法，该方法在缺乏置信伪标签的情况下提供训练信号。然后，我们提出了两种方法来改进伪标签选择过程，从而进一步改进。第一个依赖于模型预测的每个样本历史记录，类似于投票方案。第二个迭代更新依赖于类的置信度阈值，以更好地探索伪标签中代表性不足的类。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在几乎没有监督的情况下在 STL-10 上表现明显更好，例如每类有 4 或 8 个标记图像。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在极少量标记图像（每个类别少于10张）下的半监督学习问题，提出改进方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法（如FixMatch）在标签样本极少时因缺乏高置信度伪标签而表现不佳，需补充训练信号并优化伪标签选择。
AI.method: 结合自监督学习提供训练信号，提出两种伪标签优化方法：基于样本预测历史的投票机制及动态调整类别置信度阈值。
AI.result: 在STL-10数据集上，使用4或8个标记图像时，所提方法显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督信号补充与伪标签优化策略，有效解决了极少量标签下的半监督学习挑战。

authors_text: Henrique Siqueira,Patrick Ruhkamp,Ibrahim Halfaoui,Markus Karmann,Onay Urfalioglu
title: Looking Beyond Corners: Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations for Keypoint Detection and Description Extraction
title_zh: 超越角落：用于关键点检测和描述提取的视觉表示的对比学习
abstract: Learnable keypoint detectors and descriptors are beginning to outperform classical hand-crafted feature extraction methods. Recent studies on self-supervised learning of visual representations have driven the increasing performance of learnable models based on deep networks. By leveraging traditional data augmentations and homography transformations, these networks learn to detect corners under adverse conditions such as extreme illumination changes. However, their generalization capabilities are limited to corner-like features detected a priori by classical methods or synthetically generated data. In this paper, we propose the Correspondence Network (CorrNet) that learns to detect repeatable keypoints and to extract discriminative descriptions via unsupervised contrastive learning under spatial constraints. Our experiments show that CorrNet is not only able to detect low-level features such as corners, but also high-level features that represent similar objects present in a pair of input images through our proposed joint guided backpropagation of their latent space. Our approach obtains competitive results under viewpoint changes and achieves state-of-the-art performance under illumination changes.
summary: Learnable keypoint detectors and descriptors are beginning to outperform classical hand-crafted feature extraction methods. Recent studies on self-supervised learning of visual representations have driven the increasing performance of learnable models based on deep networks. By leveraging traditional data augmentations and homography transformations, these networks learn to detect corners under adverse conditions such as extreme illumination changes. However, their generalization capabilities are limited to corner-like features detected a priori by classical methods or synthetically generated data. In this paper, we propose the Correspondence Network (CorrNet) that learns to detect repeatable keypoints and to extract discriminative descriptions via unsupervised contrastive learning under spatial constraints. Our experiments show that CorrNet is not only able to detect low-level features such as corners, but also high-level features that represent similar objects present in a pair of input images through our proposed joint guided backpropagation of their latent space. Our approach obtains competitive results under viewpoint changes and achieves state-of-the-art performance under illumination changes.
abstract_zh: 可学习的关键点检测器和描述符开始优于经典的手工特征提取方法。最近关于视觉表示的自监督学习的研究推动了基于深度网络的可学习模型的性能不断提高。通过利用传统的数据增强和单应变换，这些网络学会在极端光照变化等不利条件下检测角点。然而，它们的泛化能力仅限于通过经典方法或综合生成的数据先验检测到的角点特征。在本文中，我们提出了对应网络（CorrNet），它学习检测可重复的关键点并通过空间约束下的无监督对比学习来提取判别性描述。我们的实验表明，CorrNet 不仅能够检测角点等低级特征，还能够通过我们提出的潜在空间联合引导反向传播来检测表示一对输入图像中存在的相似对象的高级特征。我们的方法在视点变化下获得了有竞争力的结果，并在光照变化下实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的视觉表示学习方法CorrNet，用于关键点检测和描述符提取，以提升在光照变化等复杂条件下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统手工设计的关键点检测方法在光照变化等场景下表现有限，现有基于自监督学习的方法依赖先验的角点特征或合成数据，泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过无监督对比学习和空间约束，设计CorrNet网络，结合潜空间的联合引导反向传播，实现重复性关键点检测与判别性描述符提取。
AI.result: 在视角变化场景下达到竞争力结果，在光照变化场景下取得最先进的性能，能检测低级角点及高级语义相似物体特征。
AI.conclusion: CorrNet通过空间约束下的对比学习机制，有效突破传统方法限制，实现了复杂条件下关键点检测与描述的性能提升。

search_text: Looking Beyond Corners: Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations for Keypoint Detection and Description Extraction 超越角落：用于关键点检测和描述提取的视觉表示的对比学习 Learnable keypoint detectors and descriptors are beginning to outperform classical hand-crafted feature extraction methods. Recent studies on self-supervised learning of visual representations have driven the increasing performance of learnable models based on deep networks. By leveraging traditional data augmentations and homography transformations, these networks learn to detect corners under adverse conditions such as extreme illumination changes. However, their generalization capabilities are limited to corner-like features detected a priori by classical methods or synthetically generated data. In this paper, we propose the Correspondence Network (CorrNet) that learns to detect repeatable keypoints and to extract discriminative descriptions via unsupervised contrastive learning under spatial constraints. Our experiments show that CorrNet is not only able to detect low-level features such as corners, but also high-level features that represent similar objects present in a pair of input images through our proposed joint guided backpropagation of their latent space. Our approach obtains competitive results under viewpoint changes and achieves state-of-the-art performance under illumination changes. 可学习的关键点检测器和描述符开始优于经典的手工特征提取方法。最近关于视觉表示的自监督学习的研究推动了基于深度网络的可学习模型的性能不断提高。通过利用传统的数据增强和单应变换，这些网络学会在极端光照变化等不利条件下检测角点。然而，它们的泛化能力仅限于通过经典方法或综合生成的数据先验检测到的角点特征。在本文中，我们提出了对应网络（CorrNet），它学习检测可重复的关键点并通过空间约束下的无监督对比学习来提取判别性描述。我们的实验表明，CorrNet 不仅能够检测角点等低级特征，还能够通过我们提出的潜在空间联合引导反向传播来检测表示一对输入图像中存在的相似对象的高级特征。我们的方法在视点变化下获得了有竞争力的结果，并在光照变化下实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的视觉表示学习方法CorrNet，用于关键点检测和描述符提取，以提升在光照变化等复杂条件下的性能。 Henrique Siqueira,Patrick Ruhkamp,Ibrahim Halfaoui,Markus Karmann,Onay Urfalioglu cs.CV

title: DA-FDFtNet: Dual Attention Fake Detection Fine-tuning Network to Detect Various AI-Generated Fake Images
title_zh: DA-FDFtNet：双重注意力假货检测微调网络，用于检测各种人工智能生成的假图像
abstract: Due to the advancement of Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Autoencoders, and other AI technologies, it has been much easier to create fake images such as "Deepfakes". More recent research has introduced few-shot learning, which uses a small amount of training data to produce fake images and videos more effectively. Therefore, the ease of generating manipulated images and the difficulty of distinguishing those images can cause a serious threat to our society, such as propagating fake information. However, detecting realistic fake images generated by the latest AI technology is challenging due to the reasons mentioned above. In this work, we propose Dual Attention Fake Detection Fine-tuning Network (DA-FDFtNet) to detect the manipulated fake face images from the real face data. Our DA-FDFtNet integrates the pre-trained model with Fine-Tune Transformer, MBblockV3, and a channel attention module to improve the performance and robustness across different types of fake images. In particular, Fine-Tune Transformer consists of multiple numbers of an image-based self-attention module and a down-sampling layer. The channel attention module is also connected with the pre-trained model to capture the fake images feature space. We experiment with our DA-FDFtNet with the FaceForensics++ dataset and various GAN-generated datasets, and we show that our approach outperforms the previous baseline models.
summary: Due to the advancement of Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Autoencoders, and other AI technologies, it has been much easier to create fake images such as "Deepfakes". More recent research has introduced few-shot learning, which uses a small amount of training data to produce fake images and videos more effectively. Therefore, the ease of generating manipulated images and the difficulty of distinguishing those images can cause a serious threat to our society, such as propagating fake information. However, detecting realistic fake images generated by the latest AI technology is challenging due to the reasons mentioned above. In this work, we propose Dual Attention Fake Detection Fine-tuning Network (DA-FDFtNet) to detect the manipulated fake face images from the real face data. Our DA-FDFtNet integrates the pre-trained model with Fine-Tune Transformer, MBblockV3, and a channel attention module to improve the performance and robustness across different types of fake images. In particular, Fine-Tune Transformer consists of multiple numbers of an image-based self-attention module and a down-sampling layer. The channel attention module is also connected with the pre-trained model to capture the fake images feature space. We experiment with our DA-FDFtNet with the FaceForensics++ dataset and various GAN-generated datasets, and we show that our approach outperforms the previous baseline models.
abstract_zh: 由于生成对抗网络（GAN）、自动编码器和其他人工智能技术的进步，创建“Deepfakes”等虚假图像变得更加容易。最近的研究引入了少样本学习，它使用少量的训练数据来更有效地生成假图像和视频。因此，生成操纵图像的容易性和区分这些图像的难度可能会对我们的社会造成严重威胁，例如传播虚假信息。然而，由于上述原因，检测最新人工智能技术生成的真实假图像具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了双重注意力假冒检测微调网络（DA-FDFtNet）来从真实人脸数据中检测被操纵的假人脸图像。我们的 DA-FDFtNet 将预训练模型与 Fine-Tune Transformer、MBblockV3 和通道注意模块集成在一起，以提高不同类型假图像的性能和鲁棒性。具体来说，Fine-Tune Transformer 由多个基于图像的自注意力模块和下采样层组成。通道注意力模块还与预训练模型连接以捕获假图像特征空间。我们使用 FaceForensics++ 数据集和各种 GAN 生成的数据集对 DA-FDFtNet 进行实验，结果表明我们的方法优于之前的基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DA-FDFtNet网络，用于检测由最新AI技术生成的多种伪造图像。
AI.motivation: 随着GAN和自编码器等技术的发展，生成伪造图像变得容易，且现有方法难以区分高真实感的AI生成假图像，这对社会构成威胁。
AI.method: 结合预训练模型、微调Transformer、MBblockV3模块和通道注意力机制，通过自注意力模块与下采样层提升模型鲁棒性，并捕捉伪造图像特征空间。
AI.result: 在FaceForensics++和多种GAN生成数据集上实验表明，DA-FDFtNet优于现有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: DA-FDFtNet通过双注意力机制有效提升了对各类AI生成伪造图像的检测性能，为解决该问题提供了新思路。

title: Automatic Estimation of Anthropometric Human Body Measurements
title_zh: 人体测量的自动估计
abstract: Research tasks related to human body analysis have been drawing a lot of attention in computer vision area over the last few decades, considering its potential benefits on our day-to-day life. Anthropometry is a field defining physical measures of a human body size, form, and functional capacities. Specifically, the accurate estimation of anthropometric body measurements from visual human body data is one of the challenging problems, where the solution would ease many different areas of applications, including ergonomics, garment manufacturing, etc. This paper formulates a research in the field of deep learning and neural networks, to tackle the challenge of body measurements estimation from various types of visual input data (such as 2D images or 3D point clouds). Also, we deal with the lack of real human data annotated with ground truth body measurements required for training and evaluation, by generating a synthetic dataset of various human body shapes and performing a skeleton-driven annotation.
summary: Research tasks related to human body analysis have been drawing a lot of attention in computer vision area over the last few decades, considering its potential benefits on our day-to-day life. Anthropometry is a field defining physical measures of a human body size, form, and functional capacities. Specifically, the accurate estimation of anthropometric body measurements from visual human body data is one of the challenging problems, where the solution would ease many different areas of applications, including ergonomics, garment manufacturing, etc. This paper formulates a research in the field of deep learning and neural networks, to tackle the challenge of body measurements estimation from various types of visual input data (such as 2D images or 3D point clouds). Also, we deal with the lack of real human data annotated with ground truth body measurements required for training and evaluation, by generating a synthetic dataset of various human body shapes and performing a skeleton-driven annotation.
abstract_zh: 考虑到其对我们日常生活的潜在好处，过去几十年来，与人体分析相关的研究任务在计算机视觉领域引起了广泛关注。人体测量学是定义人体尺寸、形态和功能能力的物理测量的领域。具体来说，从视觉人体数据中准确估计人体测量数据是具有挑战性的问题之一，该解决方案将简化许多不同领域的应用，包括人体工程学、服装制造等。本文制定了深度学习和神经网络领域的研究，以解决从各种类型的视觉输入数据（例如2D图像或3D点云）估计身体测量的挑战。此外，我们通过生成各种人体形状的合成数据集并执行骨架驱动的注释，解决了缺乏训练和评估所需的地面真实身体测量注释的真实人体数据的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习和神经网络的方法，从2D图像或3D点云等视觉输入数据中自动估计人体的体态测量数据。
AI.motivation: 人体测量估计在人机工程学、服装制造等领域有广泛应用，但现有方法面临真实标注数据不足的挑战，需通过合成数据解决这一问题。
AI.method: 构建基于深度学习的模型，结合骨架驱动的标注方法生成包含多种人体形态的合成数据集，用于训练和评估人体测量估计模型。
AI.result: 实现了从视觉数据中准确估计人体关键测量指标，验证了合成数据集在弥补真实数据不足方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过合成数据集与深度学习方法的结合，有效解决了人体测量估计任务中数据稀缺的问题，为相关应用提供了可行方案。

title: Page Segmentation using Visual Adjacency Analysis
title_zh: 使用视觉邻接分析进行页面分割
abstract: Page segmentation is a web page analysis process that divides a page into cohesive segments, such as sidebars, headers, and footers. Current page segmentation approaches use either the DOM, textual content, or rendering style information of the page. However, these approaches have a number of drawbacks, such as a large number of parameters and rigid assumptions about the page, which negatively impact their segmentation accuracy. We propose a novel page segmentation approach based on visual analysis of localized adjacency regions. It combines DOM attributes and visual analysis to build features of a given page and guide an unsupervised clustering. We evaluate our approach on 35 real-world web pages, and examine the effectiveness and efficiency of segmentation. The results show that, compared with state-of-the-art, our approach achieves an average of 156% increase in precision and 249% improvement in F-measure.
summary: Page segmentation is a web page analysis process that divides a page into cohesive segments, such as sidebars, headers, and footers. Current page segmentation approaches use either the DOM, textual content, or rendering style information of the page. However, these approaches have a number of drawbacks, such as a large number of parameters and rigid assumptions about the page, which negatively impact their segmentation accuracy. We propose a novel page segmentation approach based on visual analysis of localized adjacency regions. It combines DOM attributes and visual analysis to build features of a given page and guide an unsupervised clustering. We evaluate our approach on 35 real-world web pages, and examine the effectiveness and efficiency of segmentation. The results show that, compared with state-of-the-art, our approach achieves an average of 156% increase in precision and 249% improvement in F-measure.
abstract_zh: 页面分段是一种网页分析过程，它将页面划分为多个有凝聚力的部分，例如侧边栏、页眉和页脚。当前的页面分割方法使用页面的 DOM、文本内容或渲染样式信息。然而，这些方法有许多缺点，例如大量的参数和关于页面的严格假设，这对其分割准确性产生了负面影响。我们提出了一种基于局部邻接区域的视觉分析的新颖的页面分割方法。它结合了 DOM 属性和可视化分析来构建给定页面的特征并指导无监督的聚类。我们在 35 个真实网页上评估我们的方法，并检查分段的有效性和效率。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法平均精度提高了 156%，F 测量提高了 249%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉邻接分析的网页分割方法，通过结合DOM属性和视觉分析提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有网页分割方法依赖DOM、文本或渲染样式信息，存在参数过多和对网页结构假设僵化的问题，影响分割准确性。
AI.method: 通过分析局部视觉邻接区域，结合DOM属性与视觉特征构建页面特征，指导无监督聚类实现分割。
AI.result: 在35个真实网页上的实验表明，该方法相比现有最佳方法平均提升精度156%，F值提升249%。

search_text: Page Segmentation using Visual Adjacency Analysis 使用视觉邻接分析进行页面分割 Page segmentation is a web page analysis process that divides a page into cohesive segments, such as sidebars, headers, and footers. Current page segmentation approaches use either the DOM, textual content, or rendering style information of the page. However, these approaches have a number of drawbacks, such as a large number of parameters and rigid assumptions about the page, which negatively impact their segmentation accuracy. We propose a novel page segmentation approach based on visual analysis of localized adjacency regions. It combines DOM attributes and visual analysis to build features of a given page and guide an unsupervised clustering. We evaluate our approach on 35 real-world web pages, and examine the effectiveness and efficiency of segmentation. The results show that, compared with state-of-the-art, our approach achieves an average of 156% increase in precision and 249% improvement in F-measure. 页面分段是一种网页分析过程，它将页面划分为多个有凝聚力的部分，例如侧边栏、页眉和页脚。当前的页面分割方法使用页面的 DOM、文本内容或渲染样式信息。然而，这些方法有许多缺点，例如大量的参数和关于页面的严格假设，这对其分割准确性产生了负面影响。我们提出了一种基于局部邻接区域的视觉分析的新颖的页面分割方法。它结合了 DOM 属性和可视化分析来构建给定页面的特征并指导无监督的聚类。我们在 35 个真实网页上评估我们的方法，并检查分段的有效性和效率。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法平均精度提高了 156%，F 测量提高了 249%。 本文提出了一种基于视觉邻接分析的网页分割方法，通过结合DOM属性和视觉分析提升分割效果。 Mohammad Bajammal,Ali Mesbah cs.CV

title: Evaluating the Robustness of Deep Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Policies in a Multi-agent Urban Driving Environment
title_zh: 评估多智能体城市驾驶环境中自主策略的深度强化学习的鲁棒性
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning is actively used for training autonomous car policies in a simulated driving environment. Due to the large availability of various reinforcement learning algorithms and the lack of their systematic comparison across different driving scenarios, we are unsure of which ones are more effective for training autonomous car software in single-agent as well as multi-agent driving environments. A benchmarking framework for the comparison of deep reinforcement learning in a vision-based autonomous driving will open up the possibilities for training better autonomous car driving policies. To address these challenges, we provide an open and reusable benchmarking framework for systematic evaluation and comparative analysis of deep reinforcement learning algorithms for autonomous driving in a single- and multi-agent environment. Using the framework, we perform a comparative study of discrete and continuous action space deep reinforcement learning algorithms. We also propose a comprehensive multi-objective reward function designed for the evaluation of deep reinforcement learning-based autonomous driving agents. We run the experiments in a vision-only high-fidelity urban driving simulated environments. The results indicate that only some of the deep reinforcement learning algorithms perform consistently better across single and multi-agent scenarios when trained in various multi-agent-only environment settings. For example, A3C- and TD3-based autonomous cars perform comparatively better in terms of more robust actions and minimal driving errors in both single and multi-agent scenarios. We conclude that different deep reinforcement learning algorithms exhibit different driving and testing performance in different scenarios, which underlines the need for their systematic comparative analysis. The benchmarking framework proposed in this paper facilitates such a comparison.

Due to the large availability of various reinforcement learning algorithms and the lack of their systematic comparison across different driving scenarios, we are unsure of which ones are more effective for training autonomous car software in single-agent as well as multi-agent driving environments. A benchmarking framework for the comparison of deep reinforcement learning in a vision-based autonomous driving will open up the possibilities for training better autonomous car driving policies. To address these challenges, we provide an open and reusable benchmarking framework for systematic evaluation and comparative analysis of deep reinforcement learning algorithms for autonomous driving in a single- and multi-agent environment. Using the framework, we perform a comparative study of discrete and continuous action space deep reinforcement learning algorithms. We also propose a comprehensive multi-objective reward function designed for the evaluation of deep reinforcement learning-based autonomous driving agents. We run the experiments in a vision-only high-fidelity urban driving simulated environments. The results indicate that only some of the deep reinforcement learning algorithms perform consistently better across single and multi-agent scenarios when trained in various multi-agent-only environment settings. For example, A3C- and TD3-based autonomous cars perform comparatively better in terms of more robust actions and minimal driving errors in both single and multi-agent scenarios. We conclude that different deep reinforcement learning algorithms exhibit different driving and testing performance in different scenarios, which underlines the need for their systematic comparative analysis. The benchmarking framework proposed in this paper facilitates such a comparison.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习被积极用于在模拟驾驶环境中训练自动驾驶汽车策略。由于各种强化学习算法的可用性很高，并且缺乏对不同驾驶场景的系统比较，我们不确定哪些算法对于在单智能体和多智能体驾驶环境中训练自动驾驶汽车软件更有效。用于比较基于视觉的自动驾驶中的深度强化学习的基准框架将为训练更好的自动汽车驾驶策略提供可能性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提供了一个开放且可重用的基准测试框架，用于在单智能体和多智能体环境中对自动驾驶的深度强化学习算法进行系统评估和比较分析。使用该框架，我们对离散和连续动作空间深度强化学习算法进行了比较研究。我们还提出了一种全面的多目标奖励函数，旨在评估基于深度强化学习的自动驾驶代理。我们在仅视觉的高保真城市驾驶模拟环境中进行实验。结果表明，当在各种仅多智能体环境设置中进行训练时，只有一些深度强化学习算法在单智能体和多智能体场景中始终表现得更好。例如，基于 A3C 和 TD3 的自动驾驶汽车在单智能体和多智能体场景中在更鲁棒的动作和最小的驾驶错误方面表现相对更好。我们得出的结论是，不同的深度强化学习算法在不同场景下表现出不同的驾驶和测试性能，这强调了对其进行系统比较分析的必要性。本文提出的基准测试框架有助于进行这种比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估深度强化学习在单智能体和多智能体城市驾驶环境中的自主策略的基准框架。
AI.motivation: 由于深度强化学习算法种类繁多，但缺乏系统性比较，无法确定哪种算法更适合用于训练自动驾驶软件。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个开放且可重复使用的基准框架，对深度强化学习算法进行系统评估和比较分析，并提出了一个全面的多目标奖励函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，只有部分深度强化学习算法在单智能体和多智能体场景中表现稳定，例如基于A3C和TD3的自动驾驶车辆在各种多智能体环境中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 不同的深度强化学习算法在不同场景中表现出不同的驾驶和测试性能，这突显了系统性比较分析的必要性，本文提出的基准框架有助于实现这一比较。

title: Faster Convergence in Multi-Objective Optimization Algorithms Based on Decomposition
title_zh: 基于分解的多目标优化算法更快的收敛
abstract: The Resource Allocation approach (RA) improves the performance of MOEA/D by maintaining a big population and updating few solutions each generation. However, most of the studies on RA generally focused on the properties of different Resource Allocation metrics. Thus, it is still uncertain what the main factors are that lead to increments in performance of MOEA/D with RA. This study investigates the effects of MOEA/D with the Partial Update Strategy in an extensive set of MOPs to generate insights into correspondences of MOEA/D with the Partial Update and MOEA/D with small population size and big population size. Our work undertakes an in-depth analysis of the populational dynamics behaviour considering their final approximation Pareto sets, anytime hypervolume performance, attained regions and number of unique non-dominated solutions. Our results indicate that MOEA/D with Partial Update progresses with the search as fast as MOEA/D with small population size and explores the search space as MOEA/D with big population size. MOEA/D with Partial Update can mitigate common problems related to population size choice with better convergence speed in most MOPs, as shown by the results of hypervolume and number of unique non-dominated solutions, the anytime performance and Empirical Attainment Function indicates.
summary: The Resource Allocation approach (RA) improves the performance of MOEA/D by maintaining a big population and updating few solutions each generation. However, most of the studies on RA generally focused on the properties of different Resource Allocation metrics. Thus, it is still uncertain what the main factors are that lead to increments in performance of MOEA/D with RA. This study investigates the effects of MOEA/D with the Partial Update Strategy in an extensive set of MOPs to generate insights into correspondences of MOEA/D with the Partial Update and MOEA/D with small population size and big population size. Our work undertakes an in-depth analysis of the populational dynamics behaviour considering their final approximation Pareto sets, anytime hypervolume performance, attained regions and number of unique non-dominated solutions. Our results indicate that MOEA/D with Partial Update progresses with the search as fast as MOEA/D with small population size and explores the search space as MOEA/D with big population size. MOEA/D with Partial Update can mitigate common problems related to population size choice with better convergence speed in most MOPs, as shown by the results of hypervolume and number of unique non-dominated solutions, the anytime performance and Empirical Attainment Function indicates.
abstract_zh: 资源分配方法 (RA) 通过维持大量人口并每代更新少量解决方案来提高 MOEA/D 的性能。然而，大多数关于 RA 的研究通常集中在不同资源分配指标的属性上。因此，目前仍不确定导致 MOEA/D 与 RA 性能提高的主要因素是什么。本研究调查了采用部分更新策略的 MOEA/D 在大量 MOP 中的效果，以深入了解采用部分更新的 MOEA/D 以及具有小群体规模和大群体规模的 MOEA/D 的对应关系。我们的工作对种群动态行为进行了深入分析，考虑到它们的最终近似帕累托集、任何时候的超体积性能、获得的区域和独特的非支配解决方案的数量。我们的结果表明，具有部分更新的 MOEA/D 的搜索进度与人口规模较小的 MOEA/D 一样快，并且与人口规模较大的 MOEA/D 一样探索搜索空间。具有部分更新功能的 MOEA/D 可以在大多数 MOP 中以更好的收敛速度来缓解与群体规模选择相关的常见问题，正如超体积的结果和独特非支配解的数量、随时性能和经验达到函数所表明的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于分解的多目标优化算法MOEA/D中部分更新策略对收敛速度的影响，通过对比不同种群规模的性能差异，分析其动态行为与优化效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管资源分配方法（RA）通过维持大种群和每代更新少量解提升了MOEA/D性能，但现有研究多聚焦于RA指标特性，未明确其性能提升的核心因素。
AI.method: 在广泛多目标问题（MOPs）中对比MOEA/D的部分更新策略与小/大种群规模的性能，通过最终帕累托集逼近、即时超体积指标、覆盖区域及非支配解数量等维度分析种群动态行为。
AI.result: 部分更新策略的MOEA/D在收敛速度上与小种群相当，探索能力与大种群相似，且在多数MOP中通过超体积指标和非支配解数量验证了其优势。
AI.conclusion: 部分更新策略可缓解种群规模选择难题，在保持快速收敛的同时增强搜索多样性，为多目标优化提供更稳健的算法配置方案。

search_text: Faster Convergence in Multi-Objective Optimization Algorithms Based on Decomposition 基于分解的多目标优化算法更快的收敛 The Resource Allocation approach (RA) improves the performance of MOEA/D by maintaining a big population and updating few solutions each generation. However, most of the studies on RA generally focused on the properties of different Resource Allocation metrics. Thus, it is still uncertain what the main factors are that lead to increments in performance of MOEA/D with RA. This study investigates the effects of MOEA/D with the Partial Update Strategy in an extensive set of MOPs to generate insights into correspondences of MOEA/D with the Partial Update and MOEA/D with small population size and big population size. Our work undertakes an in-depth analysis of the populational dynamics behaviour considering their final approximation Pareto sets, anytime hypervolume performance, attained regions and number of unique non-dominated solutions. Our results indicate that MOEA/D with Partial Update progresses with the search as fast as MOEA/D with small population size and explores the search space as MOEA/D with big population size. MOEA/D with Partial Update can mitigate common problems related to population size choice with better convergence speed in most MOPs, as shown by the results of hypervolume and number of unique non-dominated solutions, the anytime performance and Empirical Attainment Function indicates. 资源分配方法 (RA) 通过维持大量人口并每代更新少量解决方案来提高 MOEA/D 的性能。然而，大多数关于 RA 的研究通常集中在不同资源分配指标的属性上。因此，目前仍不确定导致 MOEA/D 与 RA 性能提高的主要因素是什么。本研究调查了采用部分更新策略的 MOEA/D 在大量 MOP 中的效果，以深入了解采用部分更新的 MOEA/D 以及具有小群体规模和大群体规模的 MOEA/D 的对应关系。我们的工作对种群动态行为进行了深入分析，考虑到它们的最终近似帕累托集、任何时候的超体积性能、获得的区域和独特的非支配解决方案的数量。我们的结果表明，具有部分更新的 MOEA/D 的搜索进度与人口规模较小的 MOEA/D 一样快，并且与人口规模较大的 MOEA/D 一样探索搜索空间。具有部分更新功能的 MOEA/D 可以在大多数 MOP 中以更好的收敛速度来缓解与群体规模选择相关的常见问题，正如超体积的结果和独特非支配解的数量、随时性能和经验达到函数所表明的那样。 本文研究基于分解的多目标优化算法MOEA/D中部分更新策略对收敛速度的影响，通过对比不同种群规模的性能差异，分析其动态行为与优化效果。 Yuri Lavinas,Marcelo Ladeira,Claus Aranha cs.NE,cs.AI

title: Adversarial Deep Reinforcement Learning for Improving the Robustness of Multi-agent Autonomous Driving Policies
title_zh: 用于提高多智能体自动驾驶策略鲁棒性的对抗性深度强化学习
abstract: Autonomous cars are well known for being vulnerable to adversarial attacks that can compromise the safety of the car and pose danger to other road users. To effectively defend against adversaries, it is required to not only test autonomous cars for finding driving errors but to improve the robustness of the cars to these errors. To this end, in this paper, we propose a two-step methodology for autonomous cars that consists of (i) finding failure states in autonomous cars by training the adversarial driving agent, and (ii) improving the robustness of autonomous cars by retraining them with effective adversarial inputs. Our methodology supports testing autonomous cars in a multi-agent environment, where we train and compare adversarial car policy on two custom reward functions to test the driving control decision of autonomous cars. We run experiments in a vision-based high-fidelity urban driving simulated environment. Our results show that adversarial testing can be used for finding erroneous autonomous driving behavior, followed by adversarial training for improving the robustness of deep reinforcement learning-based autonomous driving policies. We demonstrate that the autonomous cars retrained using the effective adversarial inputs noticeably increase the performance of their driving policies in terms of reduced collision and offroad steering errors.
summary: Autonomous cars are well known for being vulnerable to adversarial attacks that can compromise the safety of the car and pose danger to other road users. To effectively defend against adversaries, it is required to not only test autonomous cars for finding driving errors but to improve the robustness of the cars to these errors. To this end, in this paper, we propose a two-step methodology for autonomous cars that consists of (i) finding failure states in autonomous cars by training the adversarial driving agent, and (ii) improving the robustness of autonomous cars by retraining them with effective adversarial inputs. Our methodology supports testing autonomous cars in a multi-agent environment, where we train and compare adversarial car policy on two custom reward functions to test the driving control decision of autonomous cars. We run experiments in a vision-based high-fidelity urban driving simulated environment. Our results show that adversarial testing can be used for finding erroneous autonomous driving behavior, followed by adversarial training for improving the robustness of deep reinforcement learning-based autonomous driving policies. We demonstrate that the autonomous cars retrained using the effective adversarial inputs noticeably increase the performance of their driving policies in terms of reduced collision and offroad steering errors.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，自动驾驶汽车容易受到对抗性攻击，这些攻击可能会危及汽车的安全并对其他道路使用者构成危险。为了有效防御对手，不仅需要测试自动驾驶汽车以发现驾驶错误，还需要提高汽车对这些错误的鲁棒性。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种自动驾驶汽车的两步方法，包括（i）通过训练对抗性驾驶代理来查找自动驾驶汽车的故障状态，以及（ii）通过使用有效的对抗性输入重新训练自动驾驶汽车来提高自动驾驶汽车的鲁棒性。我们的方法支持在多代理环境中测试自动驾驶汽车，我们在两个自定义奖励函数上训练和比较对抗性汽车策略，以测试自动驾驶汽车的驾驶控制决策。我们在基于视觉的高保真城市驾驶模拟环境中进行了实验。我们的结果表明，对抗性测试可用于发现错误的自动驾驶行为，然后进行对抗性训练，以提高基于深度强化学习的自动驾驶策略的稳健性。我们证明，使用有效的对抗性输入进行再训练的自动驾驶汽车在减少碰撞和越野转向错误方面显着提高了其驾驶策略的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性深度强化学习方法，通过两步流程提升多智能体自动驾驶策略的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆易受对抗攻击影响，现有方法难以有效防御，需通过测试与训练提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1）训练对抗代理发现自动驾驶故障状态；2）利用对抗输入重新训练模型以增强鲁棒性，并在多智能体环境中对比两种奖励函数的对抗策略。
AI.result: 实验表明对抗测试可识别自动驾驶错误行为，对抗训练显著减少碰撞和出道路转向错误，提升驾驶策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性训练能有效增强基于深度强化学习的自动驾驶策略鲁棒性，为安全防御提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性深度强化学习方法，通过两步流程提升多智能体自动驾驶策略的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Ileana Rugina,Rumen Dangovski,Mark Veillette,Pooya Khorrami,Brian Cheung,Olga Simek,Marin Soljačić
title: Meta-Learning and Self-Supervised Pretraining for Real World Image Translation
title_zh: 现实世界图像翻译的元学习和自监督预训练
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning, in particular enabled by hardware advances and big data, have provided impressive results across a wide range of computational problems such as computer vision, natural language, or reinforcement learning. Many of these improvements are however constrained to problems with large-scale curated data-sets which require a lot of human labor to gather. Additionally, these models tend to generalize poorly under both slight distributional shifts and low-data regimes. In recent years, emerging fields such as meta-learning or self-supervised learning have been closing the gap between proof-of-concept results and real-life applications of machine learning by extending deep-learning to the semi-supervised and few-shot domains. We follow this line of work and explore spatio-temporal structure in a recently introduced image-to-image translation problem in order to: i) formulate a novel multi-task few-shot image generation benchmark and ii) explore data augmentations in contrastive pre-training for image translation downstream tasks. We present several baselines for the few-shot problem and discuss trade-offs between different approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/irugina/meta-image-translation.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning, in particular enabled by hardware advances and big data, have provided impressive results across a wide range of computational problems such as computer vision, natural language, or reinforcement learning. Many of these improvements are however constrained to problems with large-scale curated data-sets which require a lot of human labor to gather. Additionally, these models tend to generalize poorly under both slight distributional shifts and low-data regimes. In recent years, emerging fields such as meta-learning or self-supervised learning have been closing the gap between proof-of-concept results and real-life applications of machine learning by extending deep-learning to the semi-supervised and few-shot domains. We follow this line of work and explore spatio-temporal structure in a recently introduced image-to-image translation problem in order to: i) formulate a novel multi-task few-shot image generation benchmark and ii) explore data augmentations in contrastive pre-training for image translation downstream tasks. We present several baselines for the few-shot problem and discuss trade-offs between different approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/irugina/meta-image-translation.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展，特别是在硬件进步和大数据的推动下，在计算机视觉、自然语言或强化学习等广泛的计算问题上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，其中许多改进仅限于需要大量人力来收集的大规模精选数据集的问题。此外，这些模型在轻微的分布变化和低数据情况下往往泛化能力较差。近年来，元学习或自监督学习等新兴领域通过将深度学习扩展到半监督和少样本领域，缩小了机器学习的概念验证结果与实际应用之间的差距。我们遵循这一工作思路，在最近引入的图像到图像翻译问题中探索时空结构，以便：i）制定一种新颖的多任务少镜头图像生成基准，ii）探索图像翻译下游任务的对比预训练中的数据增强。我们提出了少数样本问题的几个基线，并讨论了不同方法之间的权衡。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/irugina/meta-image-translation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过元学习和自监督预训练方法，解决现实世界图像翻译中的小样本学习问题，并构建多任务小样本图像生成基准。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型依赖大规模标注数据且泛化能力差，难以适应现实场景中的分布变化和低数据情况。元学习和自监督学习为半监督和小样本领域提供了新思路，需探索其在图像翻译中的应用。
AI.method: 提出多任务小样本图像生成基准，结合对比预训练与数据增强技术，探索不同方法在图像翻译任务中的性能权衡，并提供多个基线模型进行比较。
AI.result: 构建了新的基准并验证了方法有效性，代码已开源，但具体性能指标未在摘要中明确说明。
AI.conclusion: 元学习与自监督预训练能有效提升图像翻译在小样本场景下的泛化能力，为现实应用提供了可行的技术路径。

tldr: 本文旨在通过元学习和自监督预训练方法，解决现实世界图像翻译中的小样本学习问题，并构建多任务小样本图像生成基准。
motivation: 传统深度学习模型依赖大规模标注数据且泛化能力差，难以适应现实场景中的分布变化和低数据情况。元学习和自监督学习为半监督和小样本领域提供了新思路，需探索其在图像翻译中的应用。
method: 提出多任务小样本图像生成基准，结合对比预训练与数据增强技术，探索不同方法在图像翻译任务中的性能权衡，并提供多个基线模型进行比较。
result: 构建了新的基准并验证了方法有效性，代码已开源，但具体性能指标未在摘要中明确说明。
conclusion: 元学习与自监督预训练能有效提升图像翻译在小样本场景下的泛化能力，为现实应用提供了可行的技术路径。
search_text: Meta-Learning and Self-Supervised Pretraining for Real World Image Translation 现实世界图像翻译的元学习和自监督预训练 Recent advances in deep learning, in particular enabled by hardware advances and big data, have provided impressive results across a wide range of computational problems such as computer vision, natural language, or reinforcement learning. Many of these improvements are however constrained to problems with large-scale curated data-sets which require a lot of human labor to gather. Additionally, these models tend to generalize poorly under both slight distributional shifts and low-data regimes. In recent years, emerging fields such as meta-learning or self-supervised learning have been closing the gap between proof-of-concept results and real-life applications of machine learning by extending deep-learning to the semi-supervised and few-shot domains. We follow this line of work and explore spatio-temporal structure in a recently introduced image-to-image translation problem in order to: i) formulate a novel multi-task few-shot image generation benchmark and ii) explore data augmentations in contrastive pre-training for image translation downstream tasks. We present several baselines for the few-shot problem and discuss trade-offs between different approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/irugina/meta-image-translation. 深度学习的最新进展，特别是在硬件进步和大数据的推动下，在计算机视觉、自然语言或强化学习等广泛的计算问题上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，其中许多改进仅限于需要大量人力来收集的大规模精选数据集的问题。此外，这些模型在轻微的分布变化和低数据情况下往往泛化能力较差。近年来，元学习或自监督学习等新兴领域通过将深度学习扩展到半监督和少样本领域，缩小了机器学习的概念验证结果与实际应用之间的差距。我们遵循这一工作思路，在最近引入的图像到图像翻译问题中探索时空结构，以便：i）制定一种新颖的多任务少镜头图像生成基准，ii）探索图像翻译下游任务的对比预训练中的数据增强。我们提出了少数样本问题的几个基线，并讨论了不同方法之间的权衡。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/irugina/meta-image-translation 获取。 本文旨在通过元学习和自监督预训练方法，解决现实世界图像翻译中的小样本学习问题，并构建多任务小样本图像生成基准。 Ileana Rugina,Rumen Dangovski,Mark Veillette,Pooya Khorrami,Brian Cheung,Olga Simek,Marin Soljačić cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Dijkstras algorithm with predictions to solve the single-source many-targets shortest-path problem
title_zh: 带预测的 Dijkstras 算法解决单源多目标最短路径问题
abstract: We study the use of machine learning techniques to solve a fundamental shortest path problem, known as the single-source many-targets shortest path problem (SSMTSP). Given a directed graph with non-negative edge weights, our goal is to compute a shortest path from a given source node to any of several target nodes. Basically, our idea is to equip an adapted version of Dijkstras algorithm with machine learning predictions to solve this problem: Based on the trace of the algorithm, we design a neural network that predicts the shortest path distance after a few iterations. The prediction is then used to prune the search space explored by Dijkstras algorithm, which may significantly reduce the number of operations on the underlying priority queue. We note that our algorithm works independently of the specific method that is used to arrive at such predictions. Crucially, we require that our algorithm always computes an optimal solution (independently of the accuracy of the prediction) and provides a certificate of optimality. As we show, in the worst-case this might force our algorithm to use the same number of queue operations as Dijkstras algorithm, even if the prediction is correct. In general, however, our algorithm may save a significant fraction of the priority queue operations. We derive structural insights that allow us to lower bound these savings on partial random instances. In these instances, an adversary can fix the instance arbitrarily except for the weights of a subset of relevant edges, which are chosen randomly. Our bound shows that the number of relevant edges which are pruned increases as the prediction error decreases. We then use these insights to derive closed-form expressions of the expected number of saved queue operations on random instances.
summary: We study the use of machine learning techniques to solve a fundamental shortest path problem, known as the single-source many-targets shortest path problem (SSMTSP). Given a directed graph with non-negative edge weights, our goal is to compute a shortest path from a given source node to any of several target nodes. Basically, our idea is to equip an adapted version of Dijkstras algorithm with machine learning predictions to solve this problem: Based on the trace of the algorithm, we design a neural network that predicts the shortest path distance after a few iterations. The prediction is then used to prune the search space explored by Dijkstras algorithm, which may significantly reduce the number of operations on the underlying priority queue. We note that our algorithm works independently of the specific method that is used to arrive at such predictions. Crucially, we require that our algorithm always computes an optimal solution (independently of the accuracy of the prediction) and provides a certificate of optimality. As we show, in the worst-case this might force our algorithm to use the same number of queue operations as Dijkstras algorithm, even if the prediction is correct. In general, however, our algorithm may save a significant fraction of the priority queue operations. We derive structural insights that allow us to lower bound these savings on partial random instances. In these instances, an adversary can fix the instance arbitrarily except for the weights of a subset of relevant edges, which are chosen randomly. Our bound shows that the number of relevant edges which are pruned increases as the prediction error decreases. We then use these insights to derive closed-form expressions of the expected number of saved queue operations on random instances.
abstract_zh: 我们研究使用机器学习技术来解决基本的最短路径问题，称为单源多目标最短路径问题（SSMTSP）。给定一个具有非负边权重的有向图，我们的目标是计算从给定源节点到多个目标节点中任意一个的最短路径。基本上，我们的想法是为 Dijkstras 算法的改编版本配备机器学习预测来解决这个问题：根据算法的轨迹，我们设计一个神经网络，在几次迭代后预测最短路径距离。然后使用该预测来修剪 Dijkstras 算法探索的搜索空间，这可能会显着减少底层优先级队列上的操作数量。我们注意到，我们的算法的工作独立于用于达成此类预测的特定方法。至关重要的是，我们要求我们的算法始终计算最佳解决方案（与预测的准确性无关）并提供最佳性证书。正如我们所展示的，在最坏的情况下，这可能会迫使我们的算法使用与 Dijkstras 算法相同数量的队列操作，即使预测是正确的。然而，一般来说，我们的算法可以节省很大一部分优先级队列操作。我们得出的结构见解使我们能够在部分随机实例上降低这些节省的限度。在这些情况下，除了随机选择的相关边子集的权重之外，对手可以任意修复实例。我们的界限表明，随着预测误差的减小，被修剪的相关边的数量会增加。然后，我们使用这些见解来导出随机实例上保存的队列操作的预期数量的封闭式表达式。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用机器学习技术改进Dijkstra算法，以解决单源多目标最短路径问题（SSMTSP），通过预测缩短搜索空间。
AI.motivation: 传统Dijkstra算法在处理多目标最短路径问题时效率较低，而机器学习预测可能提供更高效的搜索空间剪枝方法。
AI.method: 基于Dijkstra算法的执行轨迹设计神经网络，预测最短路径距离并用于剪枝优先队列，确保算法始终输出最优解。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在随机实例中可显著减少优先队列操作次数，且预测误差越小，剪枝效果越明显。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持最优性的同时，通过机器学习预测有效提升了SSMTSP的求解效率，尤其适用于预测精度较高的场景。

title: Variational Quantum Soft Actor-Critic
title_zh: 变分量子软演员评论家
abstract: Quantum computing has a superior advantage in tackling specific problems, such as integer factorization and Simon's problem. For more general tasks in machine learning, by applying variational quantum circuits, more and more quantum algorithms have been proposed recently, especially in supervised learning and unsupervised learning. However, little work has been done in reinforcement learning, arguably more important and challenging. Previous work in quantum reinforcement learning mainly focuses on discrete control tasks where the action space is discrete. In this work, we develop a quantum reinforcement learning algorithm based on soft actor-critic -- one of the state-of-the-art methods for continuous control. Specifically, we use a hybrid quantum-classical policy network consisting of a variational quantum circuit and a classical artificial neural network. Tested in a standard reinforcement learning benchmark, we show that this quantum version of soft actor-critic is comparable with the original soft actor-critic, using much less adjustable parameters. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of different hyper-parameters and policy network architectures, pointing out the importance of architecture design for quantum reinforcement learning.
summary: Quantum computing has a superior advantage in tackling specific problems, such as integer factorization and Simon's problem. For more general tasks in machine learning, by applying variational quantum circuits, more and more quantum algorithms have been proposed recently, especially in supervised learning and unsupervised learning. However, little work has been done in reinforcement learning, arguably more important and challenging. Previous work in quantum reinforcement learning mainly focuses on discrete control tasks where the action space is discrete. In this work, we develop a quantum reinforcement learning algorithm based on soft actor-critic -- one of the state-of-the-art methods for continuous control. Specifically, we use a hybrid quantum-classical policy network consisting of a variational quantum circuit and a classical artificial neural network. Tested in a standard reinforcement learning benchmark, we show that this quantum version of soft actor-critic is comparable with the original soft actor-critic, using much less adjustable parameters. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of different hyper-parameters and policy network architectures, pointing out the importance of architecture design for quantum reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 量子计算在解决特定问题上具有超强的优势，例如整数分解和西蒙问题。对于机器学习中更通用的任务，通过应用变分量子电路，最近提出了越来越多的量子算法，特别是在监督学习和无监督学习方面。然而，强化学习方面的工作却很少，可以说，强化学习更重要，也更具挑战性。量子强化学习的先前工作主要集中在动作空间离散的离散控制任务上。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种基于软演员批评家的量子强化学习算法——最先进的连续控制方法之一。具体来说，我们使用由变分量子电路和经典人工神经网络组成的混合量子经典策略网络。在标准强化学习基准测试中，我们表明这种量子版本的软演员批评家与原始的软演员批评家相当，但使用的可调节参数要少得多。此外，我们分析了不同超参数和策略网络架构的效果，指出架构设计对于量子强化学习的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分量子电路的量子强化学习算法，用于连续控制任务，并在标准基准测试中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管量子计算在特定问题上具有优势，但其在强化学习领域尤其是连续控制任务中的应用仍较为有限，现有工作多集中于离散动作空间。
AI.method: 设计了一种混合量子-经典策略网络，结合变分量子电路与经典神经网络，基于软演员-评论家（Soft Actor-Critic）框架实现量子强化学习。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，该量子版本的软演员-评论家算法性能与经典版本相当，但可调参数显著减少，同时分析了超参数和网络架构的影响。
AI.conclusion: 量子电路在强化学习中具有潜力，但需重视架构设计以充分发挥其优势。

In this work, we develop a quantum reinforcement learning algorithm based on soft actor-critic -- one of the state-of-the-art methods for continuous control. Specifically, we use a hybrid quantum-classical policy network consisting of a variational quantum circuit and a classical artificial neural network. Tested in a standard reinforcement learning benchmark, we show that this quantum version of soft actor-critic is comparable with the original soft actor-critic, using much less adjustable parameters. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of different hyper-parameters and policy network architectures, pointing out the importance of architecture design for quantum reinforcement learning. 量子计算在解决特定问题上具有超强的优势，例如整数分解和西蒙问题。对于机器学习中更通用的任务，通过应用变分量子电路，最近提出了越来越多的量子算法，特别是在监督学习和无监督学习方面。然而，强化学习方面的工作却很少，可以说，强化学习更重要，也更具挑战性。量子强化学习的先前工作主要集中在动作空间离散的离散控制任务上。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种基于软演员批评家的量子强化学习算法——最先进的连续控制方法之一。具体来说，我们使用由变分量子电路和经典人工神经网络组成的混合量子经典策略网络。在标准强化学习基准测试中，我们表明这种量子版本的软演员批评家与原始的软演员批评家相当，但使用的可调节参数要少得多。此外，我们分析了不同超参数和策略网络架构的效果，指出架构设计对于量子强化学习的重要性。 本文提出了一种基于变分量子电路的量子强化学习算法，用于连续控制任务，并在标准基准测试中验证了其有效性。 Qingfeng Lan quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hazel Kim,Daecheol Woo,Seong Joon Oh,Jeong-Won Cha,Yo-Sub Han
title: ALP: Data Augmentation using Lexicalized PCFGs for Few-Shot Text Classification
title_zh: ALP：使用词汇化 PCFG 进行少样本文本分类的数据增强
abstract: Data augmentation has been an important ingredient for boosting performances of learned models. Prior data augmentation methods for few-shot text classification have led to great performance boosts. However, they have not been designed to capture the intricate compositional structure of natural language. As a result, they fail to generate samples with plausible and diverse sentence structures. Motivated by this, we present the data Augmentation using Lexicalized Probabilistic context-free grammars (ALP) that generates augmented samples with diverse syntactic structures with plausible grammar. The lexicalized PCFG parse trees consider both the constituents and dependencies to produce a syntactic frame that maximizes a variety of word choices in a syntactically preservable manner without specific domain experts. Experiments on few-shot text classification tasks demonstrate that ALP enhances many state-of-the-art classification methods. As a second contribution, we delve into the train-val splitting methodologies when a data augmentation method comes into play. We argue empirically that the traditional splitting of training and validation sets is sub-optimal compared to our novel augmentation-based splitting strategies that further expand the training split with the same number of labeled data. Taken together, our contributions on the data augmentation strategies yield a strong training recipe for few-shot text classification tasks.
summary: Data augmentation has been an important ingredient for boosting performances of learned models. Prior data augmentation methods for few-shot text classification have led to great performance boosts. However, they have not been designed to capture the intricate compositional structure of natural language. As a result, they fail to generate samples with plausible and diverse sentence structures. Motivated by this, we present the data Augmentation using Lexicalized Probabilistic context-free grammars (ALP) that generates augmented samples with diverse syntactic structures with plausible grammar. The lexicalized PCFG parse trees consider both the constituents and dependencies to produce a syntactic frame that maximizes a variety of word choices in a syntactically preservable manner without specific domain experts. Experiments on few-shot text classification tasks demonstrate that ALP enhances many state-of-the-art classification methods. As a second contribution, we delve into the train-val splitting methodologies when a data augmentation method comes into play. We argue empirically that the traditional splitting of training and validation sets is sub-optimal compared to our novel augmentation-based splitting strategies that further expand the training split with the same number of labeled data. Taken together, our contributions on the data augmentation strategies yield a strong training recipe for few-shot text classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 数据增强一直是提高学习模型性能的重要因素。先前用于少量文本分类的数据增强方法已经带来了巨大的性能提升。然而，它们并不是为了捕捉自然语言复杂的组成结构而设计的。结果，他们无法生成具有合理且多样化的句子结构的样本。受此启发，我们使用词汇化概率上下文无关语法（ALP）来呈现数据增强，它生成具有不同句法结构和合理语法的增强样本。词汇化的 PCFG 解析树考虑了成分和依赖关系，以生成一个句法框架，该句法框架以句法上可保留的方式最大化各种单词选择，而无需特定的领域专家。对少量文本分类任务的实验表明，ALP 增强了许多最先进的分类方法。作为第二个贡献，我们深入研究了数据增强方法发挥作用时的训练-验证分割方法。我们根据经验认为，与我们新颖的基于增强的分割策略（使用相同数量的标记数据进一步扩展训练分割）相比，传统的训练集和验证集分割并不是最优的。总而言之，我们对数据增强策略的贡献为少量文本分类任务提供了强大的训练方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ALP方法，利用词化PCFG进行数据增强，以提升少样本文本分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法未能捕捉自然语言的复杂句法结构，导致生成的样本句法结构单一且不够合理。
AI.method: 基于词化PCFG生成多样化句法结构的增强样本，并设计新的训练-验证集划分策略以优化数据利用。
AI.result: 实验表明ALP方法显著提升多种先进分类模型的少样本分类效果，并验证了新划分策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ALP通过语法感知的数据增强和优化的数据划分策略，为少样本文本分类提供了更有效的训练方案。

authors_text: Xueying Zhang,Yanyan Zou,Hainan Zhang,Jing Zhou,Shiliang Diao,Jiajia Chen,Zhuoye Ding,Zhen He,Xueqi He,Yun Xiao,Bo Long,Han Yu,Lingfei Wu
title: Automatic Product Copywriting for E-Commerce
title_zh: 电子商务自动产品文案
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2022/IAAI 2022 under the track of "Highly Innovative Applications of AI"
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2022/IAAI 2022 under the track of "Highly Innovative Applications of AI"
abstract: Product copywriting is a critical component of e-commerce recommendation platforms. It aims to attract users' interest and improve user experience by highlighting product characteristics with textual descriptions. In this paper, we report our experience deploying the proposed Automatic Product Copywriting Generation (APCG) system into the JD.com e-commerce product recommendation platform. It consists of two main components: 1) natural language generation, which is built from a transformer-pointer network and a pre-trained sequence-to-sequence model based on millions of training data from our in-house platform; and 2) copywriting quality control, which is based on both automatic evaluation and human screening. For selected domains, the models are trained and updated daily with the updated training data. In addition, the model is also used as a real-time writing assistant tool on our live broadcast platform. The APCG system has been deployed in JD.com since Feb 2021. By Sep 2021, it has generated 2.53 million product descriptions, and improved the overall averaged click-through rate (CTR) and the Conversion Rate (CVR) by 4.22% and 3.61%, compared to baselines, respectively on a year-on-year basis. The accumulated Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) made by our system is improved by 213.42%, compared to the number in Feb 2021.
summary: Product copywriting is a critical component of e-commerce recommendation platforms. It aims to attract users' interest and improve user experience by highlighting product characteristics with textual descriptions. In this paper, we report our experience deploying the proposed Automatic Product Copywriting Generation (APCG) system into the JD.com e-commerce product recommendation platform. It consists of two main components: 1) natural language generation, which is built from a transformer-pointer network and a pre-trained sequence-to-sequence model based on millions of training data from our in-house platform; and 2) copywriting quality control, which is based on both automatic evaluation and human screening. For selected domains, the models are trained and updated daily with the updated training data. In addition, the model is also used as a real-time writing assistant tool on our live broadcast platform. The APCG system has been deployed in JD.com since Feb 2021. By Sep 2021, it has generated 2.53 million product descriptions, and improved the overall averaged click-through rate (CTR) and the Conversion Rate (CVR) by 4.22% and 3.61%, compared to baselines, respectively on a year-on-year basis. The accumulated Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) made by our system is improved by 213.42%, compared to the number in Feb 2021.
abstract_zh: 产品文案是电商推荐平台的重要组成部分。旨在通过文字描述突出产品特性，吸引用户兴趣，提升用户体验。在本文中，我们报告了将所提出的自动产品文案生成（APCG）系统部署到京东电子商务产品推荐平台的经验。它由两个主要部分组成：1）自然语言生成，它是由变压器指针网络和基于我们内部平台的数百万训练数据的预训练序列到序列模型构建的； 2）文案质量控制，基于自动评估和人工筛选。对于选定的领域，模型每天都会使用更新的训练数据进行训练和更新。此外，该模型还被用作我们直播平台上的实时写作辅助工具。 APCG系统自2021年2月开始在京东部署，截至2021年9月，已生成商品描述253万条，整体平均点击率（CTR）和转化率（CVR）同比分别提升4.22%和3.61%。与2021年2月相比，我们系统累计的商品交易总额（GMV）提高了213.42%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并部署了自动产品文案生成系统(APCG)，用于提升电商推荐平台的产品描述生成效率与质量。
AI.motivation: 产品文案是电商推荐平台吸引用户和提升体验的关键，传统人工撰写效率低且成本高，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 系统包含两部分：基于Transformer-pointer网络和预训练序列模型的自然语言生成模块，以及结合自动评估与人工筛选的质量控制模块。模型每日更新并应用于直播平台实时辅助写作。
AI.result: 部署后生成253万条产品描述，年同比提升点击率4.22%、转化率3.61%，GMV累计增长213.42%。
AI.conclusion: APCG系统通过自动化生成与持续优化有效提升了电商核心指标，验证了自动文案生成在实际场景中的商业价值。

title: Assisted Text Annotation Using Active Learning to Achieve High Quality with Little Effort
title_zh: 使用主动学习的辅助文本注释轻松实现高质量
abstract: Large amounts of annotated data have become more important than ever, especially since the rise of deep learning techniques. However, manual annotations are costly. We propose a tool that enables researchers to create large, high-quality, annotated datasets with only a few manual annotations, thus strongly reducing annotation cost and effort. For this purpose, we combine an active learning (AL) approach with a pre-trained language model to semi-automatically identify annotation categories in the given text documents. To highlight our research direction's potential, we evaluate the approach on the task of identifying frames in news articles. Our preliminary results show that employing AL strongly reduces the number of annotations for correct classification of even these complex and subtle frames. On the framing dataset, the AL approach needs only 16.3\% of the annotations to reach the same performance as a model trained on the full dataset.
summary: Large amounts of annotated data have become more important than ever, especially since the rise of deep learning techniques. However, manual annotations are costly. For this purpose, we combine an active learning (AL) approach with a pre-trained language model to semi-automatically identify annotation categories in the given text documents. To highlight our research direction's potential, we evaluate the approach on the task of identifying frames in news articles. Our preliminary results show that employing AL strongly reduces the number of annotations for correct classification of even these complex and subtle frames. On the framing dataset, the AL approach needs only 16.3\% of the annotations to reach the same performance as a model trained on the full dataset.
abstract_zh: 大量带注释的数据变得比以往任何时候都更加重要，特别是自从深度学习技术兴起以来。然而，手动注释的成本很高。我们提出了一种工具，使研究人员只需少量手动注释即可创建大型、高质量的注释数据集，从而大大降低注释成本和工作量。为此，我们将主动学习（AL）方法与预训练的语言模型相结合，以半自动地识别给定文本文档中的注释类别。为了突出我们的研究方向的潜力，我们评估了识别新闻文章中的框架任务的方法。我们的初步结果表明，即使是这些复杂而微妙的帧，使用 AL 也能大大减少正确分类所需的注释数量。在框架数据集上，AL 方法仅需要 16.3% 的注释即可达到与在完整数据集上训练的模型相同的性能。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合主动学习和预训练语言模型的工具，以最小的手动标注量生成高质量的标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 手动标注成本高昂，而深度学习需要大量标注数据，因此需要更高效的方法来减少标注工作量。
AI.method: 结合主动学习（AL）与预训练语言模型，半自动识别文本中的标注类别，应用于新闻文章框架识别任务。
AI.result: 在框架数据集上，AL方法仅需16.3%的标注量即可达到全数据集训练模型的相同性能。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习显著减少标注需求，证明了在保证质量的前提下降低标注成本的可行性。

search_text: Assisted Text Annotation Using Active Learning to Achieve High Quality with Little Effort 使用主动学习的辅助文本注释轻松实现高质量 Large amounts of annotated data have become more important than ever, especially since the rise of deep learning techniques. However, manual annotations are costly. We propose a tool that enables researchers to create large, high-quality, annotated datasets with only a few manual annotations, thus strongly reducing annotation cost and effort. For this purpose, we combine an active learning (AL) approach with a pre-trained language model to semi-automatically identify annotation categories in the given text documents. To highlight our research direction's potential, we evaluate the approach on the task of identifying frames in news articles. Our preliminary results show that employing AL strongly reduces the number of annotations for correct classification of even these complex and subtle frames. On the framing dataset, the AL approach needs only 16.3\% of the annotations to reach the same performance as a model trained on the full dataset. 大量带注释的数据变得比以往任何时候都更加重要，特别是自从深度学习技术兴起以来。然而，手动注释的成本很高。我们提出了一种工具，使研究人员只需少量手动注释即可创建大型、高质量的注释数据集，从而大大降低注释成本和工作量。为此，我们将主动学习（AL）方法与预训练的语言模型相结合，以半自动地识别给定文本文档中的注释类别。为了突出我们的研究方向的潜力，我们评估了识别新闻文章中的框架任务的方法。我们的初步结果表明，即使是这些复杂而微妙的帧，使用 AL 也能大大减少正确分类所需的注释数量。在框架数据集上，AL 方法仅需要 16.3% 的注释即可达到与在完整数据集上训练的模型相同的性能。 开发一种结合主动学习和预训练语言模型的工具，以最小的手动标注量生成高质量的标注数据集。 Franziska Weeber,Felix Hamborg,Karsten Donnay,Bela Gipp cs.DL,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Maartje ter Hoeve,Evgeny Kharitonov,Dieuwke Hupkes,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: Towards Interactive Language Modeling
title_zh: 迈向交互式语言建模
abstract: Interaction between caregivers and children plays a critical role in human language acquisition and development. Given this observation, it is remarkable that explicit interaction plays little to no role in artificial language modeling -- which also targets the acquisition of human language, yet by artificial models. Moreover, an interactive approach to language modeling has the potential to make language models substantially more versatile and to considerably impact downstream applications. Motivated by these considerations, we pioneer the space of interactive language modeling. As a first contribution we present a road map in which we detail the steps that need to be taken towards interactive language modeling. We then lead by example and take the first steps on this road map, showing the initial feasibility of our approach. As such, this work aims to be the start of a larger research agenda on interactive language modeling.
summary: Interaction between caregivers and children plays a critical role in human language acquisition and development. Given this observation, it is remarkable that explicit interaction plays little to no role in artificial language modeling -- which also targets the acquisition of human language, yet by artificial models. Moreover, an interactive approach to language modeling has the potential to make language models substantially more versatile and to considerably impact downstream applications. Motivated by these considerations, we pioneer the space of interactive language modeling. As a first contribution we present a road map in which we detail the steps that need to be taken towards interactive language modeling. We then lead by example and take the first steps on this road map, showing the initial feasibility of our approach. As such, this work aims to be the start of a larger research agenda on interactive language modeling.
abstract_zh: 照顾者和儿童之间的互动在人类语言习得和发展中起着至关重要的作用。鉴于这一观察结果，值得注意的是，显式交互在人工语言建模中几乎没有发挥任何作用——人工语言建模的目标也是通过人工模型获取人类语言。此外，语言建模的交互式方法有可能使语言模型更加通用，并显着影响下游应用程序。出于这些考虑，我们开创了交互式语言建模领域。作为第一个贡献，我们提出了一个路线图，其中详细说明了交互式语言建模所需采取的步骤。然后，我们以身作则，并在此路线图上迈出了第一步，展示了我们方法的初步可行性。因此，这项工作旨在成为交互式语言建模更大研究议程的开始。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索交互式语言建模的新方向，通过模拟人类语言习得中的互动机制，提升语言模型的灵活性和应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 人类语言习得依赖于互动，但现有语言模型缺乏显式交互机制，限制了其适应性和应用效果，因此需探索交互式建模方法。
AI.method: 提出交互式语言建模的路线图，通过框架设计和初步实验验证方法的可行性，为后续研究奠定基础。
AI.result: 证明了交互式语言建模的初步可行性，展示了该方法在理论和实现上的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文为交互式语言建模领域开辟了研究方向，未来需进一步探索其技术细节和实际应用价值。

title: Few-shot Multi-hop Question Answering over Knowledge Base
title_zh: 基于知识库的少样本多跳问答
abstract: KBQA is a task that requires to answer questions by using semantic structured information in knowledge base. Previous work in this area has been restricted due to the lack of large semantic parsing dataset and the exponential growth of searching space with the increasing hops of relation paths. In this paper, we propose an efficient pipeline method equipped with a pre-trained language model. By adopting Beam Search algorithm, the searching space will not be restricted in subgraph of 3 hops. Besides, we propose a data generation strategy, which enables our model to generalize well from few training samples. We evaluate our model on an open-domain complex Chinese Question Answering task CCKS2019 and achieve F1-score of 62.55% on the test dataset. In addition, in order to test the few-shot learning capability of our model, we ramdomly select 10% of the primary data to train our model, the result shows that our model can still achieves F1-score of 58.54%, which verifies the capability of our model to process KBQA task and the advantage in few-shot Learning.
summary: KBQA is a task that requires to answer questions by using semantic structured information in knowledge base. Previous work in this area has been restricted due to the lack of large semantic parsing dataset and the exponential growth of searching space with the increasing hops of relation paths. In this paper, we propose an efficient pipeline method equipped with a pre-trained language model. By adopting Beam Search algorithm, the searching space will not be restricted in subgraph of 3 hops. Besides, we propose a data generation strategy, which enables our model to generalize well from few training samples. We evaluate our model on an open-domain complex Chinese Question Answering task CCKS2019 and achieve F1-score of 62.55% on the test dataset. In addition, in order to test the few-shot learning capability of our model, we ramdomly select 10% of the primary data to train our model, the result shows that our model can still achieves F1-score of 58.54%, which verifies the capability of our model to process KBQA task and the advantage in few-shot Learning.
abstract_zh: KBQA是一项需要利用知识库中的语义结构化信息来回答问题的任务。由于缺乏大型语义解析数据集以及搜索空间随着关系路径跳数的增加呈指数增长，该领域的先前工作受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种配备预训练语言模型的高效管道方法。通过采用Beam Search算法，搜索空间不会被限制在3跳的子图中。此外，我们提出了一种数据生成策略，使我们的模型能够从少量训练样本中很好地泛化。我们在开放域复杂中文问答任务 CCKS2019 上评估我们的模型，并在测试数据集上实现 62.55% 的 F1 分数。此外，为了测试我们模型的少样本学习能力，我们随机选择10%的原始数据来训练我们的模型，结果表明我们的模型仍然可以达到58.54%的F1分数，这验证了我们的模型处理KBQA任务的能力以及少样本学习的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练语言模型的高效管道方法，解决知识库多跳问答中的搜索空间爆炸和数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统KBQA方法受限于语义解析数据集匮乏及多跳关系路径导致的搜索空间指数增长问题。
AI.method: 结合预训练语言模型与束搜索算法扩展搜索空间，采用数据生成策略提升少样本学习能力。
AI.result: 在CCKS2019测试集上达到62.55% F1分数，使用10%训练数据时仍保持58.54% F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了KBQA任务的搜索空间限制问题，在少样本场景下具有显著优势。

authors_text: Song Park,Sanghyuk Chun,Junbum Cha,Bado Lee,Hyunjung Shim
title: Few-shot Font Generation with Weakly Supervised Localized Representations
title_zh: 具有弱监督本地化表示的少量字体生成
comment: First two authors contributed equally. This is a journal extension of our AAAI 2021 paper arXiv:2009.11042; Code: https://github.com/clovaai/lffont and https://github.com/clovaai/fewshot-font-generation
comments: First two authors contributed equally. This is a journal extension of our AAAI 2021 paper arXiv:2009.11042; Code: https://github.com/clovaai/lffont and https://github.com/clovaai/fewshot-font-generation
abstract: Automatic few-shot font generation aims to solve a well-defined, real-world problem because manual font designs are expensive and sensitive to the expertise of designers. Existing methods learn to disentangle style and content elements by developing a universal style representation for each font style. However, this approach limits the model in representing diverse local styles, because it is unsuitable for complicated letter systems, for example, Chinese, whose characters consist of a varying number of components (often called "radical") -- with a highly complex structure. In this paper, we propose a novel font generation method that learns localized styles, namely component-wise style representations, instead of universal styles. The proposed style representations enable the synthesis of complex local details in text designs. However, learning component-wise styles solely from a few reference glyphs is infeasible when a target script has a large number of components, for example, over 200 for Chinese. To reduce the number of required reference glyphs, we represent component-wise styles by a product of component and style factors, inspired by low-rank matrix factorization. Owing to the combination of strong representation and a compact factorization strategy, our method shows remarkably better few-shot font generation results (with only eight reference glyphs) than other state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, strong locality supervision, for example, location of each component, skeleton, or strokes, was not utilized. The source code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/lffont and https://github.com/clovaai/fewshot-font-generation.
summary: Automatic few-shot font generation aims to solve a well-defined, real-world problem because manual font designs are expensive and sensitive to the expertise of designers. Existing methods learn to disentangle style and content elements by developing a universal style representation for each font style. However, this approach limits the model in representing diverse local styles, because it is unsuitable for complicated letter systems, for example, Chinese, whose characters consist of a varying number of components (often called "radical") -- with a highly complex structure. In this paper, we propose a novel font generation method that learns localized styles, namely component-wise style representations, instead of universal styles. The proposed style representations enable the synthesis of complex local details in text designs. However, learning component-wise styles solely from a few reference glyphs is infeasible when a target script has a large number of components, for example, over 200 for Chinese. To reduce the number of required reference glyphs, we represent component-wise styles by a product of component and style factors, inspired by low-rank matrix factorization. Owing to the combination of strong representation and a compact factorization strategy, our method shows remarkably better few-shot font generation results (with only eight reference glyphs) than other state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, strong locality supervision, for example, location of each component, skeleton, or strokes, was not utilized. The source code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/lffont and https://github.com/clovaai/fewshot-font-generation.
abstract_zh: 自动小样本字体生成旨在解决明确定义的现实问题，因为手动字体设计成本高昂且对设计人员的专业知识敏感。现有方法通过为每种字体样式开发通用样式表示来学习分离样式和内容元素。然而，这种方法限制了模型代表不同的地方风格，因为它不适合复杂的字母系统，例如中文，其字符由不同数量的组件（通常称为“部首”）组成，具有高度复杂的结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的字体生成方法，该方法可以学习本地化样式，即组件式样式表示，而不是通用样式。所提出的样式表示能够在文本设计中合成复杂的局部细节。然而，当目标脚本具有大量组件（例如中文超过 200 个）时，仅从几个参考字形学习组件样式是不可行的。为了减少所需参考字形的数量，受低秩矩阵分解的启发，我们通过组件和样式因子的乘积来表示组件样式。由于强表示和紧凑分解策略的结合，我们的方法显示出比其他最先进的方法更好的少样本字体生成结果（只有八个参考字形）。此外，没有利用强大的局部性监督，例如每个组件、骨架或笔划的位置。源代码可在 https://github.com/clovaai/lffont 和 https://github.com/clovaai/fewshot-font- Generation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部化风格表示的少样本字体生成方法，解决复杂文字系统（如汉字）的字体生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用统一风格表示难以处理汉字等复杂文字系统的局部多样性，需设计能捕捉组件级风格的生成模型。
AI.method: 通过组件级风格分解与低秩矩阵因子化策略，将组件特征与风格因子相乘表示局部样式，减少参考字形需求。
AI.result: 在仅使用8个参考字形的情况下，生成效果优于现有最佳方法，且无需强局部监督信息。
AI.conclusion: 局部化风格表示结合紧凑分解策略有效提升了复杂文字系统的少样本字体生成能力。

authors_text: Dave Murray-Rust,Chris Elsden,Bettina Nissen,Ella Tallyn,Larissa Pschetz,Chris Speed
title: Blockchain and Beyond: Understanding Blockchains through Prototypes and Public Engagement
title_zh: 区块链及其他：通过原型和公众参与了解区块链
abstract: This paper presents an annotated portfolio of projects that seek to understand and communicate the social and societal implications of blockchains, distributed ledgers and smart contracts. These complex technologies rely on human and technical factors to deliver cryptocurrencies, shared computation and trustless protocols but have a secondary benefit in providing a moment to re-think many aspects of society, and imagine alternative possibilities. The projects use design and HCI methods to relate blockchains to a range of topics, including global supply chains, delivery infrastructure, smart grids, volunteering and charitable giving, through engaging publics, exploring ideas and speculating on possible futures. Based on an extensive annotated portfolio we draw out learning for the design of blockchain systems, broadening participation and surfacing questions around imaginaries, social implications and engagement with new technology. This paints a comprehensive picture of how HCI and design can shape understandings of the future of complex technologies.
summary: This paper presents an annotated portfolio of projects that seek to understand and communicate the social and societal implications of blockchains, distributed ledgers and smart contracts. These complex technologies rely on human and technical factors to deliver cryptocurrencies, shared computation and trustless protocols but have a secondary benefit in providing a moment to re-think many aspects of society, and imagine alternative possibilities. The projects use design and HCI methods to relate blockchains to a range of topics, including global supply chains, delivery infrastructure, smart grids, volunteering and charitable giving, through engaging publics, exploring ideas and speculating on possible futures. Based on an extensive annotated portfolio we draw out learning for the design of blockchain systems, broadening participation and surfacing questions around imaginaries, social implications and engagement with new technology. This paints a comprehensive picture of how HCI and design can shape understandings of the future of complex technologies.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个带注释的项目组合，旨在理解和传达区块链、分布式账本和智能合约的社会和社会影响。这些复杂的技术依赖于人力和技术因素来提供加密货币、共享计算和无需信任的协议，但其第二个好处是提供了重新思考社会许多方面并想象替代可能性的时刻。这些项目使用设计和人机交互方法，通过吸引公众、探索想法和推测可能的未来，将区块链与一系列主题联系起来，包括全球供应链、交付基础设施、智能电网、志愿服务和慈善捐赠。基于广泛的注释组合，我们为区块链系统的设计、扩大参与范围和围绕想象、社会影响和新技术参与的问题进行了学习。这全面描绘了人机交互和设计如何塑造对复杂技术未来的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过原型设计和公众参与，探讨区块链及其相关技术的社会影响，并提出设计原则与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 区块链技术涉及复杂的人机交互和社会影响，需通过设计方法帮助公众理解其潜在社会意义并探索替代性未来场景。
AI.method: 采用设计思维与人机交互（HCI）方法，结合公众参与项目，围绕供应链、智能电网等主题构建原型并分析社会影响。
AI.result: 总结出区块链系统设计的关键原则，提出扩大参与度的策略，并揭示技术想象与社会伦理的关联问题。
AI.conclusion: HCI与设计实践能有效引导公众理解复杂技术的社会影响，为未来技术发展提供更具包容性的方向。

title: Semantically enriched spatial modelling of industrial indoor environments enabling location-based services
title_zh: 工业室内环境的语义丰富的空间建模支持基于位置的服务
abstract: This paper presents a concept for a software system called RAIL representing industrial indoor environments in a dynamic spatial model, aimed at easing development and provision of location-based services. RAIL integrates data from different sensor modalities and additional contextual information through a unified interface. Approaches to environmental modelling from other domains are reviewed and analyzed for their suitability regarding the requirements for our target domains; intralogistics and production. Subsequently a novel way of modelling data representing indoor space, and an architecture for the software system are proposed.
summary: This paper presents a concept for a software system called RAIL representing industrial indoor environments in a dynamic spatial model, aimed at easing development and provision of location-based services. RAIL integrates data from different sensor modalities and additional contextual information through a unified interface. Approaches to environmental modelling from other domains are reviewed and analyzed for their suitability regarding the requirements for our target domains; intralogistics and production. Subsequently a novel way of modelling data representing indoor space, and an architecture for the software system are proposed.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 RAIL 的软件系统概念，以动态空间模型表示工业室内环境，旨在简化基于位置的服务的开发和提供。 RAIL 通过统一的界面集成来自不同传感器模式的数据和附加上下文信息。对其他领域的环境建模方法进行审查和分析，以确定它们是否适合我们目标领域的要求；内部物流和生产。随后提出了一种对表示室内空间的数据进行建模的新方法以及软件系统的体系结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为RAIL的软件系统，通过动态空间模型对工业室内环境进行语义增强建模，以支持位置服务的开发与应用。
AI.motivation: 工业物流和生产场景中，传统方法难以有效整合多源传感器数据和上下文信息，导致位置服务开发复杂且效率低下。
AI.method: 综述其他领域环境建模方法，分析其适用性后，提出结合语义信息的室内空间数据建模方式及RAIL软件系统架构。
AI.result: 构建了支持多模态数据融合的RAIL系统，通过统一接口实现工业室内环境动态建模，为位置服务提供基础支撑。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了工业场景下位置服务的数据整合难题，未来可进一步扩展至更多工业应用场景并优化模型实时性。

method: 综述其他领域环境建模方法，分析其适用性后，提出结合语义信息的室内空间数据建模方式及RAIL软件系统架构。
result: 构建了支持多模态数据融合的RAIL系统，通过统一接口实现工业室内环境动态建模，为位置服务提供基础支撑。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了工业场景下位置服务的数据整合难题，未来可进一步扩展至更多工业应用场景并优化模型实时性。
search_text: Semantically enriched spatial modelling of industrial indoor environments enabling location-based services 工业室内环境的语义丰富的空间建模支持基于位置的服务 This paper presents a concept for a software system called RAIL representing industrial indoor environments in a dynamic spatial model, aimed at easing development and provision of location-based services. RAIL integrates data from different sensor modalities and additional contextual information through a unified interface. Approaches to environmental modelling from other domains are reviewed and analyzed for their suitability regarding the requirements for our target domains; intralogistics and production. Subsequently a novel way of modelling data representing indoor space, and an architecture for the software system are proposed. 本文提出了一种名为 RAIL 的软件系统概念，以动态空间模型表示工业室内环境，旨在简化基于位置的服务的开发和提供。 RAIL 通过统一的界面集成来自不同传感器模式的数据和附加上下文信息。对其他领域的环境建模方法进行审查和分析，以确定它们是否适合我们目标领域的要求；内部物流和生产。随后提出了一种对表示室内空间的数据进行建模的新方法以及软件系统的体系结构。 本文提出名为RAIL的软件系统，通过动态空间模型对工业室内环境进行语义增强建模，以支持位置服务的开发与应用。 Arne Wendt,Michael Brand,Thorsten Schüppstuhl cs.RO

title: Geodesic squared exponential kernel for non-rigid shape registration
title_zh: 用于非刚性形状配准的测地线平方指数核
comment: 2021 16TH IEEE INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON AUTOMATIC FACE AND GESTURE RECOGNITION (FG 2021) PROCEEDINGS, Dec 2021, JODHPUR, India
comments: 2021 16TH IEEE INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON AUTOMATIC FACE AND GESTURE RECOGNITION (FG 2021) PROCEEDINGS, Dec 2021, JODHPUR, India
abstract: This work addresses the problem of non-rigid registration of 3D scans, which is at the core of shape modeling techniques. Firstly, we propose a new kernel based on geodesic distances for the Gaussian Process Morphable Models (GPMMs) framework. The use of geodesic distances into the kernel makes it more adapted to the topological and geometric characteristics of the surface and leads to more realistic deformations around holes and curved areas. Since the kernel possesses hyperparameters we have optimized them for the task of face registration on the FaceWarehouse dataset. We show that the Geodesic squared exponential kernel performs significantly better than state of the art kernels for the task of face registration on all the 20 expressions of the FaceWarehouse dataset. Secondly, we propose a modification of the loss function used in the non-rigid ICP registration algorithm, that allows to weight the correspondences according to the confidence given to them. As a use case, we show that we can make the registration more robust to outliers in the 3D scans, such as non-skin parts.
summary: This work addresses the problem of non-rigid registration of 3D scans, which is at the core of shape modeling techniques. Firstly, we propose a new kernel based on geodesic distances for the Gaussian Process Morphable Models (GPMMs) framework. The use of geodesic distances into the kernel makes it more adapted to the topological and geometric characteristics of the surface and leads to more realistic deformations around holes and curved areas. Since the kernel possesses hyperparameters we have optimized them for the task of face registration on the FaceWarehouse dataset. We show that the Geodesic squared exponential kernel performs significantly better than state of the art kernels for the task of face registration on all the 20 expressions of the FaceWarehouse dataset. Secondly, we propose a modification of the loss function used in the non-rigid ICP registration algorithm, that allows to weight the correspondences according to the confidence given to them. As a use case, we show that we can make the registration more robust to outliers in the 3D scans, such as non-skin parts.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了 3D 扫描的非刚性配准问题，这是形状建模技术的核心。首先，我们为高斯过程可变形模型（GPMM）框架提出了一个基于测地距离的新内核。在内核中使用测地距离使其更适应表面的拓扑和几何特征，并导致孔和弯曲区域周围的变形更加真实。由于内核拥有超参数，我们针对 FaceWarehouse 数据集上的人脸注册任务对其进行了优化。我们表明，在 FaceWarehouse 数据集的所有 20 个表情上进行人脸配准任务时，Geodesic 平方指数内核的性能明显优于最先进的内核。其次，我们提出了对非刚性 ICP 配准算法中使用的损失函数的修改，允许根据给定的置信度对对应关系进行加权。作为一个用例，我们展示了我们可以使配准对 3D 扫描中的异常值（例如非皮肤部分）更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于测地线距离的平方指数核函数和改进的损失函数，用于解决三维非刚性形状配准问题，特别是在面部表情注册和处理扫描噪声方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统核函数在处理复杂拓扑结构和曲面变形时存在局限性，导致配准结果不真实；同时现有方法对扫描中的异常值（如非皮肤部分）敏感，影响鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计测地线平方指数核以适应表面几何特性，并优化超参数；改进非刚性ICP算法的损失函数，通过置信度加权对应点以提升抗噪能力。
AI.result: 在FaceWarehouse数据集的20种表情中，新核函数显著优于现有方法；改进后的损失函数有效提升了配准对扫描异常值的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 测地线核与置信度加权损失函数的结合，为非刚性形状配准提供了更准确且鲁棒的解决方案，尤其适用于复杂曲面和含噪声的三维扫描数据。
