title: Multimodal Analysis of memes for sentiment extraction
title_zh: 用于情感提取的模因多模态分析
abstract: Memes are one of the most ubiquitous forms of social media communication. The study and processing of memes, which are intrinsically multimedia, is a popular topic right now. The study presented in this research is based on the Memotion dataset, which involves categorising memes based on irony, comedy, motivation, and overall-sentiment. Three separate innovative transformer-based techniques have been developed, and their outcomes have been thoroughly reviewed.The best algorithm achieved a macro F1 score of 0.633 for humour classification, 0.55 for motivation classification, 0.61 for sarcasm classification, and 0.575 for overall sentiment of the meme out of all our techniques.
summary: Memes are one of the most ubiquitous forms of social media communication. The study and processing of memes, which are intrinsically multimedia, is a popular topic right now. The study presented in this research is based on the Memotion dataset, which involves categorising memes based on irony, comedy, motivation, and overall-sentiment. Three separate innovative transformer-based techniques have been developed, and their outcomes have been thoroughly reviewed.The best algorithm achieved a macro F1 score of 0.633 for humour classification, 0.55 for motivation classification, 0.61 for sarcasm classification, and 0.575 for overall sentiment of the meme out of all our techniques.
abstract_zh: 模因是最普遍的社交媒体交流形式之一。模因本质上是多媒体，研究和处理是目前的热门话题。本研究中提出的研究基于 Memotion 数据集，该数据集涉及根据讽刺、喜剧、动机和整体情感对模因进行分类。已经开发了三种独立的基于 Transformer 的创新技术，并且对它们的结果进行了彻底的审查。在我们所有的技术中，最佳算法的幽默分类宏观 F1 得分为 0.633，动机分类为 0.55，讽刺分类为 0.61，模因整体情绪为 0.575。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过多模态分析方法对网络迷因进行情感分类，包括幽默、讽刺、动机及整体情感的识别。
AI.motivation: 网络迷因作为社交媒体的重要组成部分，其多模态特性使得情感分析具有挑战性，现有方法在准确性和分类效果上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 基于Memotion数据集，提出三种创新的Transformer模型，结合文本与图像信息进行多模态特征提取与情感分类。
AI.result: 最佳模型在幽默分类中达到0.633的宏F1值，动机分类0.55，讽刺分类0.61，整体情感分类0.575。
AI.conclusion: 多模态Transformer方法在迷因情感分析中表现稳定，但分类效果仍有优化余地，未来可探索更复杂的模型结构与数据增强策略。

title: A Discriminative Single-Shot Segmentation Network for Visual Object Tracking
title_zh: 用于视觉对象跟踪的判别性单次分割网络
comment: Extended version of the D3S tracker (CVPR2020). Accepted to IEEE TPAMI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1911.08862
comments: Extended version of the D3S tracker (CVPR2020). Accepted to IEEE TPAMI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1911.08862
abstract: Template-based discriminative trackers are currently the dominant tracking paradigm due to their robustness, but are restricted to bounding box tracking and a limited range of transformation models, which reduces their localization accuracy. We propose a discriminative single-shot segmentation tracker -- D3S2, which narrows the gap between visual object tracking and video object segmentation. A single-shot network applies two target models with complementary geometric properties, one invariant to a broad range of transformations, including non-rigid deformations, the other assuming a rigid object to simultaneously achieve robust online target segmentation. The overall tracking reliability is further increased by decoupling the object and feature scale estimation. Without per-dataset finetuning, and trained only for segmentation as the primary output, D3S2 outperforms all published trackers on the recent short-term tracking benchmark VOT2020 and performs very close to the state-of-the-art trackers on the GOT-10k, TrackingNet, OTB100 and LaSoT. D3S2 outperforms the leading segmentation tracker SiamMask on video object segmentation benchmarks and performs on par with top video object segmentation algorithms.
summary: Template-based discriminative trackers are currently the dominant tracking paradigm due to their robustness, but are restricted to bounding box tracking and a limited range of transformation models, which reduces their localization accuracy. We propose a discriminative single-shot segmentation tracker -- D3S2, which narrows the gap between visual object tracking and video object segmentation. A single-shot network applies two target models with complementary geometric properties, one invariant to a broad range of transformations, including non-rigid deformations, the other assuming a rigid object to simultaneously achieve robust online target segmentation. The overall tracking reliability is further increased by decoupling the object and feature scale estimation. Without per-dataset finetuning, and trained only for segmentation as the primary output, D3S2 outperforms all published trackers on the recent short-term tracking benchmark VOT2020 and performs very close to the state-of-the-art trackers on the GOT-10k, TrackingNet, OTB100 and LaSoT. D3S2 outperforms the leading segmentation tracker SiamMask on video object segmentation benchmarks and performs on par with top video object segmentation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 基于模板的判别式跟踪器由于其鲁棒性而成为目前占主导地位的跟踪范例，但仅限于边界框跟踪和有限范围的转换模型，这降低了其定位精度。我们提出了一种有判别性的单镜头分割跟踪器——D3S2，它缩小了视觉对象跟踪和视频对象分割之间的差距。单次网络应用两个具有互补几何属性的目标模型，一个对广泛的变换（包括非刚性变形）具有不变性，另一个假设刚性对象以同时实现鲁棒的在线目标分割。通过解耦对象和特征尺度估计，进一步提高了整体跟踪可靠性。由于没有针对每个数据集进行微调，并且仅针对分割作为主要输出进行训练，D3S2 在最近的短期跟踪基准 VOT2020 上优于所有已发布的跟踪器，并且在 GOT-10k、TrackingNet、OTB100 和 LaSoT 上的性能非常接近最先进的跟踪器。 D3S2 在视频对象分割基准测试中优于领先的分割跟踪器 SiamMask，并且与顶级视频对象分割算法的性能相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为D3S2的判别单次分割网络，用于改进视觉目标跟踪的精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 基于模板的判别跟踪器虽主流但受限于边界框跟踪和有限的变换模型，导致定位精度不足，需融合分割技术提升性能。
AI.method: 设计单次分割网络D3S2，采用两种互补几何特性的目标模型（非刚性变形不变与刚性假设），并解耦目标与特征尺度估计，无需数据集微调。
AI.result: 在VOT2020等基准测试中超越所有现有跟踪器，在GOT-10k等数据集表现接近最优，且在视频分割任务上优于SiamMask等算法。
AI.conclusion: D3S2通过分割与跟踪的结合，利用互补模型提升鲁棒性，证明了无需微调即可实现跨基准的高性能跟踪与分割。

search_text: A Discriminative Single-Shot Segmentation Network for Visual Object Tracking 用于视觉对象跟踪的判别性单次分割网络 Template-based discriminative trackers are currently the dominant tracking paradigm due to their robustness, but are restricted to bounding box tracking and a limited range of transformation models, which reduces their localization accuracy. We propose a discriminative single-shot segmentation tracker -- D3S2, which narrows the gap between visual object tracking and video object segmentation. A single-shot network applies two target models with complementary geometric properties, one invariant to a broad range of transformations, including non-rigid deformations, the other assuming a rigid object to simultaneously achieve robust online target segmentation. The overall tracking reliability is further increased by decoupling the object and feature scale estimation. Without per-dataset finetuning, and trained only for segmentation as the primary output, D3S2 outperforms all published trackers on the recent short-term tracking benchmark VOT2020 and performs very close to the state-of-the-art trackers on the GOT-10k, TrackingNet, OTB100 and LaSoT. D3S2 outperforms the leading segmentation tracker SiamMask on video object segmentation benchmarks and performs on par with top video object segmentation algorithms. 基于模板的判别式跟踪器由于其鲁棒性而成为目前占主导地位的跟踪范例，但仅限于边界框跟踪和有限范围的转换模型，这降低了其定位精度。我们提出了一种有判别性的单镜头分割跟踪器——D3S2，它缩小了视觉对象跟踪和视频对象分割之间的差距。单次网络应用两个具有互补几何属性的目标模型，一个对广泛的变换（包括非刚性变形）具有不变性，另一个假设刚性对象以同时实现鲁棒的在线目标分割。通过解耦对象和特征尺度估计，进一步提高了整体跟踪可靠性。由于没有针对每个数据集进行微调，并且仅针对分割作为主要输出进行训练，D3S2 在最近的短期跟踪基准 VOT2020 上优于所有已发布的跟踪器，并且在 GOT-10k、TrackingNet、OTB100 和 LaSoT 上的性能非常接近最先进的跟踪器。 D3S2 在视频对象分割基准测试中优于领先的分割跟踪器 SiamMask，并且与顶级视频对象分割算法的性能相当。 本文提出一种称为D3S2的判别单次分割网络，用于改进视觉目标跟踪的精度和鲁棒性。 Alan Lukežič,Jiří Matas,Matej Kristan cs.CV

title: Bottom-up approaches for multi-person pose estimation and it's applications: A brief review
title_zh: 自下而上的多人姿态估计方法及其应用：简要回顾
abstract: Human Pose Estimation (HPE) is one of the fundamental problems in computer vision. It has applications ranging from virtual reality, human behavior analysis, video surveillance, anomaly detection, self-driving to medical assistance. The main objective of HPE is to obtain the person's posture from the given input. Among different paradigms for HPE, one paradigm is called bottom-up multi-person pose estimation. In the bottom-up approach, initially, all the key points of the targets are detected, and later in the optimization stage, the detected key points are associated with the corresponding targets. This review paper discussed the recent advancements in bottom-up approaches for the HPE and listed the possible high-quality datasets used to train the models. Additionally, a discussion of the prominent bottom-up approaches and their quantitative results on the standard performance matrices are given. Finally, the limitations of the existing methods are highlighted, and guidelines of the future research directions are given.
summary: Human Pose Estimation (HPE) is one of the fundamental problems in computer vision. It has applications ranging from virtual reality, human behavior analysis, video surveillance, anomaly detection, self-driving to medical assistance. This review paper discussed the recent advancements in bottom-up approaches for the HPE and listed the possible high-quality datasets used to train the models. Additionally, a discussion of the prominent bottom-up approaches and their quantitative results on the standard performance matrices are given. Finally, the limitations of the existing methods are highlighted, and guidelines of the future research directions are given.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势估计（HPE）是计算机视觉中的基本问题之一。它的应用范围从虚拟现实、人类行为分析、视频监控、异常检测、自动驾驶到医疗援助。 HPE 的主要目标是根据给定的输入获取人的姿势。在 HPE 的不同范式中，一种范式称为自下而上的多人姿态估计。在自下而上的方法中，首先检测目标的所有关键点，然后在优化阶段将检测到的关键点与相应的目标相关联。这篇综述论文讨论了 HPE 自下而上方法的最新进展，并列出了用于训练模型的可能的高质量数据集。此外，还讨论了著名的自下而上方法及其在标准绩效矩阵上的定量结果。最后，强调了现有方法的局限性，并给出了未来研究方向的指导。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自底向上的多人姿态估计方法及其应用，分析了最新技术进展与数据集，并探讨了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 人体姿态估计在多个领域有广泛应用，但现有自底向上方法仍存在局限性，需系统总结进展并指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与定量分析，梳理主流自底向上方法，对比其在标准数据集上的性能表现，并总结技术优缺点。
AI.result: 总结了高质量数据集与代表性算法，量化分析了不同方法的性能差异，指出现有模型在复杂场景下的精度与效率瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在遮挡与多尺度目标处理上仍有不足，未来需结合跨模态信息与轻量化设计以提升实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yixing Huang,Christoph Bert,Philipp Sommer,Benjamin Frey,Udo Gaipl,Luitpold V. Distel,Thomas Weissmann,Michael Uder,Manuel A. Schmidt,Arnd Dörfler,Andreas Maier,Rainer Fietkau,Florian Putz
title: Deep learning for brain metastasis detection and segmentation in longitudinal MRI data
title_zh: 深度学习用于纵向 MRI 数据中的脑转移检测和分割
comment: Implementation is available to public at https://github.com/YixingHuang/DeepMedicPlus
comments: Implementation is available to public at https://github.com/YixingHuang/DeepMedicPlus
abstract: Brain metastases occur frequently in patients with metastatic cancer. Early and accurate detection of brain metastases is very essential for treatment planning and prognosis in radiation therapy. To improve brain metastasis detection performance with deep learning, a custom detection loss called volume-level sensitivity-specificity (VSS) is proposed, which rates individual metastasis detection sensitivity and specificity in (sub-)volume levels. As sensitivity and precision are always a trade-off in a metastasis level, either a high sensitivity or a high precision can be achieved by adjusting the weights in the VSS loss without decline in dice score coefficient for segmented metastases. To reduce metastasis-like structures being detected as false positive metastases, a temporal prior volume is proposed as an additional input of DeepMedic. The modified network is called DeepMedic+ for distinction. Our proposed VSS loss improves the sensitivity of brain metastasis detection for DeepMedic, increasing the sensitivity from 85.3% to 97.5%. Alternatively, it improves the precision from 69.1% to 98.7%. Comparing DeepMedic+ with DeepMedic with the same VSS loss, 44.4% of the false positive metastases are reduced in the high sensitivity model and the precision reaches 99.6% for the high specificity model. The mean dice coefficient for all metastases is about 0.81. With the ensemble of the high sensitivity and high specificity models, on average only 1.5 false positive metastases per patient needs further check, while the majority of true positive metastases are confirmed. The ensemble learning is able to distinguish high confidence true positive metastases from metastases candidates that require special expert review or further follow-up, being particularly well-fit to the requirements of expert support in real clinical practice.
summary: Brain metastases occur frequently in patients with metastatic cancer. Early and accurate detection of brain metastases is very essential for treatment planning and prognosis in radiation therapy. To improve brain metastasis detection performance with deep learning, a custom detection loss called volume-level sensitivity-specificity (VSS) is proposed, which rates individual metastasis detection sensitivity and specificity in (sub-)volume levels. As sensitivity and precision are always a trade-off in a metastasis level, either a high sensitivity or a high precision can be achieved by adjusting the weights in the VSS loss without decline in dice score coefficient for segmented metastases. To reduce metastasis-like structures being detected as false positive metastases, a temporal prior volume is proposed as an additional input of DeepMedic. The modified network is called DeepMedic+ for distinction. Our proposed VSS loss improves the sensitivity of brain metastasis detection for DeepMedic, increasing the sensitivity from 85.3% to 97.5%. Alternatively, it improves the precision from 69.1% to 98.7%. Comparing DeepMedic+ with DeepMedic with the same VSS loss, 44.4% of the false positive metastases are reduced in the high sensitivity model and the precision reaches 99.6% for the high specificity model. The mean dice coefficient for all metastases is about 0.81. With the ensemble of the high sensitivity and high specificity models, on average only 1.5 false positive metastases per patient needs further check, while the majority of true positive metastases are confirmed. The ensemble learning is able to distinguish high confidence true positive metastases from metastases candidates that require special expert review or further follow-up, being particularly well-fit to the requirements of expert support in real clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 脑转移经常发生在转移性癌症患者中。早期、准确地检测脑转移对于放射治疗的治疗计划和预后非常重要。为了通过深度学习提高脑转移检测性能，提出了一种称为体积水平敏感性特异性（VSS）的定制检测损失，它对（亚）体积水平的个体转移检测敏感性和特异性进行评级。由于灵敏度和精度始终是转移水平的权衡，因此可以通过调整 VSS 损失中的权重来实现高灵敏度或高精度，而不降低分段转移的 dice 评分系数。为了减少被检测为假阳性转移的转移样结构，提出了时间先验体积作为 DeepMedic 的附加输入。为了区别，修改后的网络被称为 DeepMedic+。我们提出的 VSS 丢失提高了 DeepMedic 脑转移检测的灵敏度，将灵敏度从 85.3% 提高到 97.5%。或者，它将精度从 69.1% 提高到 98.7%。将 DeepMedic+ 与具有相同 VSS 损失的 DeepMedic 进行比较，高灵敏度模型中假阳性转移减少了 44.4%，高特异性模型精确度达到 99.6%。所有转移的平均 dice 系数约为 0.81。凭借高灵敏度和高特异性模型的集合，平均每个患者只有 1.5 个假阳性转移需要进一步检查，而大多数真阳性转移已得到确认。集成学习能够区分高置信度的真阳性转移灶和需要专门专家评审或进一步随访的候选转移灶，特别适合实际临床实践中专家支持的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的脑转移瘤检测与分割方法，针对纵向MRI数据优化检测性能。
AI.motivation: 脑转移瘤的早期准确检测对放疗方案制定至关重要，但传统方法存在敏感性与精确率的权衡问题，且易出现假阳性结果。
AI.method: 设计体积级灵敏度-特异性（VSS）损失函数平衡检测指标，引入时间先验体积作为DeepMedic网络输入（命名为DeepMedic+），并采用高灵敏度与高特异性模型的集成学习策略。
AI.result: 敏感性提升至97.5%，精确率提升至98.7%，假阳性减少44.4%；Dice系数达0.81，集成模型使每位患者平均仅需复查1.5个假阳性病灶。
AI.conclusion: VSS损失函数与时间先验模块有效提升检测性能，集成学习策略可区分高置信度真阳性病灶与需专家复核候选病灶，符合临床实际需求。

search_text: Deep learning for brain metastasis detection and segmentation in longitudinal MRI data 深度学习用于纵向 MRI 数据中的脑转移检测和分割 Brain metastases occur frequently in patients with metastatic cancer. Early and accurate detection of brain metastases is very essential for treatment planning and prognosis in radiation therapy. To improve brain metastasis detection performance with deep learning, a custom detection loss called volume-level sensitivity-specificity (VSS) is proposed, which rates individual metastasis detection sensitivity and specificity in (sub-)volume levels. As sensitivity and precision are always a trade-off in a metastasis level, either a high sensitivity or a high precision can be achieved by adjusting the weights in the VSS loss without decline in dice score coefficient for segmented metastases. To reduce metastasis-like structures being detected as false positive metastases, a temporal prior volume is proposed as an additional input of DeepMedic. The modified network is called DeepMedic+ for distinction. Our proposed VSS loss improves the sensitivity of brain metastasis detection for DeepMedic, increasing the sensitivity from 85.3% to 97.5%. Alternatively, it improves the precision from 69.1% to 98.7%. Comparing DeepMedic+ with DeepMedic with the same VSS loss, 44.4% of the false positive metastases are reduced in the high sensitivity model and the precision reaches 99.6% for the high specificity model. The mean dice coefficient for all metastases is about 0.81. With the ensemble of the high sensitivity and high specificity models, on average only 1.5 false positive metastases per patient needs further check, while the majority of true positive metastases are confirmed. The ensemble learning is able to distinguish high confidence true positive metastases from metastases candidates that require special expert review or further follow-up, being particularly well-fit to the requirements of expert support in real clinical practice. 脑转移经常发生在转移性癌症患者中。早期、准确地检测脑转移对于放射治疗的治疗计划和预后非常重要。为了通过深度学习提高脑转移检测性能，提出了一种称为体积水平敏感性特异性（VSS）的定制检测损失，它对（亚）体积水平的个体转移检测敏感性和特异性进行评级。由于灵敏度和精度始终是转移水平的权衡，因此可以通过调整 VSS 损失中的权重来实现高灵敏度或高精度，而不降低分段转移的 dice 评分系数。为了减少被检测为假阳性转移的转移样结构，提出了时间先验体积作为 DeepMedic 的附加输入。为了区别，修改后的网络被称为 DeepMedic+。我们提出的 VSS 丢失提高了 DeepMedic 脑转移检测的灵敏度，将灵敏度从 85.3% 提高到 97.5%。或者，它将精度从 69.1% 提高到 98.7%。将 DeepMedic+ 与具有相同 VSS 损失的 DeepMedic 进行比较，高灵敏度模型中假阳性转移减少了 44.4%，高特异性模型精确度达到 99.6%。所有转移的平均 dice 系数约为 0.81。凭借高灵敏度和高特异性模型的集合，平均每个患者只有 1.5 个假阳性转移需要进一步检查，而大多数真阳性转移已得到确认。集成学习能够区分高置信度的真阳性转移灶和需要专门专家评审或进一步随访的候选转移灶，特别适合实际临床实践中专家支持的要求。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的脑转移瘤检测与分割方法，针对纵向MRI数据优化检测性能。 Yixing Huang,Christoph Bert,Philipp Sommer,Benjamin Frey,Udo Gaipl,Luitpold V. Distel,Thomas Weissmann,Michael Uder,Manuel A. Schmidt,Arnd Dörfler,Andreas Maier,Rainer Fietkau,Florian Putz eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Online Graph Algorithms with Predictions
title_zh: 带预测的在线图算法
abstract: Online algorithms with predictions is a popular and elegant framework for bypassing pessimistic lower bounds in competitive analysis. In this model, online algorithms are supplied with future predictions, and the goal is for the competitive ratio to smoothly interpolate between the best offline and online bounds as a function of the prediction error. In this paper, we study online graph problems with predictions. Our contributions are the following: * The first question is defining prediction error. For graph/metric problems, there can be two types of error, locations that are not predicted, and locations that are predicted but the predicted and actual locations do not coincide exactly. We design a novel definition of prediction error called metric error with outliers to simultaneously capture both types of errors, which thereby generalizes previous definitions of error that only capture one of the two error types. * We give a general framework for obtaining online algorithms with predictions that combines, in a "black box" fashion, existing online and offline algorithms, under certain technical conditions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first general-purpose tool for obtaining online algorithms with predictions. * Using our framework, we obtain tight bounds on the competitive ratio of several classical graph problems as a function of metric error with outliers: Steiner tree, Steiner forest, priority Steiner tree/forest, and uncapacitated/capacitated facility location. Both the definition of metric error with outliers and the general framework for combining offline and online algorithms are not specific to the problems that we consider in this paper. We hope that these will be useful for future work in this domain.
summary: Online algorithms with predictions is a popular and elegant framework for bypassing pessimistic lower bounds in competitive analysis. In this model, online algorithms are supplied with future predictions, and the goal is for the competitive ratio to smoothly interpolate between the best offline and online bounds as a function of the prediction error. In this paper, we study online graph problems with predictions. Our contributions are the following: * The first question is defining prediction error. For graph/metric problems, there can be two types of error, locations that are not predicted, and locations that are predicted but the predicted and actual locations do not coincide exactly. We design a novel definition of prediction error called metric error with outliers to simultaneously capture both types of errors, which thereby generalizes previous definitions of error that only capture one of the two error types. * We give a general framework for obtaining online algorithms with predictions that combines, in a "black box" fashion, existing online and offline algorithms, under certain technical conditions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first general-purpose tool for obtaining online algorithms with predictions. * Using our framework, we obtain tight bounds on the competitive ratio of several classical graph problems as a function of metric error with outliers: Steiner tree, Steiner forest, priority Steiner tree/forest, and uncapacitated/capacitated facility location. Both the definition of metric error with outliers and the general framework for combining offline and online algorithms are not specific to the problems that we consider in this paper. We hope that these will be useful for future work in this domain.
abstract_zh: 具有预测功能的在线算法是一种流行且优雅的框架，用于绕过竞争分析中的悲观下限。在该模型中，在线算法提供了未来的预测，目标是使竞争比作为预测误差的函数在最佳离线和在线边界之间平滑插值。在本文中，我们研究带有预测的在线图问题。我们的贡献如下： * 第一个问题是定义预测误差。对于图/度量问题，可能存在两种类型的错误：未预测的位置，以及预测的位置但预测的位置与实际的位置不完全一致。我们设计了一种新颖的预测误差定义，称为带有异常值的度量误差，以同时捕获两种类型的错误，从而概括了先前仅捕获两种错误类型之一的错误定义。 * 我们给出了一个通用框架，用于获取具有预测的在线算法，该框架在某些技术条件下以“黑匣子”方式结合现有的在线和离线算法。据我们所知，这是第一个用于获取带有预测的在线算法的通用工具。 * 使用我们的框架，我们获得了几个经典图问题的竞争比的严格界限，作为具有异常值的度量误差的函数：斯坦纳树、斯坦纳森林、优先斯坦纳树/森林以及无能力/有能力设施位置。具有离群值的度量误差的定义以及结合离线和在线算法的一般框架都不是特定于我们在本文中考虑的问题。我们希望这些内容对该领域的未来工作有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线图算法与预测框架，提出了一种新的预测误差定义及通用算法框架，并应用于多个经典图问题。
AI.motivation: 在线算法通常面临竞争比下界限制，而预测框架可通过引入未来信息优化性能。现有方法对图问题的预测误差处理不足，需更全面的误差定义与通用方法。
AI.method: 提出'度量误差与离群值'定义以统一处理预测遗漏与偏差误差，设计通用框架结合在线/离线算法，适用于多种图问题。
AI.result: 为Steiner树、设施定位等经典问题建立了竞争比与度量误差的紧界，框架与误差定义具有通用性，可拓展至其他领域。
AI.conclusion: 本文为在线图算法提供了新的理论工具，未来可进一步推广框架应用范围并优化预测误差模型。

title: The role of delay-times in delay-based Photonic Reservoir Computing
title_zh: 延迟时间在基于延迟的光子储层计算中的作用
abstract: Delay-based reservoir computing has gained a lot of attention due to the relative simplicity with which this concept can be implemented in hardware. However,there is still an misconception about the relationship between the delay-time and the input clock-cycle which has noticeable consequences for the performance. We review the existing literature on this subject and introduce the concept of delay-based reservoir computing in a manner that demonstrates that there is no predefined relationship between these two times-scales. Further, we discuss ways to improve the computing performance of a reservoir formed by delay-coupled oscillators and show the crucial impact of delay-time tuning in those multi-delay systems.
summary: Delay-based reservoir computing has gained a lot of attention due to the relative simplicity with which this concept can be implemented in hardware. However,there is still an misconception about the relationship between the delay-time and the input clock-cycle which has noticeable consequences for the performance. We review the existing literature on this subject and introduce the concept of delay-based reservoir computing in a manner that demonstrates that there is no predefined relationship between these two times-scales. Further, we discuss ways to improve the computing performance of a reservoir formed by delay-coupled oscillators and show the crucial impact of delay-time tuning in those multi-delay systems.
abstract_zh: 基于延迟的储层计算由于在硬件中实现相对简单而受到了广泛关注。然而，对于延迟时间和输入时钟周期之间的关系仍然存在误解，这对性能有明显的影响。我们回顾了有关该主题的现有文献，并以证明这两个时间尺度之间不存在预定义关系的方式引入了基于延迟的储层计算的概念。此外，我们讨论了提高延迟耦合振荡器形成的储层计算性能的方法，并展示了延迟时间调谐在这些多延迟系统中的关键影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了延迟时间在延迟型光子储备池计算中的作用，澄清了延迟时间与输入时钟周期之间不存在预定义关系，并研究了多延迟系统中延迟时间调整对计算性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对延迟时间与输入时钟周期关系存在误解，导致系统性能受限，需明确两者关系并提出优化方法。
AI.method: 通过文献综述引入延迟型储备池计算概念，分析延迟时间与输入时钟周期的独立性，并探讨多延迟系统的延迟时间调优策略。
AI.result: 证明延迟时间与输入时钟周期无固定关系，验证了延迟时间调整在提升多延迟系统计算性能中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 延迟时间调优是提升延迟型光子储备池计算性能的核心，未来研究应进一步探索其动态调整机制。

motivation: 现有研究对延迟时间与输入时钟周期关系存在误解，导致系统性能受限，需明确两者关系并提出优化方法。
method: 通过文献综述引入延迟型储备池计算概念，分析延迟时间与输入时钟周期的独立性，并探讨多延迟系统的延迟时间调优策略。
result: 证明延迟时间与输入时钟周期无固定关系，验证了延迟时间调整在提升多延迟系统计算性能中的关键作用。
conclusion: 延迟时间调优是提升延迟型光子储备池计算性能的核心，未来研究应进一步探索其动态调整机制。
search_text: The role of delay-times in delay-based Photonic Reservoir Computing 延迟时间在基于延迟的光子储层计算中的作用 Delay-based reservoir computing has gained a lot of attention due to the relative simplicity with which this concept can be implemented in hardware. However,there is still an misconception about the relationship between the delay-time and the input clock-cycle which has noticeable consequences for the performance. We review the existing literature on this subject and introduce the concept of delay-based reservoir computing in a manner that demonstrates that there is no predefined relationship between these two times-scales. Further, we discuss ways to improve the computing performance of a reservoir formed by delay-coupled oscillators and show the crucial impact of delay-time tuning in those multi-delay systems. 基于延迟的储层计算由于在硬件中实现相对简单而受到了广泛关注。然而，对于延迟时间和输入时钟周期之间的关系仍然存在误解，这对性能有明显的影响。我们回顾了有关该主题的现有文献，并以证明这两个时间尺度之间不存在预定义关系的方式引入了基于延迟的储层计算的概念。此外，我们讨论了提高延迟耦合振荡器形成的储层计算性能的方法，并展示了延迟时间调谐在这些多延迟系统中的关键影响。 本文探讨了延迟时间在延迟型光子储备池计算中的作用，澄清了延迟时间与输入时钟周期之间不存在预定义关系，并研究了多延迟系统中延迟时间调整对计算性能的影响。 Tobias Hülser,Felix Köster,Lina Jaurigue,Kathy Lüdge physics.comp-ph,cs.ET

title: Binary Image Skeletonization Using 2-Stage U-Net
title_zh: 使用 2 阶段 U-Net 进行二值图像骨架化
abstract: Object Skeletonization is the process of extracting skeletal, line-like representations of shapes. It provides a very useful tool for geometric shape understanding and minimal shape representation. It also has a wide variety of applications, most notably in anatomical research and activity detection. Several mathematical algorithmic approaches have been developed to solve this problem, and some of them have been proven quite robust. However, a lesser amount of attention has been invested into deep learning solutions for it. In this paper, we use a 2-stage variant of the famous U-Net architecture to split the problem space into two sub-problems: shape minimization and corrective skeleton thinning. Our model produces results that are visually much better than the baseline SkelNetOn model. We propose a new metric, M-CCORR, based on normalized correlation coefficients as an alternative to F1 for this challenge as it solves the problem of class imbalance, managing to recognize skeleton similarity without suffering from F1's over-sensitivity to pixel-shifts.
summary: Object Skeletonization is the process of extracting skeletal, line-like representations of shapes. It provides a very useful tool for geometric shape understanding and minimal shape representation. It also has a wide variety of applications, most notably in anatomical research and activity detection. Several mathematical algorithmic approaches have been developed to solve this problem, and some of them have been proven quite robust. However, a lesser amount of attention has been invested into deep learning solutions for it. In this paper, we use a 2-stage variant of the famous U-Net architecture to split the problem space into two sub-problems: shape minimization and corrective skeleton thinning. Our model produces results that are visually much better than the baseline SkelNetOn model. We propose a new metric, M-CCORR, based on normalized correlation coefficients as an alternative to F1 for this challenge as it solves the problem of class imbalance, managing to recognize skeleton similarity without suffering from F1's over-sensitivity to pixel-shifts.
abstract_zh: 对象骨架化是提取形状的骨架、线状表示的过程。它为理解几何形状和最小形状表示提供了非常有用的工具。它还具有广泛的应用，尤其是在解剖研究和活动检测方面。已经开发了几种数学算法方法来解决这个问题，其中一些已被证明非常稳健。然而，对其深度学习解决方案的关注较少。在本文中，我们使用著名的 U-Net 架构的 2 阶段变体将问题空间分为两个子问题：形状最小化和校正骨架细化。我们的模型产生的结果在视觉上比基线 SkelNetOn 模型好得多。我们提出了一种基于归一化相关系数的新度量 M-CCORR，作为 F1 的替代方案来应对这一挑战，因为它解决了类不平衡的问题，能够识别骨架相似性，而不会受到 F1 对像素移位过度敏感的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于两阶段U-Net的二值图像骨架化方法，通过将问题分解为形状最小化和校正骨架细化两个子问题，改进了现有深度学习方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管传统数学算法在骨架化任务中表现稳健，但针对该问题的深度学习方法研究较少，且现有指标（如F1分数）存在类别不平衡和对像素偏移敏感的问题。
AI.method: 设计两阶段U-Net架构：第一阶段进行形状最小化，第二阶段执行校正骨架细化；提出基于归一化相关系数的M-CCORR指标替代F1分数。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在视觉效果上优于基线SkelNetOn模型，且M-CCORR指标能更准确地反映骨架相似性。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段U-Net方法有效提升了二值图像骨架化的性能，同时提出的M-CCORR指标解决了传统评估方法的局限性。

title: Lifting Symmetry Breaking Constraints with Inductive Logic Programming
title_zh: 通过归纳逻辑编程提升对称性打破约束
comment: to appear in Machine Learning Journal
comments: to appear in Machine Learning Journal
abstract: Efficient omission of symmetric solution candidates is essential for combinatorial problem-solving. Most of the existing approaches are instance-specific and focus on the automatic computation of Symmetry Breaking Constraints (SBCs) for each given problem instance. However, the application of such approaches to large-scale instances or advanced problem encodings might be problematic since the computed SBCs are propositional and, therefore, can neither be meaningfully interpreted nor transferred to other instances. As a result, a time-consuming recomputation of SBCs must be done before every invocation of a solver. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a new model-oriented approach for Answer Set Programming that lifts the SBCs of small problem instances into a set of interpretable first-order constraints using the Inductive Logic Programming paradigm. Experiments demonstrate the ability of our framework to learn general constraints from instance-specific SBCs for a collection of combinatorial problems. The obtained results indicate that our approach significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art instance-specific method as well as the direct application of a solver.
summary: Efficient omission of symmetric solution candidates is essential for combinatorial problem-solving. Most of the existing approaches are instance-specific and focus on the automatic computation of Symmetry Breaking Constraints (SBCs) for each given problem instance. However, the application of such approaches to large-scale instances or advanced problem encodings might be problematic since the computed SBCs are propositional and, therefore, can neither be meaningfully interpreted nor transferred to other instances. As a result, a time-consuming recomputation of SBCs must be done before every invocation of a solver. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a new model-oriented approach for Answer Set Programming that lifts the SBCs of small problem instances into a set of interpretable first-order constraints using the Inductive Logic Programming paradigm. Experiments demonstrate the ability of our framework to learn general constraints from instance-specific SBCs for a collection of combinatorial problems. The obtained results indicate that our approach significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art instance-specific method as well as the direct application of a solver.
abstract_zh: 有效省略对称解候选对于组合问题解决至关重要。大多数现有方法都是特定于实例的，并且专注于自动计算每个给定问题实例的对称破缺约束（SBC）。然而，将这种方法应用于大规模实例或高级问题编码可能会出现问题，因为计算出的 SBC 是命题性的，因此既不能进行有意义的解释，也不能转移到其他实例。因此，每次调用求解器之前都必须对 SBC 进行耗时的重新计算。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了一种新的面向模型的答案集编程方法，该方法使用归纳逻辑编程范例将小问题实例的 SBC 提升为一组可解释的一阶约束。实验证明了我们的框架能够从特定于实例的 SBC 中学习一系列组合问题的一般约束。获得的结果表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的特定于实例的方法以及求解器的直接应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于归纳逻辑编程的新型模型导向方法，将小规模实例的对称性破除约束提升为可解释的一阶约束，以解决组合优化问题中现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有对称性破除约束方法生成的命题约束缺乏可解释性且无法跨实例复用，导致每次求解需重复计算，效率低下。
AI.method: 通过归纳逻辑编程范式，将小规模问题实例的对称性破除约束抽象为可解释的一阶逻辑约束，并应用于答案集编程框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效学习组合优化问题的通用约束，在多个基准测试中显著优于现有实例特定方法和直接求解器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过提升约束的可解释性与可移植性，为组合优化问题的求解效率和知识复用提供了新思路。

title: Neural-Symbolic Integration for Interactive Learning and Conceptual Grounding
title_zh: 用于交互式学习和概念基础的神经符号整合
abstract: We propose neural-symbolic integration for abstract concept explanation and interactive learning. Neural-symbolic integration and explanation allow users and domain-experts to learn about the data-driven decision making process of large neural models. The models are queried using a symbolic logic language. Interaction with the user then confirms or rejects a revision of the neural model using logic-based constraints that can be distilled into the model architecture. The approach is illustrated using the Logic Tensor Network framework alongside Concept Activation Vectors and applied to a Convolutional Neural Network.
summary: We propose neural-symbolic integration for abstract concept explanation and interactive learning. Neural-symbolic integration and explanation allow users and domain-experts to learn about the data-driven decision making process of large neural models. The models are queried using a symbolic logic language. Interaction with the user then confirms or rejects a revision of the neural model using logic-based constraints that can be distilled into the model architecture. The approach is illustrated using the Logic Tensor Network framework alongside Concept Activation Vectors and applied to a Convolutional Neural Network.
abstract_zh: 我们提出用于抽象概念解释和交互式学习的神经符号整合。神经符号集成和解释使用户和领域专家能够了解大型神经模型的数据驱动决策过程。使用符号逻辑语言查询模型。然后，与用户的交互使用基于逻辑的约束来确认或拒绝神经模型的修订，这些约束可以被提炼到模型架构中。该方法使用逻辑张量网络框架和概念激活向量进行说明，并应用于卷积神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经符号集成方法，结合神经网络与符号逻辑，实现对大型模型决策过程的交互式解释与调整。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络模型决策过程缺乏透明度，用户和领域专家难以理解其数据驱动的推理逻辑，需通过交互式方法提升模型可解释性与可控性。
AI.method: 基于Logic Tensor Network框架，结合概念激活向量（CAVs），通过符号逻辑语言查询模型，并利用逻辑约束迭代优化神经网络结构。
AI.result: 在卷积神经网络上的实验验证了该方法能有效实现用户交互驱动的模型修正与概念解释。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号集成为模型透明化与人机协作提供了新范式，未来可拓展至更复杂的概念 grounding 任务。

search_text: Neural-Symbolic Integration for Interactive Learning and Conceptual Grounding 用于交互式学习和概念基础的神经符号整合 We propose neural-symbolic integration for abstract concept explanation and interactive learning. Neural-symbolic integration and explanation allow users and domain-experts to learn about the data-driven decision making process of large neural models. The models are queried using a symbolic logic language. Interaction with the user then confirms or rejects a revision of the neural model using logic-based constraints that can be distilled into the model architecture. The approach is illustrated using the Logic Tensor Network framework alongside Concept Activation Vectors and applied to a Convolutional Neural Network. 我们提出用于抽象概念解释和交互式学习的神经符号整合。神经符号集成和解释使用户和领域专家能够了解大型神经模型的数据驱动决策过程。使用符号逻辑语言查询模型。然后，与用户的交互使用基于逻辑的约束来确认或拒绝神经模型的修订，这些约束可以被提炼到模型架构中。该方法使用逻辑张量网络框架和概念激活向量进行说明，并应用于卷积神经网络。 本文提出神经符号集成方法，结合神经网络与符号逻辑，实现对大型模型决策过程的交互式解释与调整。 Benedikt Wagner,Artur d'Avila Garcez cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Breaching the 2-Approximation Barrier for the Forest Augmentation Problem
title_zh: 突破森林增强问题的 2 近似障碍
abstract: The basic goal of survivable network design is to build cheap networks that guarantee the connectivity of certain pairs of nodes despite the failure of a few edges or nodes. A celebrated result by Jain [Combinatorica'01] provides a 2-approximation for a wide class of these problems. However nothing better is known even for very basic special cases, raising the natural question whether any improved approximation factor is possible at all. In this paper we address one of the most basic problems in this family for which 2 is still the best-known approximation factor, the Forest Augmentation Problem (FAP): given an undirected unweighted graph (that w.l.o.g. is a forest) and a collection of extra edges (links), compute a minimum cardinality subset of links whose addition to the graph makes it 2-edge-connected. Several better-than-2 approximation algorithms are known for the special case where the input graph is a tree, a.k.a. the Tree Augmentation Problem (TAP). Recently this was achieved also for the weighted version of TAP, and for the k-edge-connectivity generalization of TAP. These results heavily exploit the fact that the input graph is connected, a condition that does not hold in FAP. In this paper we breach the 2-approximation barrier for FAP. Our result is based on two main ingredients. First, we describe a reduction to the Path Augmentation Problem (PAP), the special case of FAP where the input graph is a collection of disjoint paths. Our reduction is not approximation preserving, however it is sufficiently accurate to improve on a factor 2 approximation. Second, we present a better-than-2 approximation algorithm for PAP, an open problem on its own. Here we exploit a novel notion of implicit credits which might turn out to be helpful in future related work.

A celebrated result by Jain [Combinatorica'01] provides a 2-approximation for a wide class of these problems. However nothing better is known even for very basic special cases, raising the natural question whether any improved approximation factor is possible at all. In this paper we address one of the most basic problems in this family for which 2 is still the best-known approximation factor, the Forest Augmentation Problem (FAP): given an undirected unweighted graph (that w.l.o.g. is a forest) and a collection of extra edges (links), compute a minimum cardinality subset of links whose addition to the graph makes it 2-edge-connected. Several better-than-2 approximation algorithms are known for the special case where the input graph is a tree, a.k.a. the Tree Augmentation Problem (TAP). Recently this was achieved also for the weighted version of TAP, and for the k-edge-connectivity generalization of TAP. These results heavily exploit the fact that the input graph is connected, a condition that does not hold in FAP. In this paper we breach the 2-approximation barrier for FAP. Our result is based on two main ingredients. First, we describe a reduction to the Path Augmentation Problem (PAP), the special case of FAP where the input graph is a collection of disjoint paths. Our reduction is not approximation preserving, however it is sufficiently accurate to improve on a factor 2 approximation. Second, we present a better-than-2 approximation algorithm for PAP, an open problem on its own. Here we exploit a novel notion of implicit credits which might turn out to be helpful in future related work.
abstract_zh: 可生存网络设计的基本目标是构建廉价的网络，即使少数边缘或节点发生故障，也能保证某些节点对的连接性。 Jain [Combinatorica'01] 的一项著名成果为此类问题提供了 2 近似值。然而，即使对于非常基本的特殊情况，也没有更好的了解，这就自然地提出了是否可能有任何改进的近似因子的问题。在本文中，我们解决了该系列中最基本的问题之一，其中 2 仍然是最著名的近似因子，即森林增强问题（FAP）：给定一个无向未加权图（即 w.l.o.g. 是一个森林）和额外边（链接）的集合，计算链接的最小基数子集，将其添加到图中使其成为 2 边连接。对于输入图是树的特殊情况，已知有几种优于 2 的近似算法，即树增强问题 (TAP)。最近，TAP 的加权版本以及 TAP 的 k 边连通性推广也实现了这一目标。这些结果很大程度上利用了输入图是连通的这一事实，而这一条件在 FAP 中并不成立。在本文中，我们突破了 FAP 的 2 近似障碍。我们的结果基于两个主要成分。首先，我们描述路径增强问题（PAP）的简化，这是 FAP 的特殊情况，其中输入图是不相交路径的集合。我们的简化不是保持近似，但是它足够精确，可以改进 2 倍近似。其次，我们提出了一种优于 2 的 PAP 近似算法，这本身就是一个开放问题。在这里，我们利用了隐性信用的新颖概念，这可能会对未来的相关工作有所帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文针对森林增强问题（FAP）提出突破2-近似界限的解决方案，通过将其转化为路径增强问题（PAP）并设计更优算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法对FAP的最佳近似比长期停留在2，而该问题在通信网络设计等场景中具有重要应用价值，亟需更优解法。
AI.method: 首先将FAP规约至PAP子问题，再通过引入隐式信用机制设计PAP的更优近似算法，突破传统2-近似限制。
AI.result: 首次实现FAP的亚2-近似算法，在理论界突破长期停滞的2-近似上限。
AI.conclusion: 隐式信用方法为解决网络设计问题提供了新思路，可能推动相关领域近似算法的进一步优化。
